title: Live Trading Tester (QA / Trading Platform Tester) - Part time/Gig
description:
We are seeking a Live Trading Tester to test and validate trading workflows inside a live or paper trading environment. This role focuses on executing simulated or live trades, identifying platform issues, validating trade execution logic, and testing the full trading pipeline from order placement through approval and settlement.



The ideal candidate has hands-on experience with trading platforms, understands order flow, and can think like both a trader and a software tester.



Responsibilities

Execute paper and/or live simulated trades using approved trading platforms (e.g. Kalshi or similar)

Test end-to-end trading workflows, including:

Order placement

Trade execution

Order fills

Position updates

Approval flow

Settlement logic

Validate platform behavior during normal and edge-case trading scenarios

Identify, reproduce, and document trading-related bugs or execution issues



Verify:

Order routing logic

Trade status updates

Pricing and probability data

Position calculations

Approval and recommendation logic

Test how the platform performs under different market conditions and user actions

Report defects with screenshots, trade logs, and reproducible steps

Work with QA and engineering teams to help isolate issues affecting trading functionality

Provide feedback from a real-user trader perspective to improve usability and reliability



Required Qualifications

Experience using trading or prediction market platforms (examples: Kalshi, broker platforms, futures, options, sports/prediction exchanges)



Understanding of:

Order types (market, limit, stop)

Bid/ask spreads

Order fills and execution

Position management

Trading workflows

Experience testing software, finding bugs, or performing structured QA

Ability to document defects clearly and reproduce issues

Strong attention to detail and analytical thinking





Preferred Background

Candidates may come from backgrounds such as:



Retail or independent traders

Finance or economics students with active trading experience

Trading platform power users

QA testers with fintech/trading product exposure

Market microstructure or prediction market enthusiasts



Nice to Have

Experience with paper trading environments

Experience testing trading interfaces

Familiarity with probability-based markets (Kalshi-style markets)

Understanding of risk controls and approval workflows



Example Test Scenarios This Role Would Perform

Execute a trade and verify it reaches the correct status

Test whether order fills update portfolio balances correctly

Validate approval flow before trades go live

Confirm recommendations match underlying probability logic

Simulate edge cases like rejected trades, partial fills, or stale prices



Access Level

Trading platform account access (paper trading or approved live testing)

Permissions to execute test trades and validate workflows



Interested? Reply with your resume and availability.



We are a legitimate startup — not a scam.

title: Freelance Photo Editor / Retoucher (Lightroom Classic) – Commercial & Product Photography
description:
We are a Sydney-based digital and creative agency producing professional photography and visual content for businesses across Australia and internationally.



We are currently looking to recruit experienced freelance photo editors / retouchers to assist with ongoing project work.



The work involves editing and finishing photography for a range of industries including:



• construction & trade businesses

• real estate and property marketing

• automotive photography

• studio product photography

• commercial brand campaigns

• events and activations



This is not basic social media editing. The work involves professional client deliverables where colour accuracy, consistency and attention to detail are important.



Editors will be provided with:



• a detailed project brief

• RAW image files

• reference styles where required

• instructions for specific deliverables



Our goal is to build a small group of reliable editors who we can engage on an ongoing freelance basis as projects arise.



Projects may vary in complexity, but we are looking for editors who can consistently produce clean, professional results aligned with the brief.



_______________



Applicants must use:



• Adobe Lightroom Classic



Experience with Adobe Photoshop for advanced retouching, object removal, compositing or product work is a strong advantage.



_______________



Types of Editing Work



Projects may include:



• real estate HDR editing

• construction and architectural photography

• product photography colour correction and retouching

• studio photography editing

• commercial photography finishing

• event photography editing



Editors should be confident working with RAW files, colour correction, exposure balancing and HDR workflows where required.



_______________



We are prioritising portfolio work and real examples over resumes.



Please apply only if you can demonstrate experience editing photography such as:



• real estate photography

• construction / architectural photography

• product photography

• studio photography

• commercial brand photography



Consistency, colour accuracy and attention to detail are extremely important.

_______________



Technical Requirements



Applicants must have:



• strong written and spoken English

• a reliable computer capable of handling large RAW photo files

• stable high-speed internet connection

• reliable electricity / power availability

• ability to download and upload large batches of images

• good communication and responsiveness



We regularly transfer large batches of RAW photos, so stable internet is essential.

_______________



To apply, please include:

 1. Links to 3–5 examples of your best photo editing work

 2. Examples of HDR or real estate editing if available

 3. Your computer specifications (CPU / RAM)

 4. Your internet speed

 5. Your typical weekly availability



Applications without portfolio examples will not be considered.



To confirm you have read this job description, please include the word CINEMA at the beginning of your application.

_______________

title: Office Manager / Construction Administrator
description:
OFFICE MANAGER / CONSTRUCTION ADMINISTRATOR

Moritz Design and Construct



ABOUT THE COMPANY

Moritz Design and Construct based in the Riverland, South Australia delivers high-quality residential and commercial projects with a focus on detail, organisation, and getting projects delivered properly.

We’re a small, growing business. No corporate layers. No confusion about responsibility.

You’ll work directly with the director and be involved in real projects, not just admin tasks.

This is a long-term role for someone who wants to take ownership and grow with the business.



THE ROLE

This role is about keeping projects organised, controlled, and moving.

You’ll take ownership of the admin and financial side of each job — making sure documentation is accurate, costs are tracked, and nothing slips.

You’ll be responsible for:

• Managing contracts, variations, and project documentation

• Tracking costs, invoices, and budgets

• Keeping schedules updated and following up outstanding items

• Coordinating subcontractors, suppliers, and consultants

• Communicating clearly with clients and the project team

• Assisting with tender submissions and project setup

You’re not just supporting projects — you’re helping keep them on track.



WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

You’ve worked in construction before and understand how jobs actually run.

You’re detail-focused and consistent. You don’t rush and miss things — you get it right.

You’re confident communicating in clear, professional English — both written and on calls.

You’re comfortable with:

• MYOB (or similar)

• Excel

• General construction documentation

You understand:

• Variations

• Invoicing

• Cost tracking

• Project flow

Most importantly:

• You take ownership

• You don’t need constant direction

• You keep things moving



WHAT’S IN IT FOR YOU

• Flexible working hours

• Direct involvement in real projects

• A small team where your work actually matters

• Exposure to high-end residential projects

• Long-term role with growth as the business expands



THIS ROLE IS NOT FOR YOU IF:

• You need constant instruction

• You miss details or rush your work

• You’re not comfortable speaking with clients or trades

• You’re looking for a corporate environment



THIS ROLE IS FOR YOU IF:

• You notice problems before others do

• You keep systems clean and organised

• You communicate clearly and professionally

• You want to be relied on



HOW TO APPLY

Send through:

• A short 2-3 minute video explaining your experience in construction admin and why this role suits you

• Your CV



Subject: Office Manager 

Only applicants with relevant construction experience will be considered.

A zoom interview will be offered to select candidates

title: Customer Support Specialist for Skincare Brand
description:
We are a fast-growing Scandinavian skincare brand focused on simple, effective routines for mature skin.

We are now looking for a reliable, detail-oriented Customer Support Specialist to take full ownership of our daily customer communication.



???? Role Details

Part-time: ~2 hours per day (Monday–Friday)

Long-term position with opportunity to full-time later 



???? Responsibilities

You will be responsible for handling all customer communication across our store:

- Answer customer
s and inquiries about our skincare products

- Assist with order tracking, shipping questions, and delivery issues

- Handle returns, refunds, and subscription inquiries

- Resolve customer concerns and complaints in a calm and professional way

- Respond to customer reviews (thank customers and reinforce brand tone)

- Identify recurring issues or questions and report them



If time allows:

Help source potential influencers/UGC creators (or other simple tasks)



???? What We’re Looking For

We are NOT looking for someone who needs constant supervision.



You are:

? A self-starter who takes ownership of your work

? Highly detail-oriented (you notice small things others miss)

? Reliable and consistent — you show up every day



You also have strong:

? Empathy – you understand customer emotions and respond thoughtfully

? Communication skills – clear, natural, and professional English

? Problem-solving ability – you can resolve issues without escalation

? Patience – you stay calm even with difficult customers



???? Requirements

Experience with Shopify (orders, refunds, tracking)

Previous experience in customer support (ecommerce preferred)

Strong written English

Stable internet connection



???? Compensation

$5/hour  ~2 hours per day (fixed schedule) $200/Month 





???? How to Apply (IMPORTANT)

To apply, please include:

A short introduction about yourself

Your experience with customer support and Shopify



Answer this question:

How would you respond to a customer who says:

“I’ve been using your product for 2 weeks and see no results. I want a refund.” (How would you explain the '30-day cell turnover' cycle to a customer who is frustrated after 2 weeks?)



Include the word “BLUEBERRY” at the top of your application so we know you read everything

title: Customer Service Representative / Skool Community Support
description:
Job description:



If you love helping people feel calm, supported, and genuinely cared for — and you want your work to actually matter — this role might be for you.



In this role, you’re not just answering
s. You’re helping people feel oriented, supported, and confident as they enter Harmony — a growing music and frequency-based platform where people listen daily to support focus, calm, emotional regulation, and inner alignment.



For many members, you’re the first human connection they have with Harmony. Your presence and clarity help set the tone for their entire experience.



Harmony is built on presence, clarity, and integrity. Our support is meant to feel sincere, grounded, and thoughtful. The person in this role represents Harmony in 
nts where trust, clarity, and reassurance matter most.



What you’ll do:



 support: Respond to customer
s with clarity, warmth, and care

Help troubleshoot basic access or technical questions

Make sure people feel supported and not left guessing



Community support (Skool): 

Answer questions inside our Skool community / moderating

Help onboard new members smoothly

Point people to the right resources when needed

Notice recurring questions or issues and communicate them to the team

Opportunity to grow



If it’s a strong fit, this role can expand over time into:



Supporting Skool onboarding

Social media support (posting, comments, DMs)

Additional hours or responsibilities as Harmony grows



Who this role is for:



You communicate calmly and clearly

You’re comfortable with basic tools 
, Google Drive, Dropbox, Skool)

You learn new systems quickly

You’re reliable, organized, and detail-oriented

You feel aligned with Harmony’s mission and values



Role details:



Part-time to start (approximately 12-16 hours per week)

Available Weekends (Saturday and Sunday)

Fully remote

Flexible schedule within agreed-upon windows

Opportunity to grow over time



How to apply, please include:



A brief introduction

Your availability and desired rate

A short note about why this role feels aligned

One example of learning a new system quickly

Your resume

Where you are located



Benefits:

Work from home remotely



Build with a fast growing company



Opportunity for increased hours and pay as the role grows



You’ll have the opportunity to genuinely help people and often see the impact of your support in real time, through thoughtful responses and meaningful interactions within the community.

Work Location: Remote

title: Automation & Data Specialist (CRM, No-Code, Dashboards)
description:
Automation & Data Specialist (CRM, No-Code, Dashboards)



Remote | Part-time / Project-based | Long-term



We are looking for a systems thinker who can build the backbone of our business.



Not just automations.

But a connected system across marketing, sales, operations and finance, including a clear performance dashboard.



What you’ll build



A system where:



Leads from Meta, Google and LinkedIn flow into our CRM

Follow-ups are automated 
, WhatsApp)

Deals move through a structured pipeline

Projects start automatically after closing

Invoices trigger finance workflows

All data flows into one central dashboard

Your responsibilities

Set up and optimize Monday.com as our central hub

Build automations using Zapier or Make

Connect lead sources (Meta, Google, LinkedIn) to CRM

Build full funnel workflows:

Lead ? Deal

Deal ? Project

Project ? Delivery

Invoice ? Finance

Set up tracking structure (UTMs, source tracking, tagging)

Build dashboards that combine marketing + sales data

Dashboard & data tracking (key part of the role)



We want to move beyond vanity metrics like CTR.



You will build a dashboard that shows:



Which campaigns generate leads

Which leads turn into deals

Which deals turn into revenue

Revenue per campaign / channel

Cost per lead vs cost per deal vs cost per customer

Performance by:

Platform (Meta, Google, LinkedIn)

Campaign

Ad



???? In short: we want to see exactly what brings in money



What this means technically

Set up UTM tracking across all campaigns

Ensure every lead is tagged with its source

Sync CRM data with reporting tools

Build dashboards (inside Monday or external tools like Google Looker Studio)

Connect ad platforms with CRM outcomes

Finance & automation (included)

Trigger invoices after deal close

Notify finance automatically

Track payment status

Sync financial data back into the dashboard

Requirements

Experience with CRM systems (Monday preferred)

Strong experience with Zapier or Make

Experience with dashboards / reporting tools

Understanding of marketing funnels and attribution

Strong analytical thinking

Good English communication

Nice to have

Experience with Google Looker Studio or similar

Experience with Meta Ads / Google Ads data

Experience with APIs / webhooks

Experience with WhatsApp automation

Working setup

Remote (Philippines-based preferred via OnlineJobs.ph)

Part-time or project-based

Flexible hours

Long-term collaboration possible

How to apply



Please send:



A short introduction

Examples of systems or dashboards you built

Which tools you prefer (Zapier or Make, and why)

Your hourly rate



Start your application with: DATA



Important



We are not looking for someone who only builds automations.



We want someone who understands:



???? How data flows through a business

???? How marketing turns into revenue

???? How to build systems that scale



“Explain briefly how you would track which ad campaign leads to a closed deal.”

title: Meta Ads Specialist (E-commerce) + Shopify Landing Page Expert
description:
About Us:

CozifyHome is a dynamic and growing e-commerce brand. We are launching an exciting Trade-In Rugs campaign and are looking for a performance-driven digital marketer to help us scale and take our online presence to the next level.



Job Overview:

We are seeking a Meta Ads Specialist / Performance Marketing Virtual Assistant who will be responsible for planning, executing, and optimizing paid advertising campaigns focused on our Trade-In Rugs landing page. You will play a key role in driving qualified traffic, increasing conversions, and maximizing ROAS through data-driven ad strategies.



This role requires strong expertise in Meta Ads Manager, audience targeting, creative testing, and conversion tracking—along with a solid understanding of Shopify, especially in creating and optimizing landing pages.



Key Responsibilities:



Meta Ads Management 
 & Instagram):

- Plan, create, and manage Meta Ads campaigns focused on driving traffic and conversions to the Trade-In Rugs landing page

- Build and optimize campaigns including prospecting, retargeting, and lookalike audiences

- Conduct A/B testing for ad creatives, copy, and audience segments

- Monitor daily ad performance and adjust budgets, bids, and targeting to improve ROAS

- Create and develop high-converting ad creatives (images, videos, UGC-style content) for campaigns



Funnel & Conversion Optimization:

- Analyze landing page performance and suggest improvements to increase conversion rates

- Create, edit, and optimize Shopify landing pages (layout, sections, copy, and user flow) to improve conversions

- Ensure proper tracking setup (Meta Pixel, Events, Conversions API if applicable)

- Identify drop-off points in the customer journey and recommend optimization strategies



Analytics & Reporting:

- Track and report on key performance metrics (CTR, CPC, CPA, ROAS, conversion rate)

- Provide weekly performance insights and actionable recommendations

- Use data to scale winning campaigns and cut underperforming ads



Qualifications & Required Experience:

- Minimum 1–2 years of experience in Meta Ads /
 Ads management

- Proven experience running conversion-focused campaigns (e-commerce preferred)

- Strong understanding of Meta Ads Manager, Pixel tracking, and audience targeting

- Ability to analyze data and make performance-driven decisions

- Must have experience with Shopify, specifically in creating and optimizing landing pages

- Experience working with funnels and customer journeys

- Strong communication skills and attention to detail



What We Offer:

- Opportunity to work on a high-growth e-commerce campaign

- Flexible and remote work setup

- Performance-driven growth opportunities within the company



How to Apply:

If you are a data-driven performance marketer who knows how to turn clicks into conversions—and can build effective Shopify landing pages—we’d love to hear from you.



Please submit:

- Your resume

- Portfolio or case studies of past ad campaigns

- Brief explanation of your experience with Meta Ads, Shopify, and landing page creation

?

?

This is an exciting, high-growth opportunity for a dedicated editor who wants to rise, earn more, and build a powerful career inside a fast-growing company.

If you’re ready to work full-time, produce high-performing videos daily, and grow with a long-term team — we want to hear from you.

And most importantly, you’ll work directly with us — no fluff, no layers, no wasted time.



Why This Is Different:

nt.

Ready to join a winning team and finally have your work seen, rewarded, and appreciated?



Reach out now. Let's build something big — together.

?

?

?

?

• Data-driven, analytical, and performance-obsessed

• Hungry to earn more by delivering real, measurable results



?



???? What Makes This Opportunity Unique

• Work with a fast-scaling international brand

• Direct impact on revenue and growth

• Performance-based pay with immediate upside

• Long-term stability with strong infrastructure already in place

• Freedom to implement what works — no micromanagement

• Opportunity to become our go-to paid media & growth expert

We already have strong foundations — now we want someone who can push performance to the next level.



?



? Deliverables

• Improve ROI and conversion efficiency

• Conduct keyword research and analysis

• Collaborate on ad copy, creatives, and landing page strategy



?

This is not a maintenance role.

This is a growth role for someone who wants to scale revenue, be rewarded fairly, and build a long-term position inside a serious company.



NDA WILL NEED TO BE SIGNED BEFORE HIRE



If you’re a true PPC & SEO expert who wants to be paid based on results — not promises — we want to hear from you.



Only experienced, performance-driven applicants should apply.

title: DEDICATED Full-Time premier pro Video Editor & Marketing Specialist
description:
DEDICATED Full-Time premier pro Video Editor & Marketing Specialist



(High Salary Growth · with Huge Performance Bonuses · Long-Term Role)



No Beginners — Only Serious, Skilled Editors Apply



We are hiring a full-time, highly skilled premier pro video editor & marketing-focused creative who understands viral video creation at a deep level and can produce multiple high-quality, high-retention videos every single day.



This role is for someone who wants to grow with a team, build a long-term career, and be rewarded heavily for performance. The better your videos perform, the more you earn.



This is a highly rewarded role with massive long-term income potential for the right individual. Including huge extra benefits for top loyal perfomers





What We’re Looking For



We want a serious, dedicated editor who:

• Understands how viral videos work — especially on TikTok, Reels, and modern short-form platforms



• Can produce multiple 4-8 high-quality videos daily using Adobe Premiere Pro



• Has strong marketing instincts and understands how to create “watchable,” high-retention content



• Is motivated to grow their career, earn more, and become a key part of our long-term team

• Is committed, reliable, and consistent with daily output



• Wants a full-time role with massive salary growth opportunities



This position is for professionals only — no beginners, no part-timers, no hobby editors.







Salary & Growth



Starting Range: $400–$500 - can lead up to $1,500/month

(Depending on skills, experience, creativity, and daily output)



• Salary increases are based on your permanent

• Bonuses rewarded for high-performing viral videos

• The more the content grows, the more your salary grows

• Long-term potential for very high monthly pay for top performers

• Travel opportunities and niche-specific projects available as you grow within the company



- To be part of a multinational team that cares about you, and be part of a team not just staff



We only hire people who want a full-time, long-term home — not freelancers jumping from project to project.







Your Responsibilities:



4-8 videos Daily Video Editing & Production (duration anwher from 10secs to 2 mins+ )



• Produce multiple short-form videos per day for TikTok, Reels, and Shorts



• Edit in Adobe Premiere Pro (non-negotiable)



• Add creative transitions, pacing, captions, sound design, and storytelling



• Create viral-style videos without relying on generic templates



• Improve based on performance data & feedback



Marketing & Creative Strategy

• Work with the team to develop ideas, concepts, and hooks



• Help craft videos that sell, entertain, educate, or retain attention



• Understand how to market a physical product through content



• Be resourceful and solution-oriented with limited footage



• Create scenes using alternative footage, B-roll, and creative storytelling if clips are missing



Collaboration

• Work daily with our team (creators, assistants, strategists)

• Help turn raw ideas into powerful, viral-ready videos

• Bring your own suggestions, creativity, and marketing mind to every project







 What Makes This Role Unique:

• You will help grow a fast-scaling brand with huge global potential

• Long-term, stable, career-building opportunity

• You will have the freedom to grow, lead, and experiment creatively

• Exposure to different niches, products, and video styles

• Uploads of product footage will be provided, but creativity is required — when footage is missing, we adapt and find solutions

• Massive future salary growth for the right editor

• Opportunities to travel with the team as operations expand in couple of months from now



This is a job for someone who wants to build a real career, not just “edit videos.”







Ideal Candidate Profile

• Strong Adobe Premiere Pro skills

• Deep understanding of TikTok/Reels/Shorts virality

• Fast, efficient, and consistent daily editor

• Creative thinker with marketing instincts

• Problem solver who can work with limited footage

• Team player with great communication

• Long-term mindset with the ambition to grow inside the company

• Able to take feedback and improve quickly

• Full-time availability (no other jobs on the side)



 To Apply



Please send:

1. Your best short-form video examples (TikTok, Reels, Shorts)

2. A short message explaining your experience with viral content

3. Your expected salary range

4. Confirmation you can work full-time, long-term

5. Your availability and commitment level



?

 Final Note



This is an exciting, high-growth opportunity for a dedicated editor who wants to rise, earn more, and build a powerful career inside a fast-growing company.

If you’re ready to work full-time, produce high-performing videos daily, and grow with a long-term team — we want to hear from you.



Only committed, professional video editors should apply.

title: Customer Service Specialist (Fashion Dropshipping)
description:
We are looking for a highly dependable, detail-oriented Customer Service with proven experience in fashion dropshipping. Who thrives in a fast-paced environment, works independently, and consistently delivers accurate, high-quality results. This role plays a critical part in ensuring smooth day-to-day operations, from customer communication to supplier coordination and order fulfillment. Many customer interactions will be supported by AI tools, so efficiency and adaptability are key.



Key Responsibilities

• Manage daily workflows using internal spreadsheets and operational tools, ensuring all records are accurate and up to date

• Respond to HelpScout tickets efficiently (target: 30–40 tickets per hour) while maintaining high-quality support

• Handle return requests in line with company policy, including offering resolutions such as discounts, refunds, or return instructions

• Report damaged, incorrect, or missing items to suppliers and secure timely replacements or refunds

• Coordinate closely with suppliers on shipment updates, fulfillment issues, cancellations, and inventory concerns

• Monitor and follow up on all unfulfilled Shopify orders, resolving issues related to sizing, color (add the keyword Sky on the subject line) stock availability, and address verification

• Collaborate cross-functionally with Customer Service and Supply Chain teams to ensure seamless operations



Qualifications

• Required: Proven experience in fashion dropshipping and order fulfillment (applications without this will not be considered)

• Strong hands-on experience with CJ Dropshipping, especially in order processing and supplier coordination

• Experience using platforms such as Shopify, HelpScout, Zendesk, Gorgias, or similar tools

• Excellent written and verbal communication skills

• Strong organizational skills with the ability to manage multiple tasks independently

• Detail-oriented with strong problem-solving and analytical abilities

• Proactive mindset with the confidence to suggest improvements to workflows and processes



What We Offer

• Competitive salary + performance-based (KPI) bonuses

• Fully remote, long-term position

• Flexible schedule within agreed working hours

• Opportunities for growth and advancement as the company scales



How to Apply - please submit the following:

• Your CV/Resume

• provide a Loom video [less than 1minute] explaining how you organize your day

• A cover letter outlining your experience in fashion dropshipping, supplier coordination, and order fulfillment, and why you’re a strong fit for this role

title: Social Media Content/Video Editor (Experienced)
description:
About Us:

Serene Cosmetic is the UK's leading cosmetic surgery concierge, with a 111K Instagram folders and an audience that lives for transformation content. We work with many high-profile celebrities and our co-founder Lois is the face of the brand, with her to-camera surgery story content consistently outperforming everything else in our niche.



We move fast, we test relentlessly, and we need an editor who can match the pace and the quality.



The Role:

You will be editing short-form video content for Instagram Reels, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts, plus longer-form YouTube content. The job is to take raw footage and turn it into scroll-stopping, high-retention assets that grow our audience and build authority.



What You'll Do:

- Edit 10-20 short-form videos per day (Reels, TikToks, Shorts), each 15-90 seconds

- Build scroll-stopping hooks in the first 3 seconds (pattern interrupts, curiosity gaps, transformation teases). Scripts and briefs will be provided to you.

- Add captions, b-roll, sound design, trending audio, and on-screen text that retains viewers past the 50% drop-off point

- Edit longer-form YouTube content (8-15 minutes) using Mr Beast-style retention pacing

- Repurpose long-form footage into multiple short-form angles

- Maintain a tight, recognisable Serene visual style across every asset

- Scripts and briefs will be provided. Bonus if you can also generate your own content ideas and research trends for the business, but not essential





Must-Haves:

- 3+ years editing short-form video for brands, influencers, or agencies (portfolio essential, evidence of work required)

- Ideally fluent in Premiere Pro or DaVinci Resolve. CapCut, Edits and similar app-based editors alone may be considered if quality of portfolio work is high enough. Bonus for After Effects experience

- Native-level English comprehension for captioning and hook rewriting

- Strong understanding of current Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube algorithm preferences

- Fast turnaround. Same-day edits when needed

- Reliable internet, backup power, and your own editing rig





Bonus Points

* Experience editing in the beauty, cosmetic surgery, wellness, or aesthetics niche

* Familiarity with thumbnail design for YouTube and Instagram

* Experience using Google Docs/Business Suite





What You Get:

- A long-term position with a fast-scaling brand

- Direct creative collaboration with the founders, no middle-management bottleneck

- Performance bonuses for videos that hit virality thresholds

- Quarterly performance reviews with a clear career progression path if desired

title: Landing page, Funnel
description:
PROJECT OBJECTIVE



The objective of this project is to build the core revenue and infrastructure system for the business from the ground up.



The system must:

• Clearly guide visitors to the correct starting point

• Sell a digital bundle as the primary entry offer

• Present a structured mentorship funnel

• Allow visitors to request a consultation call (not instant booking)

• Collect payments and customer information

• Clearly direct buyers into the Skool ecosystem

• Maintain authority, scarcity, and time control



This is a clarity and execution project, not experimentation or overengineering.



WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE



A visitor should be able to:

• Land on the website

• Immediately understand where to start

• Purchase the digital bundle

• Clearly understand how to join the Skool community

• Understand that consultation calls are available by request

• Apply for mentorship if they want higher-level access

• Be captured in the
 system for future follow-up



Everything should feel intentional, premium, and structured.



SCOPE OF WORK



PHASE 1: WEBSITE CREATION



Build a brand-new website (no store, no catalog)



Public paths only:

• Start Here – Digital Bundle

• Mentorship

• Brotherhood

• Request a Consultation Call



Homepage requirements:

• Direct most visitors to the bundle

• No clutter, browsing, or competing CTAs



Required pages:

• Privacy Policy

• Terms of Service

• Contact information



PHASE 2: FINAL OFFER STRUCTURE



DIGITAL BUNDLE

• Positioned as the foundation

• Messaging emphasizes “Start Here”



BROTHERHOOD

• Paid community

• Ongoing guidance and accountability

• Clearly explained on the site

• Visible link explaining how to join



MENTORSHIP

• Higher-ticket

• Selective and not for everyone

• Sold through a dedicated mentorship funnel

• Positioned as speed and access



CONSULTATION CALL

• Request-based only

• No funnel

• No instant booking

• Limited availability windows

• Clear explanation of approval-based scheduling



PHASE 3: PAYMENTS

, and payment details

 platform

s from:

  - Consultation requests



• Apply tags:

  - Bundle Buyer

  - Brotherhood Interest

  - Mentorship Lead

  - Consultation Request



• Automated
s:

  - Purchase confirmation

  - Next-step instructions

  - Consultation request confirmation



PHASE 5: FUNNELS



DIGITAL BUNDLE FUNNEL

• Checkout page

• Thank-you page

• One primary CTA

MENTORSHIP FUNNEL

PHASE 6: CONSULTATION REQUEST PAGE

  - Name

  -

PHASE 7: SKOOL AND BROTHERHOOD DIRECTION

• Why bundle buyers must join

 as purchase

DELIVERABLES

• Mentorship funnel

 system connected

 capture and automation

title: HIRING: DM + TEXT REVENUE OPERATOR
description:
HIRING: DM + TEXT REVENUE OPERATOR  

READ CAREFULLY. MOST APPLICATIONS WILL BE IGNORED.



This is NOT a general VA role.  

This is NOT a multi-job position.



We are hiring 1 disciplined operator to handle warm outreach, buyer follow-ups, upsells, and SKOOL engagement for a US-based personal brand.



If you are working other jobs, move slowly, or dislike structure, do not apply.



——————————————————

REQUIRED HEADLINE TEST (DO THIS FIRST)

——————————————————



Your application headline MUST start with the word:



IPHONE



It must be the FIRST word in the headline.



Example:

IPHONE – DM Revenue Operator Application



If IPHONE is not the first word, your application will NOT be opened.



——————————————————

ROLE SUMMARY

——————————————————



Your job is simple:



Turn existing attention into daily revenue.



Speed matters more than anything.  

The faster buyers and engaged followers hear from us, the more they buy.



All work is scripted, tracked, and measured.



——————————————————

WHAT YOU WILL DO DAILY

——————————————————



1. Warm Outreach Messaging  

Daily DM outreach to:

• Instagram followers  

• People who like or comment  

• Story voters and viewers  

• People who previously DMed  

• Anyone showing interest  



Exact scripts will be provided.



2. IMMEDIATE BUYER TEXTING (CRITICAL)  

Whenever someone buys ANY product, you must text them within minutes using iMessage.



You will:

• Welcome them  

• Apply the correct upsell based on what they purchased  

• Offer relevant upgrades immediately  

• Log every buyer and upsell attempt  



Speed here directly affects revenue.



3. Upsells & Revenue Routing  

You will push approved offers only:

• Signed physical book upgrades  

• Game God Bundle  

• Brotherhood  

• One on one calls  

• Mentorship (ONLY if qualified)



You do NOT invent pricing or offers.  

You follow clear upsell rules and decision paths.



4. Instagram DM Management  

You will:

• Reply to all DMs quickly  

• Turn comments into DMs  

• DM story engagers  

• Follow up warm leads  

• Revive old conversations  

• Push leads toward the correct offer  



Tone must match Goldie’s brand exactly.



5. Past Buyer & Lead Follow Ups (HIGH PRIORITY)  

You will consistently message:

• Anyone who asked about mentorship  

• Anyone who asked about pricing  

• Anyone who engaged heavily  

• Anyone who disappeared  

• Anyone who has EVER bought anything



Buyers convert the fastest.  

This is a daily priority.



6. SKOOL Group Posting & Engagement (DAILY)  

Every day you will:

• Post in the free SKOOL group  

• Reuse Goldie’s past content (quotes, lessons, captions)  

• Add simple CTAs  

• Reply to comments  

• Welcome new members  

• Encourage upgrades when appropriate  



You do NOT create original content.  

You reuse Goldie’s words.



7. Daily Reporting (NON NEGOTIABLE)  

Your end-of-day report must include:

• Outreach messages  

• Replies  

• Upsell attempts  

• Upsells closed or strong interest  

• Buyers contacted  

• SKOOL post completed  

• SKOOL engagement completed  

• Screenshots  

• Hot leads  

• Issues or blockers  



No report = no work.



——————————————————

COMMUNICATION & JUDGMENT RULES

——————————————————



This role requires structured judgment, not freestyle selling.



• Scripts must be followed for openers  

• Approved responses must be used for questions  

• Judgment is allowed ONLY to:

  – Choose the correct upgrade path  

  – D
 Bundle vs Brotherhood vs one on one  

  – Escalate qualified leads  



You do NOT:

• Invent messaging  

• Change pricing  

• Use foreign phrases  

• Sound formal  



Tone must be:

simple  

clean  

direct  

masculine  



——————————————————

REQUIRED SCHEDULE + SPEED EXPECTATION

——————————————————



This is a 7 day role.



You will work 3 hours per day during BOTH shifts:



• 11:00 am–12:30 pm EST  

• 6:00 pm–7:30 pm EST  



You MUST be fully active during these hours.



Speed matters most when:

• someone purchases  

• someone comments with emotion  

• someone asks a question  



Faster response = more sales.



——————————————————

PAY

——————————————————



• 5 dollars per hour  

• Performance bonuses  

• Long term role for consistent performers  

• Increased pay after reliability is proven  



——————————————————

TOOLS YOU WILL USE

——————————————————



• Instagram  

• iPhone with iMessage  

• Google Sheets  

• SKOOL  

• Script folder  



——————————————————

IPHONE + IMESSAGE REQUIREMENT (MANDATORY)

——————————————————



You MUST:

• Own an iPhone  

• Have iMessage enabled and functional  



This role REQUIRES iMessage for fast, trusted communication with US buyers.



If you do not have an iPhone with iMessage, do not apply.



——————————————————

READING & LOGIC TEST (REQUIRED)

——————————————————



If you miss ANY step below, your application will be ignored.



STEP 1 – EXACT SENTENCE  

Somewhere in your application (NOT in the headline), include this sentence EXACTLY:



I use an iPhone with iMessage enabled and understand this is required.



STEP 2 – LOGIC CHECK  

Answer at the very end of your application:



If you message 100 people and 20 reply, what percentage replied



Only submit the number.



——————————————————

FINAL NOTES

——————————————————



Do NOT apply if you:

• Want flexibility  

• Want creativity  

• Want fewer check ins  

• Are slow to respond  

• Are working other jobs  



Qualified applicants will be invited to a paid 48 hour test to prove:

• Speed  

• Discipline  

• Judgment  

• Execution

title: Financial Reporting & Dashboard Specialist (Accounting / ERP Data Mapping)
description:
We are looking for a full-time Financial Reporting & Dashboard Specialist to help create financial reports and dashboards for our clients using our software platform.



Our system connects with many of the main ERP and accounting systems used in the Nordics and internationally, including Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central, Fortnox, QuickBooks, Xero, and others.



The main responsibility of this role is to review accounting keys / chart of accounts data from our clients, understand what the accounts represent, organize them into the correct financial categories, and use that structure to create clear and accurate financial reports.



You will help build reports such as:



Income statements / profit and loss reports

- Balance sheets

- Cash flow reports

- Management reports

- Financial dashboards

- Client-specific reporting templates



This role is ideal for someone with a strong accounting background who understands financial statements and enjoys working with financial data, reporting tools, and ERP/accounting system data.



Key Responsibilities

- Review client accounting keys / chart of accounts from different ERP and accounting systems

- Categorize accounts into correct financial reporting groups

- Create income statements, balance sheets, cash flow reports, and dashboards using our software

- Understand the meaning of accounting accounts from systems such as Business Central, Fortnox, QuickBooks, Xero, and - similar platforms

- Identify where accounts should belong in financial reports

- Help ensure financial reports are accurate, logical, and easy to understand

- Work with client data from companies in the Nordic region

- Follow internal reporting structures and templates

- Communicate clearly with the team when account classifications are unclear

- Support ongoing improvements to report templates and dashboards



Required Skills and Experience

- Strong understanding of accounting and financial reporting

- Experience creating or working with income statements, balance sheets, and cash flow reports

- Ability to read and understand chart of accounts / accounting keys

- Experience with ERP or accounting systems such as: Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central, Fortnox, QuickBooks, Xero or similar accounting platforms

- Good understanding of how accounts are grouped into revenue, cost of goods sold, operating expenses, assets, liabilities, and equity

- Strong attention to detail

- Comfortable working with financial data

- Good English communication skills

- Able to work independently and follow structured processes

- Reliable, organized, and willing to learn our software platform



Nice to Have

- Experience with financial dashboards or business intelligence tools

- Experience with management reporting

- Experience working with Nordic or European accounting data

- Bookkeeping or accounting certification

- Experience supporting multiple clients or working in an accounting/reporting service role



What We Offer

- Full-time remote work

- Long-term role with a growing software company

- Training on our software platform

- Opportunity to work with international clients and ERP systems

- Stable, structured work focused on accounting, reporting, and financial data

- A supportive team environment



Ideal Candidate

title: Remote Appointment Setter – Aesthetic/Med Spa Industry
description:
We help med spas consistently book out their calendars with Botox and lip filler appointments.



As an Appointment Setter, you are the first point of contact—and your role goes beyond dialing. You move leads closer to saying yes.



We keep the environment fun, but we compete to win.



Goal: Be elite at what you do. Enjoy the process while getting paid for performance.



This is not a role for people who want to “try sales.”

This is for individuals who want to master it.



Schedule



Rotating schedule (weekdays + weekends)



Shifts:



Morning: 8:00 AM – 3:00 PM EST

Evening: 3:00 PM – 11:00 PM EST



You must be flexible and available for either shift when needed.



Your Role: Two Core Modes



1. Hunting (Speed + Volume)



Call new leads within 60 seconds — no exceptions

Prioritize leads across multiple clients

Use GoHighLevel (GHL), Slack, and internal systems to ensure no lead is missed



2. Closing (Precision + Influence)



Follow the C.L.O.S.E.R. script exactly (while sounding natural)

Identify goals, understand pain points, and position the right offer

Handle objections confidently and reinforce commitment so leads actually show up

What Success Looks Like



You’re performing at a high level when:



Every new lead is contacted in under 60 seconds

The script becomes second nature

You follow up consistently and personalize conversations based on each lead

Compensation

Base: $500 USD/month

Performance Pay: +$1,000 USD/month (based on completing daily standards — 100% of current setters hit this)



Bonuses:



Monthly performance challenges: up to +$500 USD

+$5 USD for every low-ticket booking (uncapped)



Expected Earnings: ~$1,500 USD/month for solid performers



We reward consistency and execution. The more you perform, the more you earn.



Requirements (Non-Negotiable)



Availability for EST shifts + weekends

Strong spoken English with a clear, neutral accent (US-friendly)

Stable internet (minimum 100 Mbps) + backup power

Quiet workspace + quality headset

Laptop + large monitor

Preferred Background

Appointment setting, call center, sales, or high-volume support experience

However, coachability and work ethic matter more than experience



Tools You’ll Use Daily



GoHighLevel (GHL)

Slack

Training & Support



You’ll be equipped with:



A complete playbook and training system

Daily script practice, roleplays, and call reviews (Week 1)

A detailed Appointment Setter Handbook

Ongoing coaching to improve your skills and income

Who Succeeds Here

Shows up daily and executes consistently

Takes feedback seriously and improves fast

Treats this as a long-term career, not a side hustle



How to Apply



Send a voice recording via 
 answering:



Why you’re a strong fit for this role

Any relevant experience (optional)

A personal goal you’re working toward



If your recording stands out, we’ll reach out with next steps.

title: Client Operations Coordinator
description:
DeepSky is committed to building a high-performance team that delivers clarity and reliability to entrepreneurs. We are looking for individuals who take ownership, think critically, and care about outcomes, not just completing tasks.



We are currently hiring a Client Operations Coordinator to support the flow of client communication and internal execution. This role sits at the center of the team, ensuring that client requests are captured, organized, and followed through. If you are someone who enjoys bringing order to chaos and making sure nothing falls through the cracks, this role is for you.



This is not a traditional admin or support position. You will be expected to make decisions, prioritize work, and keep things moving without constant supervision.



Your responsibilities will include, but are not limited to:



+Client Communication & Task Flow

Managing the shared client inbox and ensuring all messages are reviewed and acknowledged in a timely manner. Interpreting client requests, determining priority, and converting them into clear, trackable tasks. Assigning tasks to the appropriate tea
mbers and ensuring accountability.



+Execution & Follow-Through

Tracking progress across multiple requests and following up to ensure deadlines are met. Ensuring no client issue is left without visibility, ownership, or a next step. Escalating when something is at risk of delay.



+Onboarding & Coordination

Supporting new client onboarding by organizing information and tracking timelines. Coordinating across tea
mbers to ensure smooth execution.



+Process Improvement

Identifying bottlenecks and improving how work flows across the team. Helping build more efficient internal systems over time.



+About You

You are organized, proactive, and comfortable making decisions even when information is incomplete. You are able to manage multiple tasks at once and keep things moving without being told. You communicate clearly and take ownership of outcomes. You have a basic understanding of financial concepts such as cash flow and P&L, but you are not expected to perform analysis. You are detail-oriented and care about doing things right.



+Additional Requirement

Please include your resume and tell me if a client sends the following message:

“I’m not sure what’s going on with our numbers. Revenue is up, but cash feels tight.”

What would you do from the 
nt you receive this message?



During the initial 3-month trial period, candidates will undergo educational and training sessions. Afterward, successful candidates will be offered full-time positions with comprehensive company benefits.



This position requires working U.S. business hours (PT) to support our U.S.-based clients and internal team. Candidates must be available for daily communication, client coordination, and meeting deadlines during these hours. Flexibility outside of these hours is welcome, but core availability during US time zones is mandatory.



+Success Metrics during the trial period:

All client messages are acknowledged within 24 hours. 

All client requests are converted into trackable tasks. 

No client issue is left without visibility, ownership, or a clear next step.

title: Branding & Designing Specialist (Senior)
description:
About us

EquiMarketing is a boutique marketing agency working with high ticket clients across the world. We deliver premium quality work and we expect the same standard from everyone on our team. Visit 
 for more information about who we are and what we do.



We are looking for a versatile Graphic Designer and Video Editor who can handle a wide range of creative work for our clients. You will work directly alongside our team and report to the CEO, the Operational Manager, and the Marketing Manager.

What you will do



You will be a creative all rounder responsible for visual content across many formats. This means:



Developing logos from concept to final delivery, including multiple variations and file formats

Building complete brand identity systems including logo, color palette, typography, brand guidelines documents, and core brand assets



Designing high converting visuals for Meta Ads (static images, carousels, story formats)

Creating social media content for Instagram,
, LinkedIn, TikTok (posts, carousels, reels covers, story templates)

Editing video content including interviews, testimonials, ad creatives, reels, and short form social videos

Adding subtitles, captions, motion graphics, and on screen text to video content

Designing print materials such as flyers, brochures, and books

Creating
 design assets and templates

Designing thumbnails for YouTube and video content

Photo editing and retouching for product imagery and content shoots

Working within brand guidelines for each client to maintain consistency

Producing high volume creative variations for ad testing (often 10+ variants per campaign)

Using AI design tools as part of your workflow to speed up production



Required skills and software

Adobe Suite: Photoshop, Illustrator, After Effects, Premiere Pro at confident professional level

Canva at expert level for fast turnaround work

CapCut for short form video and social content

Figma for design collaboration and handoff

AI tools: Midjourney, Adobe Firefly, Runway, or similar tools used in your daily creative workflow

Logo design and brand identity development experience with a portfolio to prove it

Ability to deliver complete brand packages including logo files in all formats, brand guidelines, and supporting brand assets

Strong understanding of social media specs and best practices for each platform

Knowledge of print production basics (CMYK, bleed, resolution, file preparation)

Motion graphics and basic animation skills in After Effects

Solid eye for typography, color, composition, and brand consistency



What we are looking for in your personality

Genuinely creative, you bring ideas to the table rather than waiting for instructions

Fast and efficient, you can produce high volume without sacrificing quality

Detail oriented, you check your own work before delivery

Comfortable with revisions and feedback, no ego involved

You understand that marketing visuals are about conversion, not just aesthetics

Self managing and responsible with deadlines

Comfortable working across many client brands without losing each one's identity

Long term mindset, you want to grow with one agency rather than juggle ten short gigs



Tools you will work with

Slack for team communication

ClickUp for task management

Google Drive or similar for asset management

Weekly team calls via video

All major Adobe and design software (you provide your own licenses)



How we work together

You will work alongside our team and report to the CEO, the Operational Manager, and the Marketing Manager. You will join our weekly calls and have direct access to all relevant tea
mbers through Slack and ClickUp. We give you the autonomy to set your own hours and days, in exchange for clear ownership and proactive communication.



How to apply

To be considered, your application must include:

A link to your portfolio showing a wide range of your work (Meta Ads, social media, video editing, logo design, brand identity work, print design, motion graphics if applicable)

A short written motivation explaining your experience, the type of work you enjoy most, and why this role interests you

Examples of logos and complete brand identity projects you have delivered

Examples of Meta Ads or social media ads you have designed (if available, include performance results)

At least one short video sample you have edited

title: LinkedIn Research
description:
This is actually a job posting, not an
 — Upwork uses a job post format. Here's one you can paste straight in:



---



**Title:** LinkedIn Research VA — Match Contact List to Employer & Job Title



**Description:**



I need a detail-oriented VA to help me identify where a list of contacts work by manually researching them on LinkedIn.



**The task:**

- You'll receive a CSV with approximately 850 contacts (first name, last name,
)

- For each person, search LinkedIn and find their current employer, job title, and LinkedIn profile URL

- Log results in a provided spreadsheet

- Flag any uncertain matches separately — accuracy matters more than speed



**What a good match looks like:**

- Experience with LinkedIn research or lead generation

- High attention to detail

- Comfortable working with spreadsheets

- Able to handle ambiguous matches (common names, incomplete profiles) sensibly



**Deliverable:**

A completed spreadsheet with employer, job title, and LinkedIn URL filled in for every confident match, and uncertain matches clearly flagged.



**Volume:** ~850 contacts

**Estimated hours:** 15–20 hours

**Format:** Fixed price or hourly — open to discussion



Please include in your application: your typical accuracy rate on similar tasks and an example of a research project you've completed.

title: Finance and Procurement Officer
description:
HIRING: Finance and Procurement Officer

Location: Chino Roces, Makati City

Work Arrangement: Full On-Site

 

 

Position Overview:

We are seeking a highly organized and detail-oriented Finance and Procurement Associate to support the company’s financial and procurement operations. This role will be responsible for assisting in purchasing activities, monitoring financial transactions related to procurement, maintaining accurate documentation, and coordinating with vendors and internal departments to ensure efficient and compliant purchasing processes.

The ideal candidate should possess strong analytical skills, attention to detail, and the ability to manage multiple administrative and financial tasks in a fast-paced environment.

 

 

Key Responsibilities:

- Process and monitor purchase requests, purchase orders, and procurement documentation in accordance with company policies and procedures.

- Source and coordinate with vendors and suppliers to obtain quotations, negotiate pricing, and ensure timely delivery of goods and services.

- Evaluate supplier quotations and recommend cost-effective procurement options.

- Maintain accurate records of purchases, invoices, receipts, and supplier agreements.

- Assist the finance team in processing accounts payable, payment requests, and expense tracking.

- Monitor procurement-related expenses and ensure alignment with approved budgets.

- Prepare and organize financial and procurement documentation for reporting and audit purposes.

- Coordinate with internal departments to ensure timely fulfillment of procurement needs.

- Ensure compliance with internal controls, financial regulations, and company procurement policies.

- Provide administrative and operational support to the Finance and Procurement Department as needed.

 

 

Qualifications:

- Bachelor’s degree in finance, Accounting, Business Administration, Supply Chain Management, or a related field.

- At least 1–2 years of experience in finance, purchasing, or procurement is preferred; fresh graduates are encouraged to apply.

- Strong proficiency in Microsoft Office applications, particularly Excel.

- Excellent organizational, analytical, and documentation skills.

- Strong communication and coordination skills when dealing with vendors and internal stakeholders.

- Ability to handle confidential financial information with professionalism and integrity.

 

Send us your resume via PM or

title: Sales Development Representative (SDR)
description:
About the Role



We at JVDB Studios are looking for a Sales Development Representative (SDR) to drive outbound growth and support inbound sales efforts for our dubbing and localization platform. This is a high-activity, execution-focused role where your main goal is to generate qualified opportunities and book meetings.



You will play a key role in building pipeline by reaching out to creators, small studios, SMBs, MCNs, and production companies, while also ensuring inbound leads are handled quickly and professionally. This role requires someone who is proactive, organized, and comfortable working in a fast-paced, performance-driven environment.



What You’ll Do



You will execute high-volume cold outreach through
, LinkedIn, and other approved channels, with a target of reaching 500 to 1,000 qualified outbound touches per week once systems are fully in place. You will respond to inbound leads quickly, ideally within five minutes, and focus on converting interest into booked discovery calls.



You will be responsible for booking and confirming meetings to ensure strong attendance and protect the sales team’s calendar. Part of your role will involve qualifying leads, identifying whether they are SMB or enterprise-level opportunities, and routing larger opportunities accordingly while handling SMB discovery calls yourself once fully trained.



You will maintain accurate CRM records, track key metrics such as replies, positive responses, meetings booked and held, and overall lead status. You will also report weekly on activity, performance, and any bottlenecks, while contributing feedback to improve outreach messaging and sequences.



What We’re Looking For



We are looking for someone with proven experience in sales development, particularly in cold outreach through
 and LinkedIn. You should have excellent English communication skills, both written and verbal, as this role requires constant interaction with prospects.



You should be comfortable using CRM systems and outbound tools such as Apollo, Clay, Smartlead, Instantly, HubSpot, 
, or similar platforms. A solid understanding of lead qualification, sales processes, and outreach sequencing is important, along with the ability to manage follow-ups and stay organized.



Experience in B2B SaaS, the creator economy, media, YouTube, dubbing, localization, or agency sales is a strong advantage.



Candidate Profile



This role is best suited for someone who is highly organized, detail-oriented, and consistent with follow-ups. You should be proactive, responsive, and comfortable handling repetitive outreach while maintaining quality.



We are looking for someone with strong energy who can build relationships and is relentless in pursuing opportunities. You should be coachable, able to improve based on feedback, and comfortable working independently in a remote setup.



A strong sense of ownership, honesty in reporting numbers, and the ability to identify and communicate bottlenecks early are essential. You should be motivated by results, hungry to perform, and driven to succeed in a sales environment.



Engagement Details



This is a full-time freelance contractor role. The working schedule is Monday to Friday, from 12:00 AM to 8:00 AM Amsterdam time. The role requires consistent daily activity, responsiveness, and accountability.



Why Join JVDB Studios



You will be part of a fast-growing team working on a product within the creator and media space. This role offers the opportunity to directly impact revenue, build valuable sales experience, and grow within a performance-driven environment.



How to Apply



Send your updated resume and a short video recording (Loom) to:







Subject line: JVDB SDR



Applications without a video recording will not be processed. We are hiring ASAP.
