title: Hotel Account Manager (Remote)
description:
Rockenue is a tech-powered commercial management company for hotels across Europe. We handle revenue management, distribution, and tech implementation for a growing portfolio of properties.



We're hiring someone to manage a portfolio of hotel accounts end-to-end. You'll be the main point of contact for property partners — producing reports, flagging issues, and keeping everything running smoothly. 

You'll work inside OTAs like 
 and Expedia, channel managers, and hotel tech systems daily.



No hospitality experience needed. We'll train the right person. What we're looking for is harder to teach.



You should be:



Someone who picks up new software fast and genuinely enjoys it — complex dashboards and unfamiliar platforms excite you, not intimidate you. Already using AI tools like ChatGPT or Claude as a regular part of how you work. A take-ownership type with a strong work ethic — when something needs doing, you do it properly and fast without being asked. The kind of person people naturally come to because you're reliable and on top of things. A clear, professional communicator in English (written and verbal) who can keep clients confident and informed.



To apply: Send a short video intro (2–3 min) covering who you are, why Rockenue, and a quick example of how you use AI or automation in your work. Even a simple phone recording is fine — we care about energy, not production quality.



Competitive monthly salary (GBP/USD). Long-term position with real room to grow as the portfolio scales.

title: Account Manager
description:
About Rockenue

Rockenue is a technology-powered commercial management company for hotels. We handle revenue management, distribution, sales, and tech implementation for a growing portfolio of properties across Europe.



We're looking for someone with energy, hunger, and common sense — not necessarily a long CV.

You'll take ownership of a portfolio of hotel accounts, acting as the day-to-day point of contact for property partners. You'll produce reports, manage distribution channels, solve problems, and keep everything running smoothly. We'll teach you the hospitality side. What we can't teach is drive, initiative, and the ability to figure things out.

If you're the kind of person who Googles the answer before asking the question, who takes pride in getting things right, and who genuinely gets a buzz from being on top of everything — keep reading.



What You'll Be Doing



Managing a portfolio of hotel accounts end-to-end, acting as the main point of contact for property owners and managers

Producing and delivering regular performance reports to clients

Working inside OTA extranets (
, Expedia, etc.), channel managers, and property management systems daily

Monitoring rate parity, availability, and distribution health across all channels

Coordinating with the internal team on pricing updates, promotions, and new channel activations

Identifying revenue opportunities and flagging underperformance

Using AI tools, chatbots, and automation to streamline workflows and increase output

Learning and mastering new hospitality tech platforms quickly





Who You Are (This Matters More Than Your CV)



Relentless work ethic. You take ownership. You don't clock-watch. When something needs doing, you do it — properly and fast.

Common sense over credentials. You can walk into an unfamiliar situation, assess it logically, and figure out the right move without being hand-held.

Tech-obsessed, not tech-tolerant. You genuinely enjoy learning new systems. Complex dashboards and unfamiliar software excite you rather than intimidate you.

AI is already part of your workflow. You actively use tools like ChatGPT, Claude, or similar to get more done. This isn't optional — it's central to how we work.

Proactive by nature. You spot problems before they're reported. You suggest improvements nobody asked for. You hate sitting idle.

Clear communicator. Excellent written and verbal English. You can explain something simply, flag an issue professionally, and keep a client confident.

Detail-oriented without losing the big picture. You catch the small errors but still understand why they matter commercially.



Hospitality experience is a plus but absolutely not required. If you've never touched a hotel extranet but you're sharp, motivated, and learn fast — we want to hear from you. We will train the right person.



Application Requirements

Your application must include a short video introduction (2–3 minutes) covering:



Who you are and a bit about your background

Why you'd be a great fit for Rockenue specifically

A brief example of how you use AI or automation tools in your current or recent work



Applications without a video will not be considered. This is the single most important part of your application — show us your energy and personality.



Compensation

Competitive monthly salary (paid in GBP/USD), commensurate with experience. Long-term position with real room to grow as the portfolio scales.

title: Sales Caller (Philippines – Remote) – Rockenue
description:
Great Base Salary + Uncapped Bonuses (Earn $600 per converted hotel lead)

About Rockenue



Rockenue is a hotel management company. We partner with hotels to take over and optimise their technology, marketing, sales, revenue management, and distribution. Our mission is to grow hotel revenue through better systems, stronger commercial strategy, and hands-on execution.

We help hotels increase occupancy, boost direct bookings, and reduce operational complexity.



Job Overview



We are seeking a confident Sales Caller from the Philippines to contact hotels in the UK and introduce them to Rockenue’s management services.

Your goal: identify interested hotels and deliver qualified leads to our team.



This is a fixed 1-month role, focused purely on generating leads.

Extension is only offered to high performers.



What You Will Do



Call UK hotels and introduce Rockenue’s full-service management offering



Deliver a clear 30-second pitch and speak to decision-makers



Qualify hotels that may benefit from our services



Pass qualified leads to our internal team



Keep clear records of calls and outcomes



Work during UK business hours



Qualifications



Excellent spoken English



Experience in sales, cold calling, or telemarketing



Hotel or hospitality industry experience is a strong advantage



Confident communicator able to manage objections



Reliable home office setup and stable internet



Target-driven, consistent, and proactive



Mandatory Video Submission: Please submit a short video answering:



Introduce yourself and briefly describe any relevant sales/calling experience



Give a 30-second mock pitch as if calling a UK hotel about Rockenue



Explain how you handle rejection or a hotel manager trying to end the call



Why you believe you’d be a strong fit for this role



Compensation



Attractive base salary for the 1-month fixed contract



Uncapped bonus: Earn USD $600 for every hotel lead that converts into a paying partner



Example: convert 10 hotels ? you earn $6,000 bonus



Contract extension possible for top performers

title: General Virtual Assistant (Research, Admin & Follow-ups)
description:
We are a small team looking for a reliable Virtual Assistant to help us stay organized and keep things moving.



This is not a very specialized role. Instead, we are looking for someone who can help wherever needed, handle repetitive tasks we don’t have time for, and help us stay on track.



If you are organized, proactive, and comfortable handling different types of tasks, this role could be a good fit.



Examples of tasks may include:



• Following up with people by

• Helping organize information in Google Sheets

• Online research (finding businesses, contacts, information)

• Data entry and repetitive administrative tasks

• Reminding the team about pending tasks or follow-ups

• Helping keep lists, documents, and projects organized

• Other small tasks that help the team save time



Some days the tasks will be very simple. Other days you may help with research or organization. Flexibility is important.



What we are looking for:



• Organized and detail-oriented

• Comfortable doing repetitive tasks

• Able to follow instructions carefully

• Reliable and responsive

• Comfortable reminding the team about pending tasks

• Good written English

• Comfortable working with new or evolving tasks that may not always have perfect instructions

Important



We are looking for someone who is proactive and responsible. If you notice something that needs follow-up or a task that has been forgotten, we appreciate someone who can remind us and help keep things moving.



Application Instructions



To apply, please send a short Loom video (2–3 minutes) to:





In your Loom video, please:



Introduce yourself



Tell us about your previous VA experience



Tell us about the most unusual or crazy task you’ve ever had to do as an assistant.



At the beginning of your video, please say:

“I am ready to help the team stay organized.”



This helps us know you carefully read the instructions.

title: Founding GoHighLevel Operator for Local Service Marketing Agency
description:
I’m launching a GoHighLevel-based smart website and lead recovery agency for U.S. local service businesses, starting with roofing companies.



I’m looking for a sharp, reliable operator who can become the founding GM/operator of the agency if the trial goes well.



This is not a random VA role. I need someone who can help build and run the operating system of the business.



Important: you will not be inventing everything from scratch. I have training materials, templates, snapshots, examples, and a proven system for this business model. Your job is to learn the system, implement it carefully, adapt it to our niche, improve the process, and help operate it.



What you will do:



Build targeted lead lists

Manage lead tracking 

Set up GoHighLevel assets

Customize website/funnel templates

Create custom website mockups within 24 hours (1 business day) as needed for sales calls

Set up workflows and automations

Set up missed-call text-back

Set up database reactivation campaigns

Create fulfillment SOPs

QA/test before launch

Handle client support

Record Loom walkthroughs



For the paid 2-week trial, the work can be done on your own schedule.



For the long-term position, you must be available for U.S. business hours when needed for live client onboarding/support calls. I may pay a higher hourly rate for live onboarding calls.



The goal of the paid trial is to prepare the agency for a serious sales sprint. During the trial, we want to create:



The first working agency system

The first vertical website/demo system

A repeatable 24-hour mockup process

Onboarding and fulfillment checklists

The first batch of roofing leads

Clear Loom documentation



Requirements:



Strong GoHighLevel experience

Excellent English (as close to American accent as possible)

Excellent organization

Fast execution

Ability to follow training and SOPs

Ability to solve problems without constant hand-holding

Comfort recording Loom videos

Availability for occasional U.S.-hour onboarding/support calls



Bonus experience:



Local service businesses

Website/funnel design

Cold outreach systems

Lead generation

CRM automation

Database reactivation

Client onboarding



How to apply:



Start your reply with:



"GHL GM — I read the full post"



Then answer these questions:



1. What GoHighLevel projects have you built before?



2. Please send examples, screenshots, or links of GHL websites, funnels, automations, workflows, or snapshots you have worked on.



3. What is your hourly rate for the 2-week paid trial?



4. What is your weekly availability?



5. Can you do occasional U.S.-hour onboarding/support calls if needed?



6. If a salesperson books a demo call for tomorrow with a roofing company, what information would you need to create a good custom website mockup within 24 hours?



7. Include a 1-minute video of yourself talking about why you'd like to be a part of our team. Refer to this job posting by name.



Applications that do not include “GHL GM — I read the full post” will be ignored.

title: Amazon PPC Assistant
description:
Amazon PPC Assistant | Sponsored Products





We need an Amazon PPC Assistant to join our team part time.



This role is mainly focused on Amazon Sponsored Products PPC. You do not need to be an expert, but you must already understand the basics of Amazon PPC and be willing to learn our system.



You should understand how to create and manage basic campaign structures, including auto campaigns, broad match, phrase match, exact match, and keyword harvesting.



This is a long term role for the right person. We want to train someone, bring them into our team, and build them up over time.



Main Responsibilities

Create and manage Amazon Sponsored Products campaigns.

Set up auto campaigns correctly.

Understand the difference between broad, phrase, and exact match campaigns.

Help harvest keywords from auto, broad, and phrase campaigns into exact campaigns.

Add negative keywords where needed.

Monitor basic PPC performance such as spend, ACOS, CPC, clicks, orders, and sales.

Follow our SOPs and campaign structure.

Update simple PPC tracking sheets.

Report what changed, what improved, and what needs attention.

Potentially help in other Amazon operations tasks over time.

Requirements

Experience with Amazon Seller Central.

Basic experience with Amazon Sponsored Products PPC.

Understand auto, broad, phrase, and exact match campaigns.

Understand search term reports and keyword harvesting.

Good attention to detail.

Able to follow SOPs.

Good written English.

Reliable, honest, and available for long term work.

Willing to learn and improve.

Comfortable working with spreadsheets.

Nice To Have

Experience with Helium 10.

Experience with Scale Insights, Perpetua, Adtomic, or similar PPC tools.

Experience with Amazon flat files.

Experience with product launches.

Experience with keyword ranking or organic rank tracking.

Working Hours



Start with a few hours per week.



This can increase over time if the work is good.



We prefer someone who is happy to start small, learn our system, and grow into a bigger role.





Please include your C.V and let us know why you would be a good fit



We are looking for someone affordable, reliable, and long term.

title: Solar Appointment Setter (Inbound Leads – AU Market)
description:
We are looking for a confident and experienced appointment setter to handle high volumes of inbound solar enquiries from Australian homeowners.



Your role is to contact new leads quickly, qualify them properly, and book structured appointments into our calendar with clear, accurate notes.



This is a performance-based role. You are not here to “just call” — you are here to think, control conversations, and produce high-quality booked appointments.



Responsibilities:

- Call new inbound leads within minutes of enquiry

- Qualify homeowners (ownership, system, intent, usage, timeline)

- Ask the right questions naturally (not robotic)

- Book appointments into our calendar with complete notes

- Maintain high contact and booking rates



Requirements:

-You must be available to call leads within 1–5 minutes of enquiry

- Strong spoken English with a neutral accent

- Proven experience in appointment setting, outbound calling, or sales

- Confident on the phone and able to lead conversations

- Fast typing and ability to summarise calls clearly

- Reliable internet and ability to work Australian hours



Performance Expectations:

- Fast response time (within minutes of new leads)

- Strong contact rate (30–50%)

- High-quality appointments (not just bookings)

- Clear and structured lead summaries



This is not a beginner role. We are looking for someone who can perform immediately and grow with the business.



If you are confident on the phone and want a long-term opportunity with performance bonuses, we want to hear from you.



To apply, send a short voice recording introducing yourself and describing your experience with appointment setting.

title: BNPL Collections Team Lead
description:
If you've built your career in collections, know the fintech or BNPL space, and are ready to take that next step into leading a team of your own , Apply here: 
/appqyBZJyyxs1htVk/pagvvCsolTY5tzwa7/form



About Us

We are a fast-growing fintech team delivering flexible payment solutions, including Buy Now, Pay Later (BNPL) services, that help customers manage their everyday payments with ease. Our team thrives on collaboration, innovation, and a customer-first mindset. If you're looking for a role where your work genuinely matters and your growth is part of the plan, you've found it.



What You’ll Do

As a Customer Collections Team Lead, you'll be the go-to person for our customers, helping them with payments, resolving account issues, and keeping things on track. AI drives a large part of how we work, but your judgment is what makes it effective. You'll be responsible for feeding it the right context, reviewing outputs before they reach customers, and stepping in when something needs a human call. We move fast and hold each other to a high standard, so you'll be expected to bring your best every day, take feedback in stride, and keep moving forward .



IMPORTANT: Please carefully read the responsibilities below to ensure you're a good fit, and follow the instructions on how to apply at the bottom.



Core Responsibilities

* Deliver exceptional multi-channel support (chat,
, and phone) with a focus on first-contact resolution and high customer satisfaction.

* Uphold brand standards by communicating clearly, consistently, and professionally in all interactions.

* Actively manage brand reputation by professionally responding to all customer reviews and public feedback.

* Handle and resolve customer complaints with empathy and efficiency, knowing when and how to appropriately escalate complex issues.

* Oversee customer repayments and collections by assisting with payment management, rescheduling, and account oversight with professionalism and care.

* Protect the business by proactively identifying, investigating, and escalating suspicious activity and potential fraud cases.

* Work extensively with AI-driven tools as a core part of your daily workflow. This is a very AI-forward role, so genuine comfort and curiosity with AI is a must.

* Build a real understanding of our processes, not just rely on AI outputs. Speed matters, but so does knowing the reasoning behind what you're doing.

* As the team grows, take on increasing ownership of the Collections function, leading agents, refining SOPs, improving recovery processes, and working closely with Customer Service Operations to keep both teams aligned and running smoothly.



Working Hours:

* Shift during onboarding 11am - 6pm UK time, Monday to Friday. After onboarding a fixed schedule will be provided depending on business needs.

* Must be willing to work during weekends

* This is a full time role only (40 hours per week)



Compensation:

* Competitive salary: $1,300 – $1,500 USD per month (depending on experience)

* Opportunity to grow into a Manager position (with a raise) as the support team expands.



Benefits:

* 100% Remote - work from anywhere in the Philippines.

* 15 days paid leave

* Semi monthy salary payouts

* Paid time off and Philippine public holidays

* Supportive, startup-style culture where your ideas matter

* Clear growth path and strong learning opportunities in fintech



You’re Perfect for This Role If You

* Have proven experience in collections, customer service, ideally within fintech, payments, or lending (BNPL experience a plus).

* Understand collections, repayments, and fraud detection, and can balance speed with accuracy under pressure.

* Welcome honest, direct feedback and see it as a tool for getting better, not something to take personally.

* Hold yourself to a high standard of integrity. This role gives you immediate access to sensitive financial data, and trust is non-negotiable.

* Are proficient with AI tools and a quick learner when it comes to automation and new tech.

* Thrive in a fast-paced, customer-first startup environment where priorities shift quickly.

* Are an empathetic problem solver with strong attention to detail, professionalism, and integrity.



How to Apply:

* Click the link below to submit your application and let's get started: 
/appqyBZJyyxs1htVk/pagvvCsolTY5tzwa7/form

title: Virtual Sales Person
description:
About Us:

At Onlygrowth, we strive to offer outstanding products and services that exceed our customers' expectations. We are currently seeking a motivated and proficient Virtual Sales Agentt to enhance our team. In this position, you will connect with customers online, promote our product range, and drive sales through effective communication.



Key Responsibilities:

Customer Interaction: Provide top-tier customer service and support through chat and online channels.



Product Promotion: Actively promote our offerings by emphasizing their features and advantages to boost sales.

Lead Generation: Identify and engage potential leads to generate interest in our products.



Order Processing: Assist customers with placing orders and addressing inquiries about products, shipping, and returns.

Feedback Collection: Collect customer insights and feedback to refine our product offerings and improve satisfaction.



Reporting: Maintain detailed records of customer interactions and sales activities for performance evaluation.



Qualifications:

Demonstrated experience in customer service or sales, ideally in a virtual setting.

Excellent written communication skills with a friendly demeanor.

Solid grasp of online sales techniques and customer engagement strategies.

Ability to multitask and navigate a fast-paced work environment.



What We Offer:

Competitive salary, with incentives based on performance.

Flexible hours and the ability to work remotely.

A chance to be a part of a vibrant and supportive team.

Access to training and development resources for skill enhancement.



How to Apply:

If you are interested, please send your resume and a short cover letter detailing your relevant experience and suitability for the role to 
 will reach out to confirm your application within 48h in any case.

title: Remote Website Developer (Potential for Full-Time)
description:
About us:



We, Emposola, are a growing team spread across two continents and continuing to expand. We specialize in web projects and value self-starters who deliver high-quality work in a distributed, collaborative environment.



Position Overview  

We are looking for a self-driven, motivated, and highly detail-oriented Website Developer to join us on a part-time basis. This is a remote role with strong potential to grow into full-time employment based on performance, along with performance-based bonuses. Much of the work will need to align with US local time zones (occasional odd hours may be required due to our distributed team).



Key Responsibilities

- Develop, maintain, and optimize websites and web applications  

- Complete assigned tasks accurately, thoroughly, and on time  

- Collaborate primarily through clear written communication  

- Leverage AI/LLM tools (such as ChatGPT, Claude, and others) to boost efficiency and problem-solving  

- Maintain strict confidentiality and handle all information with honesty and integrity  



Requirements  

- 2+ years of relevant working experience in web development or similar roles  

- Basic coding knowledge (any programming language is fine)  

- Practical knowledge of using LLM-based AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, or similar) — understanding how to apply them effectively in development workflows  

- Basic English skills (strong written communication is essential; perfect spoken English is not required)  

- Self-driven, motivated, and extremely detail-oriented  

- Able to work during US local time zones and handle occasional odd hours when needed  

- Honest, reliable, and fully committed to treating all company information as confidential  



Compensation & Benefits

- Pay is negotiable depending on experience and skills  

- Start part-time with the opportunity to transition to full-time based on performance  

- Performance-based bonuses  

- Remote work with a growing international team  

- A supportive environment that values reliability, communication, and AI-assisted productivity  



How to Apply  

Please send your application to [insert your
 or application link here] and include:  

- Your resume/CV  

- Educational background  

- Portfolio of previous work (links or examples — this is highly preferred)  





Applications without a portfolio or relevant examples may not be reviewed.  



We’re excited to meet detail-oriented professionals who are ready to grow with us and help take our web presence to the next level!

title: Senior Real Estate Appraisal Coordinator
description:
**ONLY APPLY VIA THE LINK PROVIDED BELOW. DM'S SENT ON ONLINE JOBS WILL NOT BE RESPONDED TO**



If you’ve worked inside a US Appraisal Management Company and you know the difference between a 1004 and a Field Review, a TAT and a due date extension, an ENB file and a standard PDF delivery — this role was written for you.

We’re not looking for someone we need to teach the industry. We’re looking for someone who already speaks it fluently and is ready to own it.



Senior Appraisal Coordinator



Company: Pahroo Appraisal and Consultancy, LLC - Chicago USA.

Location: Remote (US hours)

Type: Full-Time

Hours: 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM CST, Monday to Friday

Salary: PHP 55,000 – PHP 95,000



ABOUT PAHROO

PahRoo Appraisal & Consultancy LLC is a Chicago-based real estate appraisal firm operating across residential and commercial markets in Illinois and Texas. We work with AMCs, direct lenders, and private clients, and we are growing — deliberately and with the right people.



We run a ROWE culture: Results Only Work Environment. We don’t count hours. We count outcomes. If you’re a professional who delivers without being micromanaged, you’ll thrive here.



THE ROLE

This is a senior front office position with real ownership. You will be the operational engine of our Appraisal Operations Department — the person who keeps orders moving, clients updated, appraisers scheduled, and nothing falling through the cracks.



You’ll work directly with our Appraisal Operations Manager, hold independent decision-making authority on day-to-day coordination, and play a hands-on role in shaping how our front office runs as we scale.



This is not a task-ticker role. It is a thinking role for someone who takes pride in running a tight operation.



WHAT YOU’LL OWN

– Full order lifecycle management across ANOW — from bid acceptance through report delivery and closure

– Independent bid decisions on standard residential assignments; zero waiting on someone else to move your queue

– Inspection scheduling and appraiser route optimization for our Chicago and Dallas markets

– Outreach calling and pipeline management across our AMC and direct client accounts

– Report delivery via AMC portals in all required formats — PDF, XML, ENB

– Revision management end-to-end — you communicate, you track, you close

– Zoho CRM ownership for outreach tracking and lead pipeline management

– Keeping ANOW audit-ready at all times — data integrity is non-negotiable here



WHAT WE NEED FROM YOU

– Minimum 2 years of experience in a US AMC, appraisal office, or appraisal management environment — this is a hard requirement, not a preference

– Working knowledge of US residential appraisal order types: 1004/URAR, FHA, Field Review, New Construction, Desktop

– Hands-on experience with ANOW or a comparable appraisal CRM (Mercury Network, Appraisal Inbox, etc.)

– Professional written and spoken English — you are client-facing from day one

– The ability to manage 20+ active orders simultaneously without losing your composure or your accuracy

– Availability to work full CST business hours: 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM, Monday to Friday

– CRM experience in Zoho, Salesforce, or equivalent is a strong advantage



WHAT YOU GET

– PHP 55,000–95,000/month commensurate with experience — a senior rate for a senior hire

– Full-time, long-term contractor engagement — this is a career position, not a project

– Direct access to a senior leadership team actively investing in the right systems and the right people

– Deep, specialized expertise in the US appraisal market — one of the most defensible and transferable skill sets in offshore real estate operations

– A ROWE culture — your results define your day, not a timesheet



START DATE

Immediate. We are moving quickly on this hire and interviewing on a rolling basis. If you are the right person, we will not wait.



APPLY NOW:


/Pahroo/preview-job?jid=FKUpnx7g4/NCLEepnH23hxplCmXbkVeC5DbwzT5C4DesIFQl

title: Commercial Real Estate Appraisal Analyst
description:
**IMPORTANT**

To apply for this role, only use this link:





Direct messages via onlinejobs.ph are not accepted.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------



Location: Remote (US hours)    



Type: Full-Time



Hours: 4:00 AM – 1:00 PM CST, Monday to Friday



Salary: PHP 80,000 – PHP 110,000 (PHP 100,000 – PHP 140,000 for MAI candidacy or proven US CRE track record)



 



About Pahroo



Pahroo Appraisal and Consultancy delivers commercial real estate valuations and advisory services across US markets, with a focus on assets underlying debt and equity investments. We work across office, industrial, multifamily, self-storage, and retail. The team is small, the work is rigorous, and the standards are high.



Working Hours — Please Read Before Applying

This role operates on US Central Standard Time: 4:00 AM – 1:00 PM CST, Monday to Friday. If you are based outside the US, please confirm this works for your circumstances before applying. It is a firm requirement.



The Role



You will sit within the valuation team, producing and supporting appraisal reports across a mixed commercial portfolio. The work is analytical, deadline-driven, and detail-critical. Once onboarded, you will be expected to work with a real degree of independence, drawing on sound US market knowledge to produce defensible value conclusions.



This is not an entry-level position. We need someone who understands why a number is what it is, not just how to arrive at it.



What You Will Do



 - Conduct research using industry databases — CoStar, REIS, RCA, PwC Real Estate Investor Survey, and broker market reports — to gather and interrogate comparable market evidence

 - Analyse property-level financial data including income statements, rent rolls, reimbursement schedules, and occupancy statistics to develop well-supported value indicators

 - Prepare collateral monitoring reports for assets underlying debt and equity investments across office, industrial, multifamily, self-storage, retail, and other property types

 - Produce USPAP-compliant appraisal reports ready for lender, investor, or regulatory review

 - Identify data gaps and market anomalies; flag assumptions that materially affect value conclusions

 - Manage competing report deadlines accurately without compromising on quality

 



What We Need



Required



 - Minimum 5 years of commercial real estate appraisal or valuation experience

 - Demonstrated, hands-on experience in the US property market — no learning curve on market fundamentals

 - Proficiency in ANOW, Total, and Excel-based valuation modelling

 - Working knowledge of USPAP requirements and their practical application in report preparation

 - Bachelor’s degree in Real Estate, Finance, Economics, or a closely related field

 - Strong written English — reports require clear, accurate, and defensible reasoning

 



Advantageous



 - MAI designation (Appraisal Institute) or active candidacy

 - RICS membership — relevant for internationally-based candidates with demonstrable US market exposure

 - Familiarity with CoStar, REIS, or RCA analytics platforms

 - Experience across two or more distinct asset classes

 



What We Offer



 - Base salary PHP 80,000 – PHP 110,000 per month

 - PHP 100,000 – PHP 140,000 for candidates with MAI candidacy or a demonstrable US CRE track record across multiple asset classes — we pay up for the right experience

 - Fully remote position

 - Clear onboarding with defined expectations from day one



**IMPORTANT**

To apply for this role, only use this link: 





Direct messages via onlinejobs.ph are not accepted.

title: Creative Strategist for E-commerce Brand (UGC, Ads & Social Growth)
description:
We’re looking for a high level Creative Strategist who understands how to create content that actually drives results.



You’ll be responsible for the entire creative direction of our brand, from ad creatives to social media strategy. This is not just about ideas, it’s about building a system that consistently produces high converting content.



We are a fast growing streetwear jewelry brand, heavily focused on Meta and TikTok advertising, combined with UGC creators.



Your Responsibilities:



- Develop and manage the creative strategy for paid ads (Meta & TikTok)

- Create scripts, hooks, and content concepts for UGC creators

- Guide and direct creators to ensure content aligns with brand and performance goals

- Edit content yourself and work closely with our editor to achieve the desired final result

- Analyze creative performance and iterate based on data

- Build and optimize a content pipeline by testing new angles, formats, and messaging

- Define and execute the social media strategy to grow our presence organically

- Ensure all content aligns with our brand voice, audience, and positioning



What We’re Looking For:



- Proven experience in e-commerce creative strategy

- Strong understanding of what makes ads convert

- Experience working with UGC creators

- Ability to combine branding and performance marketing

- Strong sense of hooks, storytelling, and trends

- Experience with video editing and being hands-on, not just strategy

- Ability to collaborate with editors and give clear direction

- Data driven mindset with understanding of metrics like CTR and CPA

- Ability to take ownership and think proactively

title: CRO Specialist for Shopify Dropshipping Stores (Home Decor Focus) – Only A-Players Wanted
description:
We are a fast-growing international e-commerce company operating multiple general and niche dropshipping stores, with a strong focus on home decor. We’re currently expanding and looking for a Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO) Specialist to join our remote team full-time.



This is a long-term opportunity for someone who lives and breathes Shopify CRO, e-commerce SEO, and Google Shopping optimization.



Who we’re looking for:



- You have at least 1 year of experience optimizing product pages on Shopify for dropshipping stores



- You have experience working with Google Keyword Planner and understand the basics of SEO for product listings



- You understand what makes a high-converting product page (structure, headlines, SEO keywords, layout, mobile optimization)



- You have worked with general dropshipping and/or home decor products



- You have a keen eye for layout, copywriting, and product positioning



- You are detail-oriented, take initiative, and are obsessed with creating results-driven listings



- You’re fluent in English – both written and verbal



HOW TO APPLY (MANDATORY TEST TASK)

To make sure we only hire serious A-players, you will not be considered unless you complete the following task:

We have 3 products that need CRO optimization.



Your task:



1. Optimize all 3 product pages based on our guidelines below.



2. Write the new versions in a clean and structured Word document (one page per product).



3. Send your optimized Word file as part of your application.



Please find below the links to the three product pages that need to be optimized:











Product CRO Guidelines:



Each product listing should follow this structure:



- Strong Google SEO-optimized product title



- Strong emotional hook (why someone needs this product)



- 3–4 line engaging intro paragraph



- High quality image 1



- Bullet points with clear product benefits (NOT just features)



- High quality image 2



- Short closing paragraph with a call to action



- High quality image 3



- Specifications (dimensions, materials, etc.)



- Use SEO keywords where appropriate, as if you're writing for Google Shopping



- Tone: Clear, engaging, and informative, not salesy, but persuasive



Market & Competitor Research Is Required



- For each CRO product it’s necessary to conduct research in the same local market (in this case Denmark).



- Identify top competitors selling the same or similar product



- Analyze their product titles, descriptions, pricing, and images



- Make sure your new listing has a better or more competitive title, description, and gallery



- Propose a competitive pricing suggestion that’s sharper than competitors



- Suggest specific improvements to product images based on your findings (e.g., angles, lifestyle photos, icons, comparison charts).



Your goal is to increase CTR and Conversion Rate through better copy, sharper pricing, and optimized visuals, all backed by real competitor research.



What we offer:



- Full-time role with long-term potential



- Opportunity to work on multiple brands and stores



- A high-performance team culture where A-players thrive



- Room to grow, learn and contribute ideas



- Weekly support, feedback, and possibly bonuses based on performance



Only Apply If:



- You are hungry to grow and become one of the best CRO specialists



- You are not looking to juggle 3 other freelance jobs



- You want real responsibility and can deliver without hand-holding



To Apply:



Send us the following:



1. Your Word file with the 3 optimized product listings



2. A short intro message explaining why you're the best fit



3. Your OnlineJobs.ph profile link



Final Note:

We are only looking for A-players. If you’re not ready to bring your best, please don’t apply.

But if you are, this could be the opportunity you’ve been waiting for.

title: Product Engineer/Tech Lead - Agentic Recruitment OS
description:
Product Engineer/Tech Lead (Fullstack) - Agentic Recruiting OS



Location: Remote (preferably any timezone with ? 4 h overlap to CET) 

Engagement: Full-time, 40 h/week 

Compensation: USD 900 - 2'300 base/month + Performance Bonus (USD 100 – 250 per successful placement made through the system you ship) + path to equity/co-founder stake for the right person 

Start: ASAP

 

Intro

I'm a headhunter. I built a 100 000-line AI-native CRM/ATS that is already running my own agency. Now I'm turning it into the first true Agentic Operating System for recruiting, a SaaS where customers don't subscribe to software, they subscribe to a digital workforce.

The MVP isn't a prototype. It's almost production-ready. I need a technical partner to take the wheel: architecture, multi-tenancy, agent orchestration, customer onboarding, the works. You will be the technical lead from day one, no PMs above you, no Jira theatre, no committees.

If you are a "9-to-5, Slack-status-yellow" developer, please don't apply. If you've shipped a SaaS, live in Cursor/Codex/Claude Code and routinely have 5+ agents running in parallel, keep reading.



What's already built

Not a green-field gig. The foundation is real, battle-tested, and producing revenue:

• React 18 + TypeScript frontend — Vite, Tailwind, shadcn/ui, 5 languages, full PDF pipeline

• Supabase backend — 147 migrations, 36 tables, 172 RLS policies, role-based access control

• pgvector + HNSW cosine indices for semantic candidate ? job matching

• 48 Edge Functions (~18k LoC) — each effectively a ready-to-wire agent tool: CV parsing, predictive market radar, deep-reasoning seniority engine (L1–L6), employer-conflict detection, exposé generation, public job feed, full ATS flow + ~35 more

• Live in production today — full Candidate / Client / Job / Pipeline / Recruiting / Tasks / Applications management, AI Matching Engine, Predictive Market Radar, Career-Page backend, full CV pipeline

Quality bar: TypeScript end-to-end, generated DB types, RLS-enforced security. Not perfect — but a working foundation.

The Mission, in three phases

1. SaaS-ify the Beast — multi-tenant SaaS with org/workspace isolation, Stripe billing, per-tenant secrets, hardened RLS

2. Agent Orchestration — wrap the 48 Edge Functions in an agent runtime (your call: LangGraph, OpenAI Agents SDK, Mastra, Inngest, custom). Long-running, queue-backed agent loops. MCP host so customers plug in their Slack / Calendar / Wiki / ATS (BYOT system) and our agents act on their behalf

3. Scale & Customer Wins — migration pipelines from Bullhorn, Vincere, Pipedrive, Recruitee, Excel. Multi-provider LLM routing (OpenAI + Anthropic + Gemini) with evals, fallbacks, and cost controls. WhatsApp +
 outreach automation

You own the product architecture and the technical roadmap. I bring product vision and customer pain — you bring the tech direction. Once we hire the next engineer, you lead them

Who you are

• Cracked builder. Shipped real products, ideally as a founder or first engineer. You don't need a ticket to know what to build next

• AI-native. Cursor is muscle memory. RAG, function calling, vector search, LLM evals — strong opinions on which model fits which task

• Strategic thinker. Ship fast where it doesn't matter; obsess over fundamentals where it does (security, multi-tenancy, data integrity)

• Proactive communicator. When my idea is wrong, you tell me — with reasoning, not opinions

• Bonus points: prior SaaS, Supabase + Edge Functions in production, built an agentic system before, speak German, or have HR-tech context

Why join

• Full ownership. Technical lead from day one. No micromanagement.

• Strong long-term upside, discussed individually with the right candidate after a few weeks of working together

• You win when I win. Performance bonus tied to every placement my agency closes through your system, every month, before SaaS revenue starts

• Real distribution. I'm the first paying customer. Warm pipeline of befriended agencies ready for closed beta

• Coding-agent-native War Room. Multiple parallel agent instances are how we ship — no need to convince anyone AI-assisted dev is legit

• No-bullshit timeline. Closed beta this summer, public launch in autumn, fundraising thereafter (2027) 

Stack - open to evolution

The current stack got us to production. It is not sacred. We are explicitly open to a different stack and architecture if you can argue why it makes us faster, more scalable, or more cost-efficient.

Today: React + TS + Vite + Tailwind + shadcn/ui · Supabase (Postgres, Auth, Storage, Deno Edge Functions) · pgvector + HNSW · RLS-based access control · single LLM provider with embedding pre-selection + caching · commercial search/scraping APIs + Google Maps · custom Postgres job-state pattern.

You'll build, evolve, or replace: multi-tenancy + Stripe billing · agent orchestration runtime with observability + human-in-the-loop · MCP host · multi-provider LLM routing · WhatsApp +
 outreach · possibly Next.js for the public side · migration pipelines.

Non-negotiables: solid security, clean multi-tenancy, shipping speed. Everything else is up for debate.

title: Full-Time Video Editor for Fast-Growing Supplement Brand
description:
HIRING Full-Time Video Editor for Fast-Growing Supplement Brand



About Us

We’re a fast-growing DTC brand in the health supplement space, scaling with

performance-driven creatives. Every ad we launch is backed by data and crafted to convert.

We’re looking for a video editor who not only edits but also thinks like a marketer - someone

who wants to grow, push limits, and create winning ads at scale.



The Role

We’re hiring a Video Editor who can consistently deliver high-performing Meta video ads

(30–120s). This is a long-term, remote role with $4 start salary which increase if hit rate is on

target. Also introducing performance bonuses in 2nd month.



What You’ll Do

- Edit high-converting ads for Meta & Google (30–120s)

- Apply strong hooks, pacing, captions, and transitions

VEO3)

You Need

What You’ll Get

title: Ecommerce & Social Media Manager
description:
Ecommerce & Social Media Manager



Full-Time | Remote | Philippines | Long-Term | Competitive Pay | Great Company



We are a U.S.-based company looking for a highly organized, creative, and growth-minded Ecommerce & Social Media Manager to support the day-to-day operations, marketing, and sales growth of our children’s book brand.



This role is ideal for someone who understands both online store operations and digital marketing. You will manage Shopify, inventory, paid ads, organic social media,
 marketing, sales outreach, and event coordination. The right candidate is not only creative but also detail-oriented, proactive, and comfortable tracking sales performance.



This is not just a social media posting role. You will help manage the full ecommerce and marketing engine behind a growing book brand.



What You’ll Do



You will work closely with the leadership team to manage online sales channels, create marketing campaigns, support product launches, coordinate outreach, and identify new opportunities to grow book sales.



This role requires strong execution, creativity, and follow-through. You should be comfortable handling multiple moving pieces, from Shopify inventory updates to TikTok ads, Mailchimp campaigns, bookstore outreach, and seasonal launch preparation.



Core Responsibilities

Ecommerce Management

• Manage and update the Shopify account, including product listings, inventory, sales, shipments, reconciliation, and product links

• Monitor ecommerce activity and identify opportunities to improve sales performance

• Track sales progress and prepare simple reports or updates on key metrics

• Coordinate inventory management through Acutrack

• Ensure product pages, checkout links, and sales-related assets are accurate and up to date

• Help prepare ecommerce materials for seasonal campaigns, including Halloween promotions and new book launches

Paid Advertising

• Manage TikTok Ads, including campaign creation, design, setup, testing, optimization, and performance tracking

• Manage Meta Ads for
 and Instagram, including ad creative, setup, targeting, optimization, and reporting

• Monitor ad performance and recommend improvements based on results

• Create simple but effective ad visuals and copy aligned with the brand voice

• Test different ad formats, audiences, and messaging to improve conversions

Organic Social Media

• Develop and post organic social media content across relevant platforms

• Create a consistent content calendar that supports sales, storytelling, events, launches, and seasonal campaigns

• Design engaging graphics, reels, short-form videos, captions, and promotional posts

• Repurpose content from book materials, events, customer feedback, seasonal themes, and campaign priorities

• Maintain a consistent brand tone and visual identity across social channels

 Marketing

• Develop and manage
 marketing campaigns through Mailchimp

• Create newsletters, promotional
s, launch announcements, event reminders, and seasonal campaigns

• Manage
 lists, segments, templates, and campaign scheduling

• Track
 performance and suggest improvements to increase opens, clicks, and sales

Inbox and Customer Support

• Manage the
 inbox and respond to inquiries in a timely, professional manner

• Organize messages related to orders, events, partnerships, schools, bookstores, awards, and general inquiries

• Escalate important messages or opportunities to the leadership team when needed

• Maintain clear records of follow-ups and pending items

Events, Outreach, and Partnerships

• Coordinate event appearances for book readings

• Conduct sales outreach to bookstores and track communication progress

• Conduct outreach to schools for book readings and partnership opportunities

• Help coordinate book award submissions, including deadlines, requirements, and materials

• Identify new sales channels, partnership opportunities, events, schools, libraries, bookstores, and seasonal promotional opportunities

Launch and Seasonal Campaign Support

• Prepare for the Halloween season rollout, including campaign planning, content, ads,
 marketing, inventory coordination, and sales tracking

• Prepare for the new book rollout in Summer 2026

• Support launch timelines, promotional calendars, outreach lists, and campaign materials

• Coordinate the moving pieces required for successful seasonal and product launches

Required Skills

• Experience managing Shopify or another ecommerce platform

• Experience with TikTok Ads and Meta Ads

• Strong understanding of organic social media content creation

• Experience creating graphics, captions, short-form video content, and promotional materials

• Experience with
 marketing platforms such as Mailchimp

• Strong organizational skills and attention to detail

• Ability to manage inventory updates, sales tracking, shipment coordination, and reconciliation

• Strong written English for customer communication, outreach, captions, and
 marketing

• Ability to work independently and manage multiple tasks without constant supervision

• Strong follow-through and comfort working with deadlines

• Ability to track outreach, campaign progress, and sales opportunities clearly

Preferred — Nice to Have

• Experience marketing books, children’s products, educational products, or consumer products

• Experience with Acutrack or similar inventory/fulfillment platforms

• Experience coordinating events, school outreach, bookstore outreach, or author appearances

• Experience preparing product launches or seasonal marketing campaigns

• Basic copywriting experience for ads,
 campaigns, and social media

• Experience using Canva, CapCut, Google Sheets, Google Docs, or project management tools

• Familiarity with book awards, book promotions, schools, libraries, or bookstore partnerships

• Experience working with U.S.-based clients or companies



Who You Are



You are both creative and operational. You can design a social media post, update Shopify, check inventory, organize an outreach list, draft a bookstore
, and monitor ad performance without losing track of the details.



You are proactive, organized, and comfortable taking ownership of tasks. You do not wait to be told every next step. You notice opportunities, flag issues early, and help keep sales and marketing efforts moving forward.



You understand that this role is about more than posting content. It is about helping grow a brand, increase sales, support launches, and build meaningful connections with customers, bookstores, schools, and event partners.



This Role Is a Great Fit If You

• Enjoy managing both creative and operational tasks

• Have experience with ecommerce, paid ads, and social media

• Are comfortable working with a small, growing brand

• Can move quickly while maintaining accuracy

• Like building systems, tracking progress, and improving campaigns

• Are excited about supporting a children’s book brand

• Can balance daily execution with bigger-picture marketing goals

Tools You May Use

• Shopify

• TikTok Ads Manager

• Meta Ads Manager

• Mailchimp

• Acutrack

• Canva

• Google Workspace

• Google Sheets

• Social media scheduling tools

•
 and inbox management tools

How to Apply



Please submit your application with the following:



1. A brief cover letter explaining your experience with ecommerce, social media, and paid ads

2. Examples of social media content, ads,
 campaigns, or ecommerce work you have managed

3. A short description of your experience with Shopify, TikTok Ads, Meta Ads, and Mailchimp

4. Your expected monthly salary

5. Your availability and preferred working hours



We are looking for someone who can grow with the brand long-term and take real ownership of ecommerce, marketing, and sales support.

title: TikTok Shop Manager
description:
We’re hiring a TikTok Shop Manager to take full ownership of our TikTok Shop operations across key markets (US & UK).



This is a hands-on, execution-heavy role. You’ll manage day-to-day shop performance while identifying opportunities to grow revenue through creators, listings, and platform features. 



You’ll be working on one core DTC brand, owning the video side of its performance creative. You’ll collaborate closely with the creative and performance team to test angles, iterate quickly, and turn ideas into scalable winning creatives. If you naturally think in hooks, pacing, retention, and payoff, you’ll fit right in.





About OOAK Brands



OOAK Brands is a group of fast-growing DTC brands built by operators who care about execution. The focus is simple: test fast, scale what works, and build brands that actually stand out.



You’ll be embedded in one brand while operating within a wider ecosystem that moves quickly and values ownership.



What You’ll Do



Shop Operations & Listings

Manage product listings with optimized titles, descriptions, and visuals tailored for TikTok conversion

Upload images, videos, and variants (shades, bundles, etc.)

Maintain pricing, inventory sync, and promotions

Set up campaigns (flash sales, vouchers, platform events)

Monitor SKU performance and flag underperformers for improvement



Customer Experience & Reviews

Respond to customer reviews in a natural, brand-aligned tone

Handle TikTok Shop inbox messages with fast turnaround

Turn negative feedback into recovery opportunities

Track sentiment and share insights with internal teams

Maintain strong shop ratings and seller metrics



Creator & Affiliate Management

Review and vet creators based on engagement, niche, and content quality

Coordinate product seeding and track deliveries

Build and manage a database of high-performing affiliates

Proactively reach out to creators aligned with the brand

Manage commissions, partnerships, and scaling opportunities

Track affiliate-driven sales and double down on top performers



Reporting & Optimization

Pull weekly reports (GMV, conversion rate, top SKUs, affiliate sales)

Identify trends and suggest new tests (bundles, pricing, creatives)

Stay updated on TikTok Shop features, trends, and competitors

Coordinate with paid media teams when needed



What We’re Looking For

Experience managing TikTok Shop for a DTC or e-commerce brand

Strong understanding of TikTok content, creators, and conversion

Excellent written English with a natural, conversational tone

Highly organized and able to manage multiple workflows at once

Comfortable with spreadsheets and performance tracking

Self-starter who can execute without constant direction

Availability overlapping US or EU time zones



Bonus Points

Beauty or cosmetics experience

Existing network of TikTok creators or affiliates

Familiarity with Shopify or Amazon

Experience scaling TikTok Shop revenue



What You Get

Ownership of a high-growth revenue channel

Direct access to leadership and fast decision-making

Competitive salary + performance-based bonuses

Fully remote setup

Work with a lean, high-performing team

title: Senior Construction Estimator (Buildxact)
description:
Senior Construction Estimator (Buildxact)

High-End Residential Projects (Project-Based / Remote)

 

ABOUT THE COMPANY

We are a Brisbane-based design and construct builder specialising in high-end residential homes. Our projects are detailed, design-driven and require a high level of accuracy, coordination and professionalism.

We operate with structured systems, clear processes and a strong focus on quality. We are seeking an experienced estimator who can integrate into our workflow and deliver precise, reliable outcomes.

 

ROLE OVERVIEW

We are looking for a highly experienced Construction Estimator with advanced Buildxact capability to support our team on a per-project basis.

You must be confident working independently, interpreting drawings, and producing accurate, buildable costings and construction schedules aligned with Australian standards.

You will be responsible for taking projects from concept or working drawings through to a fully built-out estimate, construction program and procurement setup within Buildxact.

This is a project-based engagement with ongoing work available for the right candidate.

 

KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

Estimating

• Prepare detailed and accurate cost estimates using Buildxact and based on Brisbane/Australian Material, labour and supply rates

• Interpret architectural drawings, engineering and specifications

• Build full cost breakdowns including labour, materials, preliminaries, and allowances (PC/PS)

• Apply appropriate markups and ensure alignment with company pricing structure

• Identify missing scope, risks, and cost gaps early

cost planning and market pricing

• Develop and maintain accurate cost allowances based on Brisbane market rates

• Validate supplier and subcontractor pricing against current market conditions

• Ensure all estimates reflect realistic labour, material, and trade costs

• Adjust pricing based on specification level and project complexity

• Provide commercial input and recommendations, not just follow instructions 

Buildxact management

• Set up and structure projects correctly within Buildxact

• Create well-organised cost categories and coding

• Ensure estimates are clean, logical and easy to review buildxact recipes and systems

• Build and maintain structured Buildxact recipes for all major trade scopes

• Break down recipes into labour, materials and subcontract components

• Apply correct quantities, productivity rates and wastage factors

• Update recipes based on real supplier and subcontractor pricing

• Ensure consistency and accuracy across all estimates using standardised systems construction Scheduling

• Develop detailed construction schedules within Buildxact

• Sequence trades correctly based on Australian residential construction practices

• Allow for realistic durations, lead times, and dependencies 

Procurement and purchasing

• Manage procurement process from estimate to construction readiness

• Prepare and issue RFQs to suppliers and subcontractors

• Clearly define scope when requesting pricing to avoid gaps

• Analyse and compare quotes, providing recommendations

• Create and issue purchase orders within Buildxact

• Align procurement with budget and construction program coordination

• Communicate clearly with our internal team regarding assumptions, gaps, and risks

• Flag discrepancies between drawings, specifications, and pricing

• Work efficiently to meet agreed timeframes

 

REQUIRED EXPERIENCE AND SKILLS

• Proven experience as a construction estimator (minimum 3–5+ years)

• Advanced experience using Buildxact (essential)

• Strong understanding of construction costs in Brisbane or similar Australian markets

• Strong experience using Buildxact (this is essential)

• Experience estimating residential construction projects (high-end preferred)

• Ability to read and interpret architectural and engineering drawings

• Strong understanding of construction sequencing and trade scopes

• Experience creating construction schedules

• Experience with procurement, RFQs and purchase orders

• High attention to detail and accuracy

• Strong English communication skills (written and verbal)

• Ability to work independently without constant supervision

 

PREFERRED EXPERIENCE

• Experience with Australian construction standards and terminology

• Experience working with builders or design and construct companies

• Understanding of PC and PS allowances

• Familiarity with take-offs and quantity estimation

 

ENGAGEMENT STRUCTURE

• Project-based work (not full-time employment)

• Paid per project or agreed milestone basis

• Ongoing pipeline of work for the right candidate

• Flexible working hours, but must meet agreed deadlines

 

WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE

• Accurate estimates with minimal revisions

• Clear, well-structured Buildxact files

• Realistic and buildable construction schedules

• Proactive identification of risks and missing scope

• Reliable delivery within agreed timeframes

 

APPLICATION REQUIREMENTS (important)

To be considered, you must include the following:

1. A summary of your Buildxact experience 

2. Examples of projects you have estimated (residential preferred) 

3. Screenshots or sample outputs from Buildxact (if available) 

4. Your typical turnaround time for a full estimate 

5. Your proposed rate (per project or hourly) 

Applications without this information will not be considered.

description:

s will be sent to enterprise clients in Singapore

title: Part-Time Invoicing Specialist (Xero + Google Sheets) - Performance Marketing Agency
description:
**Part-Time Invoicing Specialist (Xero + Google Sheets) - Performance Marketing Agency**



**About us**

Drippl is a performance marketing agency working with DTC and e-commerce brands across Europe. We run Meta ad campaigns and creative production for our clients, and we operate on retainer + performance fee structures. We need a reliable VA to take over our client invoicing.



**The role**

You will handle our monthly client invoicing in Xero and reconcile the numbers in Google Sheets before sending. This is not high volume work but it must be 100% correct every time. Our invoices include performance fee calculations based on tiered structures and attribution data, so you need to actually understand what you are calculating and not just plug in numbers.



Typical month includes:

- Pull the previous month's performance data from our reporting sheets

- Calculate retainer + performance fee per client based on each client's specific structure

- Cross-check the numbers in our Drippl Economy sheet

- Create and send invoices through Xero

- Follow up on unpaid invoices

- Flag anything that looks off before sending



**Requirements (must have)**

- Minimum 3 years hands-on Xero experience (creating invoices, reconciling, chasing payments)

- Strong Google Sheets skills (formulas, lookups, basic financial modeling)

- Real experience with performance fee or commission-based invoicing structures (not just flat retainers)

- Excellent written English

- Detail-obsessed. We do not tolerate errors on invoices

- Available across European working hours when needed



**Nice to have**

- Experience with agencies or service businesses

- Familiarity with Triple Whale or other attribution platforms

- Polish VAT / EU invoicing knowledge



**Pay & hours**

- Hourly rate, paid weekly

- Roughly 4 to 8 hours per month at start, with potential to grow

- Long-term position. We are looking for someone we can trust for years, not someone hopping to the next gig in 3 months



**How to apply**

Start your application with the word "NUMBERS" so I know you read this.



Then answer these:

1. How many years have you used Xero, and what kind of businesses did you invoice for?

2. Walk me through how you would calculate a performance fee where the agency charges 7.5% on the first 100k of incremental revenue, 5% on the next 100k, and 3?ove that, with the client's monthly incremental revenue being 245,000 SEK. Show your math.

3. What is your hourly rate in USD?

4. How long was your longest VA contract and why did it end?



Applications without these answers will be ignored.

title: Patient Care Coordinator
description:
We are looking for a highly motivated and experienced Remote Patient Services Representative based in the Philippines. The ideal candidate will manage inbound and outbound calls, assist patients with scheduling appointments, address inquiries, and perform other related tasks to ensure a seamless patient experience.



Key Responsibilities:

• Answer incoming calls promptly and professionally.

• Schedule, reschedule, and confirm patient appointments using our electronic health record (EHR) system.

• Provide accurate information regarding services, insurance, and payment options.

• Address patient inquiries and concerns with empathy and efficiency.

• Maintain and update patient records with a high degree of accuracy.

• Collaborate with the optometry team to ensure optimal patient care.



Performance Metrics:

To ensure excellence in patient service, the following performance metrics will be used to evaluate success in this role:

• Average Handle Time (AHT): The average duration of a patient interaction, including talk time, hold time, and after-call work. Efficiently managing AHT ensures timely assistance to patients while maintaining service quality. ?

• Quality Score: Assessment of call quality based on adherence to protocols, accuracy of information provided, and overall patient interaction effectiveness. High-quality scores reflect a commitment to excellence in patient care.

• Patient Satisfaction Score: A measure of patient contentment with the service provided, often gathered through post-interaction surveys. High scores indicate successful patient engagement and issue resolution.

• Service Level: The percentage of calls answered within a specified timeframe, reflecting the ability to meet patient demand promptly. Maintaining a high service level ensures patient satisfaction and loyalty. ?

• Appointment Scheduling Rate: The efficiency and accuracy in scheduling patient appointments, ensuring optimal utilization of clinic time and resources.



Qualifications:

• Proven experience in a customer service role, preferably in a medical or optometry setting.

• Exceptional verbal and written English communication skills.

• Familiarity with EHR systems and medical scheduling software is a plus.

• Strong organizational skills and attention to detail.

• Ability to work independently and manage time effectively.

• Stable internet connection and a quiet workspace conducive to professional phone conversations.



Work Schedule:

• Full-time position.

• Must be available to work U.S. business hours, including potential evening shifts to accommodate different time zones.



To Qualify, please complete the Assessment below:



1. Application form: wkf.ms/45nfpCJ

2. Complete this assessment: 
/link/index/JB-BYUGHNDRC?u=

description:

 & Instagram)

title: eCommerce Customer Support Manager (AI-Powered Systems & Growth)
description:
We are a fast-growing supplement brand looking for a Customer Support Manager who operates at the intersection of customer experience and intelligent automation. This is not a role for someone who manages tickets and checks boxes. We need a builder who thinks in systems, moves with urgency, and uses AI as a core operating tool — not just to draft
s, but to engineer workflows, reduce manual work, and create support infrastructure that scales without proportionally scaling headcount.



You will own our support operations end to end. That means processes, people, tools, and the integrations that tie them together. If you've personally built automations using tools like Zapier or Make and felt genuine satisfaction watching them run — this role was written for you.



What You Will Do



* Architect the CS Roadmap: Audit, redesign, and continuously improve our support systems and escalation paths to stay ahead of growth.



* AI & Automation Development: Build and maintain intelligent workflows using AI-connected automations through platforms like Zapier, Make, or similar tools. This includes AI-assisted triage, automated responses, and routing logic — not just rule-based macros.



* System Ownership: Create and maintain our full library of SOPs, macros, and internal documentation. If it exists in CS, you own it.



* Root Cause Problem Solving: Identify patterns in customer friction and work cross-functionally to eliminate issues at the source.



* Tech Stack Management: Own our full tool ecosystem (Commslayer, Shopify, and adjacent integrations), ensuring every automation, rule, and integration is performing and documented.



* Data-Driven Accountability: Own department KPIs (CSAT, Resolution Time, Efficiency) and use real data to drive every structural decision.



* Team Leadership: Hire, develop, and hold the team accountable to a high-output, high-ownership culture. Lead by example on communication and problem-solving standards.



Qualifications



* 5+ years leading customer service teams in a fast-paced eCommerce environment

* Hands-on AI integration experience: You have personally built automations using tools like Zapier, Make, or similar platforms — including connecting AI to real workflows, not just generating text or images

* Demonstrated history of improving a system or workflow in a previous role — bring specifics

* Shopify Expert: Strong hands-on experience with Shopify and its ecosystem of apps.

* Tool Mastery: Advanced proficiency in Gorgias, Zendesk, or similar platforms, specifically in building out automations and complex workflows.

* Strategic Thinker: Ability to translate raw data into actionable process changes.

* Communication: Exceptional written and verbal English with the ability to lead with authority and clarity.

* Commitment: Willingness to commit full-time and exclusively to our brand for the long term.



This Role Is Not for You If:



* You think "using AI" means generating text or images and nothing more

* You rely on someone else to scope or build your automations

* You need step-by-step direction and avoid owning strategic decisions

* You present problems without proposed solutions

* You measure success by stability rather than improvement



Click here to apply :

title: Web Designer (Freelance, Project-Based, Remote)
description:
About the Role



We at JVDB Studios are looking for an experienced Web Designer to build a high-quality website for a dubbing-focused product. This is a project-based role for someone who can take ownership of both the design and development process, delivering a site that clearly communicates what we do, how we do it, and why our solution stands out.



This role goes beyond just making a website look good. We need someone who understands how to position and present tech and AI-driven solutions in a way that is clear, engaging, and conversion-focused.



What You’ll Do



You will be responsible for designing and building a complete website from the ground up, ensuring a clean, modern, and professional look that aligns with our brand. You will translate complex concepts into simple, compelling messaging and visuals that effectively communicate our product and services.



You will structure the website to showcase our tools, portfolio, and capabilities in a way that builds trust and drives interest. This includes creating a strong user experience, clear navigation, and well-organized content that highlights value and differentiates us in the market.



You will handle both front-end and back-end aspects of the build, ensuring the site is fully functional, responsive across devices, and optimized for performance.



What We’re Looking For



We are looking for someone with 5 to 10 years of experience in web design and development, with a strong portfolio that demonstrates high-quality, professional work. You should have experience working on websites that sell products or services, ideally within tech or AI-related industries.



You should be comfortable handling both front-end and back-end development, and have a strong understanding of website builders or development frameworks. Strong communication skills are essential, as you will need to collaborate, provide updates, and explain design and technical decisions clearly.



Attention to detail, a strong design eye, and the ability to deliver within a set timeline are critical for success in this role.



Engagement Details



This is a one-off, project-based freelance role with a target timeline of approximately one month for completion. The engagement is flexible, with the potential for future projects not only within JVDB Studios but also across our broader client network.



Why Join JVDB Studios



You will have the opportunity to work on a high-impact project within a fast-growing, creative environment. This role offers flexibility, autonomy, and the potential to build a long-term working relationship through future opportunities.



How to Apply



Submit your updated resume, strong portfolio, and sample work to:







Subject line: JVDB Web Designer

title: AI Video Editor for DTC E-commerce Brands (US Market) — Full Time
description:
Job Title: Experienced AI Video Editor for DTC E-commerce Brands (US Market) — Full Time



Salary: $5.50/hour starting ($950/month full time)



Job Type: Full Time, 40 hours/week

Hours: Flexible — work whenever suits you, no US time zone overlap required

Schedule: Monday to Saturday (Sunday optional). Focus is on weekly output, not on tracked hours.



About us

We're a US-focused DTC e-commerce company running multiple health & wellness brands. We advertise on Meta Ads and Google Ads. We're scaling our paid ad creative production aggressively and need a second AI video editor to join our team alongside our existing editor. Both report directly to the founder.



The role in one sentence

You receive a script + reference video + brand assets in a Google Drive folder. You produce a finished, ad-ready video plus hook variants. No back-and-forth, no clarifying questions on every brief. You figure it out and ship.



Video formats you'll work on

We produce a wide mix of video lengths — you must be comfortable with all of them:

- Short-form ads (15–60 seconds) for Meta feed and reels

- Mid-form ads (2–3 minutes) for Meta and YouTube

- Long-form VSLs (5–8 minutes) for YouTube ads and advertorial pages

- Hook variants (5–10 different opening seconds for the same body)



Strong preference for candidates with VSL experience. If you've edited Video Sales Letters before — for any DTC brand, supplement company, info product, or direct response advertiser — make sure to highlight it.



What you'll do

- Produce 10–15 video assets per week (mix of formats above)

- Generate AI footage using the tools we provide: Veo, Kling, Runway, Higgsfield, and Nano Banana Pro

- Master these AI tools — we expect you to use them daily and produce custom shots for every video

- Match cuts, pacing and timing to the script and voiceover with strong attention to the first 3 seconds (hook)

- Add captions, sound design, music, and basic motion graphics

- Organize all final files cleanly in our Google Drive structure



You're a fit if

- You've edited paid ads (Meta / Google / YouTube) for DTC brands before — not weddings, not corporate explainers, not YouTube essay channels

- You have edited VSLs (5+ minutes) at least once — bonus if you've done many

- You can take a written script and produce a finished video without asking what every line should look like

- You actively use AI video tools (Veo / Kling / Runway / Higgsfield) and can show recent work where you used them

- You can sustain 10–15 video assets per week consistently, not in occasional bursts

- Your written English is clear



You're not a fit if

- You need detailed shot lists or storyboards to start working

- You've never used an AI video generator

- You've only done short-form content and never edited anything longer than 60 seconds

- You see this as a side gig — we need consistent weekly output



Compensation & Growth

- Starting rate: $5.50/hour ($950/month full time)

- 90-day review: rate increases to $6.00–6.50/hour based on output volume and ad performance

- 6-month potential: $7.00+/hour for top performers who consistently produce winners

- 60-day trial period before any long-term commitment



How to apply

Reply with ALL of the following. Applications missing any item will be auto-rejected:



1. Your portfolio: at least 5 ad video samples covering different lengths (short-form + mid-form + VSL ideally). For each one, tell me:

   - The brand name (or industry if under NDA)

   - The video length

   - Which platform it ran on (Meta / YouTube / Google)

   - Whether you used AI tools, and which ones



2. AI tools sample: one specific video where you used an AI generator (Veo / Kling / Runway / Higgsfield / etc). Tell me which tool, what you generated, and link to the final output.



3. Visual thinking test: a 2–3 sentence answer to this scenario — "You receive a 30-second script for a sleep product. The first line of the script is: 'If you snore at night, your partner is suffering more than you think.' What's the first visual you'd put on screen, and why did you choose that visual specifically?"



4. Capacity: how many videos do you currently produce per week, for which brands, and how many hours per week are you currently committed to other clients?



To confirm you've read the full job post, start your application with the word "BANANA".
