title: Frontend Operations Manager for DTC Ecommerce Brand
description:
Important Note: Please do not apply if you do not have at least 1 year of experience working with DTC or ecommerce brands.





About Us



We are a fast-growing, performance-driven DTC ecommerce brand focused on scaling products through creative testing, fast launches, and strong frontend execution.



We are looking for a freelance, remote Frontend Operations Manager to manage marketing execution, campaign launches, landing page readiness, and creative workflows.



This role is ideal for someone highly organized, detail-oriented, and comfortable working in a fast-paced DTC growth environment.



You will work closely with creative, copy, development, and media buying teams to make sure every campaign and launch goes live on time, accurately, and without avoidable delays.





Company: Try Strawberry

Language: English

Availability: Full-time, 40 hours per week

Time Zone: EST, required overlap from 9:00 AM to 1:00 PM EST

Work Type: Freelance, remote, flexible hours

Niche: DTC / Ecommerce

Payment: $1,000 to $2,000, negotiable





Role Details



Location: Remote with required 9:00 AM to 1:00 PM EST overlap



Reports To: Head of Growth / Head of Ecommerce



Primary Focus: Marketing execution, launch management, and creative workflow



Core KPIs: Launch timeliness, campaign accuracy, landing page readiness, asset delivery speed, and error reduction



Tools: Shopify, Trello or similar project management tools, Klaviyo, SMS platforms, and UTM/tracking systems





Responsibilities



-Own end-to-end timelines for product launches and seasonal campaigns.



-Make sure all launch deliverables go live on schedule.



-Act as the main bridge between designers, copywriters, developers, and media buyers.



-Coordinate the full launch cycle from creative briefing to live deployment.



-Source, organize, and manage marketing assets for pre-landers, landing pages, and campaign needs.



-Test
 flows, SMS campaigns, tracking links, and launch assets before paid media goes live.



-Run final QA checks on landing pages, product pages, links, pricing, bundles, offers, and checkout flow.



-Manage hands-on Shopify updates, including product pages, SKUs, pricing changes, bundles, and marketing app integrations.



-Keep Trello or similar task boards organized and updated for clear launch visibility.



-Identify workflow bottlenecks and improve systems across creative and marketing operations.



-Work with media buyers to make sure frontend readiness supports scaling plans.





Must-Haves



-At least 1 year of DTC or ecommerce experience.



-Strong Shopify experience, including product setup, landing page updates, and app integrations.



-Experience using Trello or similar project management tools in fast-moving teams.



-3+ years of experience in DTC marketing operations, ecommerce operations, or creative agency project management.



-Strong understanding of digital marketing launch workflows, including pre-landers, creatives, tracking,
 flows, and SMS.



-Excellent organization, timeline management, and attention to detail.



-Experience coordinating cross-functional teams across creative, development, and media buying.



-Reliable availability with 9:00 AM to 1:00 PM EST overlap.





Nice To Haves



-Experience working with 7-figure monthly ad spend accounts.



-Basic understanding of CRO principles and landing page psychology.



-Familiarity with Klaviyo and SMS platforms.



-Experience building QA systems for campaign and launch readiness.



-Process-building mindset with experience improving operational workflows.





Benefits



-Remote role with flexible hours and defined EST overlap.



-High-impact ownership of marketing execution for a scaling DTC brand.



-Direct collaboration with growth, paid media, and creative leadership.



-Opportunity to improve and build structured launch systems.



-Competitive, experience-based compensation with a 6-month contract and potential extension.

title: AI Video Editor for Ecommerce Ads (Higgsfield, CapCut, ElevenLabs)
description:
We are a fast-growing e-commerce company producing high-converting video ads for DTC brands in industries such as supplements, footwear, and lifestyle products.



We are looking to hire 2 AI Video Editors to start immediately by the end of this week.



The ideal candidate can create extremely realistic AI-generated video ads that are indistinguishable from real footage, with strong editing and creative skills for direct-response advertising.



This role is ideal for someone who understands performance marketing, high-volume creative production, and AI video generation tools.





What You'll Do

• Produce 20–50 fully AI-generated video ads per week for multiple ecommerce brands

• Create AI talking heads, UGC-style ads, and b-roll scenes using advanced AI tools

• Edit and assemble all video content in CapCut with expert-level precision

• Analyze competitor ads on Meta Ads Library and Google to develop high-converting ad variations

• Concept, build, and iterate multiple creative angles and hooks that drive conversions

• Assist with script refinement or hook optimization when needed (scripts usually provided)





What We're Looking For

• Proven experience creating AI-generated video ads for DTC ecommerce brands

• Strong proficiency with AI tools such as Higgsfield and ElevenLabs

• Expert-level CapCut editing skills with a strong portfolio

• Ability to create extremely realistic AI visuals of people, products, and environments

• Strong understanding of direct-response ad creative and what makes ads convert

• Ability to work independently and produce high-volume creative output





Nice to Have

• Experience with Midjourney, Runway, Kling, or Sora

• Familiarity with Meta Ads Library or competitor research tools

• Experience creating UGC-style ads for paid social





Role Details

• Part-time role (32 hours per week)

• Flexible schedule Monday–Saturday

• Remote position

• We are hiring 2 editors immediately and expect onboarding by the end of this week





How to Apply

To confirm you read this entire post, start your application with the phrase:



AICreator492



Then answer the following questions:



1. Walk us through your workflow for creating a fully AI-generated UGC-style video ad from start to finish. From receiving a script to delivering the final edit in CapCut.

2. Which AI tools do you currently use for video generation, image generation, and voice generation? Rate your proficiency with each tool (beginner / intermediate / advanced).

3. How do you ensure that AI-generated talking heads and visuals look realistic enough to be used in paid ads? What techniques or tools do you use to avoid the typical "AI look"?

4. When analyzing competitor ads for inspiration, what specific elements do you look for that indicate high conversion potential?

5. How long does it take you to create a single 25-second short-form video ad that is fully AI-generated, from start to finished edit?

6. Please share your portfolio of extremely realistic AI-generated ecommerce video ads that demonstrate your ability to create converting content.





If you're passionate about AI video creation, performance marketing, and high-volume creative production, we'd love to hear from you.

Automation flows must be smooth and reliable. Use our smart waiting functions that automatically adapt to proxy speed variations. Scripts that break on slow connections will not be accepted. Our templates provide built-in methods for this, just use them instead of raw Selenium commands.

title: IT Administrator - Microsoft 365
description:
ABOUT THE ROLE:

We are hiring a full-time Microsoft 365 IT Administrator on a contractor basis to support a growing portfolio of small biotech and pharma client environments. You will be the hands-on operator behind a senior US or Canada-based IT and cybersecurity advisor: they design the policy, you implement and run it.



This is a steady operations role across multiple client tenants. You will not be the public face on client calls. You will own the daily configuration, monitoring, and ticket work that keeps client environments compliant and secure.





WHAT WILL YOU DO:

Configure and maintain Microsoft 365 tenants across 5-15 client environments

Implement Microsoft Purview policies: sensitivity labels, DLP, retention, eDiscovery, Insider Risk Management

Deploy and manage Intune policies for BYOD and corporate devices: enrollment, compliance policies, app protection, conditional access

Manage Entra ID (Azure AD): user lifecycle, group policies, conditional access, PIM, access reviews

Administer Defender for Endpoint and Defender for O365: alert triage, policy tuning, phishing remediation

Configure Exchange Online Protection: anti-spam, anti-phish, transport rules, quarantine review

Set up and monitor M365 backup (Veeam M365, AvePoint, or Druva depending on client)

Run user onboarding and offboarding workflows across client tenants

Maintain documentation: runbooks, SOPs, configuration baselines per client

Monitor compliance dashboards and report deviations to the Tier 1 advisor

Respond to tickets routed through a shared queue (target response: same business day in client time zone)

Support audit-evidence collection for clients in regulated environments (21 CFR Part 11, HIPAA)





REQUIRED EXPERIENCE:

4+ years administering Microsoft 365 tenants in a managed services or in-house IT context

Hands-on with Intune device management (Windows, iOS, Android, macOS)

Hands-on with Entra ID / Azure AD user and group administration, conditional access

Working knowledge of Microsoft Purview compliance features

PowerShell scripting for M365 administration

Comfortable working across multiple client tenants without confusing context

Excellent written English (most communication is asynchronous Slack and ticket comments)

Reliable home internet (50 Mbps minimum) and a personal computer capable of running Microsoft 365 admin centers and a virtual desktop





STRONGLY PREFERRED:

Microsoft certifications: MS-500, MS-102, SC-300, SC-400, AZ-104, AZ-500, MD-102

Past role at a Microsoft Partner or managed service provider serving SMB or mid-market clients

Experience with at least one M365 backup tool (Veeam, AvePoint, Druva, Spanning)

Experience with Defender for Endpoint and security alert triage

Familiarity with healthcare or life sciences clients (HIPAA, 21 CFR Part 11)

Familiarity with ticketing systems (Freshdesk, Zendesk, ConnectWise, HaloPSA)





DISQUALIFIERS:

No hands-on Intune or Purview experience

Helpdesk-only background with no admin-center work

Refuses to work the core overlap window with US clients

Requires a long ramp on PowerShell or M365 admin centers





ENGAGEMENT AND PAY:

Independent contractor agreement, not an employee

Full-time commitment: 20 to 40 hours per week, Monday to Friday

Paid monthly in USD via Wise

Pay range: USD 800 to 2,000 per month, depending on experience and certifications

Performance review and pay adjustment after 6 months

10 paid days off per year (paid at standard daily rate, on approved schedule)

Annual training budget for Microsoft certifications (cert exam fees reimbursed on first-attempt pass)

Equipment stipend for headset and second monitor on start

No 13th month, no statutory benefits, no Philippine payroll involvement; the contractor is responsible for their own local tax filing





CAREER PATH:

The first hire builds the M365 operations capability for the IntuitionLabs client portfolio. As the portfolio grows, this role becomes lead M365 admin and helps onboard additional Filipino contractors to handle ticket volume. Strong performers move into a team lead role within 12 months, with corresponding pay band increase.





HOW TO APPLY:

LinkedIn application with profile link

Short paragraph (under 150 words) describing the largest M365 tenant you have administered (user count, what you owned, what you automated)

Screenshot or list of any Microsoft certifications, with credential ID

Two references from past managers or clients (will only be contacted with consent at offer stage)

title: Klaviyo Email Strategist & Operator - DTC Ecommerce (Part Time, Remote)
description:
Pure Pantry is a fast-growing Australian DTC kitchenware brand built around microplastics-free, toxin-free living. We sell premium teak wood utensils, carbon steel pans, and kitchen accessories direct to consumers across Australia and New Zealand. We have grown to 30,000+ customers in under 12 months and are scaling aggressively. This is not a slow corporate role, we move fast and expect the same.



We are looking for a highly capable Klaviyo
 strategist and operator to take part time ownership of our
 marketing channel with a clear path to full time as we expand to additional client accounts. You will be responsible for strategy, segmentation, campaign planning, AI-assisted copywriting, flow optimisation, and performance reporting. This is a hands-on execution role, not a consulting role. You will be doing the work.



WHAT YOU WILL BE DOING:



- Planning and executing a minimum of 12 campaigns per month across our Klaviyo account

Developing campaign angles, subject lines, and copy using AI tools such as Claude and ChatGPT refined to our brand voice

Auditing, optimising, and building
 flows including welcome series, abandoned checkout, browse abandonment, post-purchase, winback, and VIP

- Managing list segmentation to protect deliverability and reduce unsubscribe rates

- Running A/B tests on subject lines, send times, and content angles monthly

- Briefing the graphic designer on campaign creative requirements

- Reporting weekly on key performance metrics against set benchmarks

- Identifying opportunities to improve revenue per recipient across both campaigns and flows



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR:



- Minimum 2 years experience managing Klaviyo for DTC ecommerce brands, not just sending campaigns but building and optimising flows

- Ability to show real Klaviyo accounts you have managed with screenshots of open rates, click rates, and attributed revenue

- Strong written English, your copy needs minimal editing

- Comfortable using AI tools to accelerate copy production

- Understanding of list segmentation, deliverability, suppression lists, and list hygiene

- Experience with Shopify and Klaviyo integration

- Organised, self-directed, and able to manage a campaign calendar without being micromanaged

- Available during Australian Eastern Standard Time business hours for at least 4 hours per day for communication and collaboration



GROWTH OPPORTUNITY:



This role starts as part time but has a clear path to full time within 60 to 90 days as we expand our
 marketing service to additional ecommerce brands. The right person will grow with us and take on more accounts and responsibility as we scale.

WHAT WE OFFER:



Part time remote position, approximately 20 hours per week



Base pay: $400 USD per month



Monthly performance bonuses based on hitting benchmarks across revenue per recipient, click rate, flow conversion rate, and deliverability, full bonus structure provided upon interview with potential to earn an additional $725 AUD per month

Long term position with clear path to full time and increased earning potential as additional client accounts are added

Direct access to the brand owner for strategy direction



TO APPLY, do not send a generic application, it will not be read. You must include all three of the following:



- A brief paragraph on the last Klaviyo account you managed, what the brand was, what your open rates and click rates were, and one specific thing you improved

- One screenshot of a Klaviyo dashboard or campaign performance report you personally managed

Your answer to this question: our current campaign unsubscribe rate is 1.03%, what would be your first three actions to bring it down?



Applications missing any of these three will not be considered.

title: Senior Growth Marketer
description:
We are MSTR, an AI software company based in the Netherlands. We build custom AI-driven applications that help businesses work smarter and more intelligently, from first conversation to production-ready product.



Our team has around 17 people: a customer-facing team of 6 here in the Netherlands, and 11 developers based in the Philippines. We have big, ambitious international growth plans, and we're building the marketing engine to match.



What this role is:

We're looking for a senior growth marketer to build our international marketing operation from the ground up. You will work closely with our CEO, CTO, and CCO, with full ownership over lead generation pipelines, content, and growth experimentation. No client calls. No cold outreach from your side. Your job is to make sure the right companies find us, get interested, and end up on our calendar.



We are currently building our own AI-powered lead generation tool from scratch. One of your first responsibilities is taking full ownership of that tool, configuring it end-to-end, and turning it into the core of our outbound marketing engine.



What you'll actually be doing:

- Building and running AI-powered lead generation pipelines

- Taking ownership of our in-house lead gen tool and making it produce results

- Running growth hacking experiments and scaling what works

- Preparing marketing materials that help us tell our story: decks, one-pagers, case studies, landing pages

- Writing LinkedIn posts and managing our presence across channels

- Making sure MSTR is visible everywhere our target market looks

- Working directly with the CEO, CTO, and CCO on strategy and execution



Who we're looking for:

Someone with serious growth hacking experience and a track record of setting up lead automation pipelines that actually produce results. You've done this before, ideally in B2B or tech, and you know the modern marketing stack inside out: enrichment, sequencing, deliverability, CRM, analytics, and the AI tools that glue it all together.



You are comfortable owning a tool, configuring it, breaking it, fixing it, and making it sing. You will have help in this from a senior fullstack developer. You don't wait for someone to tell you what to test next. You are fluent in English, a strong writer, and genuinely curious about AI and what it can do for B2B marketing.



Experience with tools like Clay, Apollo, Attio, HubSpot, or similar lead gen stacks is a strong plus. Experience working inside an AI-native company, or building with tools like Claude and Claude Code yourself, is an even bigger plus.



This is a senior, high-responsibility role. We trust you to own outcomes and work closely with our leadership team. In return, you get room to build something from zero, a team that moves fast, and direct visibility into the results of your work.



Work setup:

- Remote, working from home

- Full-time, 40 hours per week, with working hours that overlap meaningfully with European business hours

- Reporting to the MSTR leadership team



How to apply:

We assess candidates through a short video introduction rather than long application forms. Send us a 3 to 7 minute video answering:

1. A brief intro about yourself and what drives you

2. Walk us through a lead gen or growth pipeline you've built. What tools and signals did you use, what did it produce, and what made it actually work?

3. What excites you about AI and how you implement AI into marketing

4. How you approach learning a new tool or channel from scratch

5. What you're looking for in your next role and where you see yourself long-term



No polish needed. We're looking for clarity, energy, and authenticity. Please don't read from a script.



Upload your video to Google Drive, Dropbox, or YouTube (unlisted) and share the link. Include your CV or LinkedIn. Please send everything to 
 are happy to answer any questions.



We are looking forward to hearing from you.

title: Claude Code / AI Specialist
description:
Growfactor (
) is a UK-based specialist accounting firm helping entrepreneurs achieve clarity, confidence, and growth through smart tax optimisation, strategic planning, and modern financial systems. We support a wide range of businesses — from creative agencies to e-commerce — with expert guidance designed to turn financial complexity into lasting success.



We are looking for a confident and results-driven High Ticket Sales Closer / Senior Account Executive to join our team. This role is responsible for speaking with qualified leads, understanding their needs, presenting the right solution, and closing sales. The ideal candidate has strong sales experience, excellent communication skills, and a proven ability to close high-value offers.



Responsibilities:



AI Development & Claude Code

Write and optimize prompts for sales, operations, content, and client communication use cases

Design context-aware, multi-turn AI systems that integrate into existing business tools

Continuously test, iterate, and improve AI outputs for accuracy, tone, and performance

title: AI Content Creator (Veo 3 + CapCut) — Dog & Wellness Reels
description:
Looking for a full-time CapCut editor for short-form dog & wellness content (Instagram Reels, TikTok,
).



You will be given hooks (the on-screen text + script) and you'll be responsible for:

1. Generating the AI video clips in Google Veo 3

2. Generating supporting AI images in Nanobanana Pro

3. Editing everything together in CapCut — adding hook overlays, cutting for pacing, exporting 9:16 vertical



The style is text-on-screen driven: bold hook overlays, tight cuts, emotional payoff, 9:16 vertical. You'll follow a consistent template we'll train you on.



Previous CapCut experience is required. AI generation experience (Veo 3, Nanobanana, or similar AI image/video tools) is strongly favored — if you've already prompted AI tools for content, you'll ramp up much faster. We'll still train you extensively on our specific workflow, but candidates with AI generation experience will be prioritized.



You must also be proficient with ChatGPT and/or Claude — you'll use them daily to refine prompts, troubleshoot generations, and iterate on creative direction. This isn't optional; LLMs are core to the workflow.



Big plus if you own a dog — you'll be editing dog content daily, and dog owners naturally understand the emotional angles we work with (health concerns, senior dog worries, training struggles). It shows in the final edits.



Requirements:

- Attention to detail (text overlay timing matters — one frame off kills the hook)

- STRONG English (you'll be writing AI prompts from our hooks)

- Strong internet connection (heavy video downloads/uploads)

- iPhone preferred (for previewing edits on the device our audience uses)

- Previous experience with CapCut / TikTok / Instagram Reels

- Proficient with ChatGPT and/or Claude (REQUIRED — used daily)

- AI generation experience FAVORED (Veo 3, Nanobanana, or similar)

- Good working with a team

- Ability to learn and take constructive feedback

- Availability for 6-8h a day (never more, sometimes less)

- Able to work 5-6 days per week (can take days off whenever needed as long as mostly consistent)

- Can take payments through Wise

- PH or similar time zone



REQUIRED:

Send a portfolio of your previous work to apply.

title: Amazon Content Graphic Designer
description:
We are seeking a skilled, detail-oriented Graphic Designer with experience in supplement product design and Amazon visual design. The ideal candidate has a strong eye for accuracy and can produce high-quality designs that are both visually engaging and compliant with product labelling standards. This role focuses on creating conversion-driven visuals that enhance product listings and overall performance on Amazon.



Key Responsibilities:

- Design supplement bottle labels with precise layouts, ensuring accurate ingredient lists, dosage details, and compliant product information

- Create pouch and packaging designs for a range of supplement and wellness products

- Develop engaging Amazon listing images, including infographics and lifestyle visuals that clearly communicate product benefits

- Design A+ Premium Content to enhance brand storytelling and improve conversion rates

- Produce realistic product mock-ups and carry out advanced photo manipulation to elevate listing quality

- Utilise AI design tools to improve workflow efficiency and expand creative possibilities

- Ensure all visual assets align with brand guidelines while remaining optimised for performance on Amazon

- Maintain exceptional attention to detail to prevent errors in claims, ingredients, and regulatory information

- Collaborate with marketing and product teams to deliver cohesive and effective visual content

- Manage multiple projects simultaneously while meeting deadlines in a fast-paced environment



Requirements:

- Proficiency in Adobe Photoshop and Adobe Illustrator

- Strong experience in packaging design, particularly within supplements or health-related products

- Solid understanding of Amazon image requirements and A+ Content structure

- Excellent attention to detail with a strong focus on accuracy and compliance

- Ability to create clean, professional layouts with clear visual hierarchy

- Experience in mock-ups, photo editing, and advanced image manipulation

- Familiarity with AI design tools is a plus

- Strong time management skills with the ability to handle multiple projects



Preferred Qualifications:

- Previous experience working with supplement or wellness brands

- Understanding of labelling regulations, such as FDA guidelines or similar standards

- Basic knowledge of eCommerce and conversion-focused design principles



Work Requirements & Setup:

- Must clock in using Hubstaff for time tracking and productivity monitoring

- Working hours: UK schedule, 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM

- Must have a high-performance computer capable of handling graphic design workloads, including:

- Multi-core processor (Intel Core i7/i9 or AMD Ryzen 7/9)

- 16GB–32GB RAM for smooth multitasking

- 512GB–1TB SSD for fast performance and file access

- Dedicated GPU (NVIDIA RTX 3060/4060 or higher) for advanced design

- Colour-accurate 4K monitor supporting 100% sRGB or Adobe RGB for precise design output

title: AI Video Ads Creator (Short-Form | High-Performance Ads)
description:
I’m looking for a high-level AI video creator who can turn ideas into attention-grabbing, high-converting video ads (30–90 seconds).



This is NOT just editing.



I need someone who understands:



Hooks (first 1–3 seconds)

Retention (keeping people watching)

Storytelling that makes people feel something

How to turn a script into a scroll-stopping ad



For this first project:



I’ll give you the core idea + direction

You will bring it to life and improve it

You’re expected to add your own creative input



I don’t want someone who just executes.

I want someone who can make the idea better.



You should be comfortable sharing your own ideas and improving direction.

If you prefer to just follow instructions, this won’t be a fit.



If it’s a strong fit, this can turn into ongoing work across multiple ads and brands.



What This Is For



We’re creating ads for a premium Spanish language coaching program.



The goal is simple..

Create ads that make people feel:



Emotionally connected

Entertained (humor is a big plus)

Inspired or slightly uncomfortable (relatable pain)



This is NOT generic content.

This is direct-response advertising.



What I’m Looking For



You MUST:



Have a portfolio of AI-generated video ads (not just edits)

Be experienced with short-form (30–90 sec)

Show storytelling ability, not just visuals

Understand what makes people keep watching



I don’t care what tools you use.

I care about...



Realistic visuals

Good lip sync (if needed)

Clean sound design

Strong pacing



Heres some examples of Style (not all of these are Direct Response)




 


 


 





Important: Read This Before Applying



Most people will NOT be a fit.



To apply, send:



2–5 of your best AI video ads

Briefly: what makes one of them work (hook, retention, etc.)

What’s one thing you would change about the ads I shared, and why?



If you don’t follow this, I won’t respond.



Pay

$75 for 1 ad (paid test)

If it’s a strong fit, this can turn into ongoing work with higher pay per video



I care more about quality and performance than price.

If your work is average, this won’t be a fit.



About Me

16 years in marketing

Focused on performance, not just “nice looking” content

Looking to build long-term relationships with talented creators

title: Graphic Designer File Prepper
description:
We are seeking an experienced individual who has experience preparing files for print production. The person will be knowledgeable in Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign, and Adobe Acrobat. We are seeking someone who knows how to create contour cut lines with the PEN tool in illustrator.   We do alot of engraving for neon signs and need someone who has this skill.   



The person will also know how to set print files for Booklets, books, large format printing, DTG, and DTF printing. The person must know hot to fix customer files to add the proper bleed.



The indiviual will speak good english and work from 6am to 10am (sometimes 11am).  PST.   They will assist us in prepping files and sending them to our machines via avica. 



MUST HAVE STRONG INTERNET CONNECTION

MUST HAVE FAST COMPUTER



PART-TIME HOURS

USA - 6am 10am PST =. 10PM-2AM MANILA TIME



MUST WORK FAST

MUST RESPOND TO OUR TEAM FAST





If you have experience in prepress and the printing industry then this position is perfect for you! The candidate must also have an excellent understanding of both offset and digital printing processes.



The main purpose of the role is to prepress all of our files and prepare them to upload on the server for printing. Graphic design experience is a plus. Most designs we do are simple and we use templates as well.



WE WANT SOMEONE WHO CAN CHAT WITH US IN REAL-TIME

He/She should be able to effectively communicate with customers, co-workers, and management.



Knowledge and access to the Adobe Creative Suite are essential.

, allowing large attachments (at least 10 MB)



Please submit your resume

title: Supply Chain Associate (Amazon)
description:
Zoyava (www.zoyava.co) is positioned to establish itself as a leading digital-native brand, rapidly growing its market presence. Our dedication to delivering top-notch, user-friendly supplements exclusively on Amazon underscores our commitment to unparalleled quality and an exceptional customer experience across all operations. We firmly believe that each employee's contribution is absolutely indispensable to driving our company's advancement and success.



Who we’re looking for:



We’re currently looking for a Supply Chain Associate to join our team. This role is crucial for ensuring the efficient and effective management of our supply chain operations, particularly focusing on our Amazon FBA logistics, procurement processes, and inventory management. The ideal candidate will have a proven track record of creating shipments and labels for Amazon FBA, alongside extensive experience in procurement, including supplier communications, negotiations, and purchase order placement. If you are organized, possess strong communication skills, and are capable of maintaining a well-structured digital filing system, we would love to hear from you.



Key Responsibilities & Duties:



- Handle all elements of Amazon FBA logistics, such as creating shipments, generating labels, and ensuring compliance with Amazon's policies and procedures.

- Conduct procurement activities, including supplier sourcing, negotiation, and purchase order placement. Ensure cost-effective procurement while maintaining quality standards.

- Establish efficient communication channels with suppliers to monitor order progress, address any issues, and oversee supplier partnerships.

- Effectively monitor and control inventory levels to meet demand and avoid unnecessary overstocking. Employ inventory management software to accurately track stock movements and accurately predict future requirements.

- Maintain the company's digital filing system with meticulous organization, ensuring all supplier-related documents and paperwork are accurately filed and easily accessible.



Requirements, Skills & Qualification:



- 3-5 years of FBA shipment experience

- Logistics experience creating and coordinating shipments

- Warehouse/3PL order submission and reconciliation experience

- Must have hands-on experience creating shipments and labels for Amazon FBA. The candidate should be familiar with Amazon Seller Central and have a solid understanding of FBA requirements and procedures.

- Procurement and Supplier Management: Demonstrated experience in procurement, including direct communication with suppliers, negotiation skills, and effective placement of purchase orders. The ability to build and maintain positive relationships with suppliers is essential.

- Strong proficiency in using cloud storage services (e.g., Google Drive) for document management.

- Effective verbal and written communication skills crucial for dealing with suppliers, internal teams, and managing documentation.

- Ability to manage and track inventory levels, ensuring stock availability and minimizing overstock situations. Experience with inventory software and forecasting tools is preferred.

- Attention to detail and the ability to manage multiple tasks simultaneously are key.



What We Offer:



- A dynamic and supportive work environment in a fast-growing company. We are dedicated to partnering with career-driven individuals in search of stable, fulfilling employment opportunities.

- We offer an attractive salary and comprehensive benefits package to ensure that our employees are well-compensated and rewarded for their hard work.

- Unlimited Paid Time Off

- Opportunities for advancing your professional growth and development.



This is a remote position which requires you to have an active and fast internet connection and a personal computer or a laptop. If you meet the above criteria, please apply thru this link:

title: Motion Graphics Designer – YouTube Documentaries
description:
About the Role



We produce documentary-style content for YouTube covering geopolitics, finance, alternative history, and current events. We're looking for a skilled motion graphics designer who can bring stories to life through compelling visuals, animations, and graphic sequences.



What You'll Do



- Create motion graphics, animated maps, data visualizations, text animations, and transition sequences for long-form YouTube documentaries (15-40 min)

- Design and animate lower thirds, title cards, chapter headers, and end screens

- Work with archival footage, stock footage, and still images to build visually engaging sequences

- Collaborate on visual storytelling — translating scripts into dynamic, cinematic visuals

- Maintain and evolve a consistent visual style across multiple channels and series

- Turn around edits quickly based on feedback



Requirements



- Strong portfolio showing motion graphics work (YouTube, documentary, or explainer content preferred)

- Proficiency in After Effects (required). Premiere Pro knowledge is a plus.

- Good eye for cinematic composition, color grading awareness, and typography

- Can work with a script and independently d
 how to visualize information

- Reliable internet, own equipment, available during reasonable overlap hours (GMT+7/+8 timezone preferred but not required)

- Strong English comprehension — you'll be working from English-language scripts



Nice to Have



- Experience with map animations (troop movements, geopolitical borders, trade routes)

- Ability to create 2.5D parallax effects from still images

- Familiarity with YouTube content formats, pacing, and retention strategies

- Basic illustration or icon design skills

- Cinema 4D, Blender, or any 3D software experience



To Apply



Send 2-3 *relevant* motion graphics samples you created.

Tell me your turnaround time for a typical 20-minute documentary and which tools you use daily.

If you read this, start your application with the word orange.

title: Content & Funnel Operator - Real Estate Education Brand
description:
====================================================

THIS IS NOT A TYPICAL VA JOB.

====================================================



I run a real estate education brand. Ebook, strategy calls,

coaching, course launching soon. Active on YouTube, TikTok,

Instagram,
, LinkedIn — plus a
 group.



I'm the only client. You work for me, full-time. Not juggling

5 brands. One brand, deep ownership, real upside.



The previous person didn't keep up. I need someone who treats

this brand like their own — checks analytics without being

asked, notices when a post underperforms, suggests the next

move before I do.



----------------------------------------------------

WHAT YOU'LL OWN

----------------------------------------------------



DAILY CONTENT PUBLISHING

- Post short-form across YouTube Shorts, TikTok, Instagram

  Reels,
, LinkedIn

- We have a clipping tool that auto-cuts long videos. You

  review, caption, and ship.

- GoHighLevel has built-in social posters — you'll use them.

- No more posting gaps. Daily means daily.



CAROUSELS (3/week minimum)

- Built using AI tools — Genspark, Claude, ChatGPT

- Templates and brand guide provided

- Posted across IG, LinkedIn, TikTok



 GROUP + COMMUNITY

- Daily engagement in our FB group

- Respond to DMs and comments across all platforms

- Flag warm leads to me directly



LANDING PAGES (co-write)

- Draft landing page copy for products and lead magnets

- I do the final edit — you give me 80%, I take it home

- Built in GoHighLevel



GOHIGHLEVEL FUNNEL WORK

- Set up and maintain
/SMS sequences I write or approve

- Reactivate cold leads sitting in the CRM (we have ~100 to

  warm up — this is your first project)

- Keep the pipeline organized and tagged



WEEKLY DATA + IDEAS

- Every Monday: what posted last week, what performed, what

  to record next

- Suggest video topics based on what's actually working

- Not a status report. A strategy memo.



----------------------------------------------------

WHAT YOU NEED TO HAVE

----------------------------------------------------



- GoHighLevel experience - non-negotiable. You've built

  funnels, automations, or landing pages in it.

- Comfortable with AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, Genspark) for

  carousels and copy

- Posting experience across IG, TikTok, YouTube,
,

  LinkedIn

- Good written English - captions, CTAs, occasional copy

- Reliable internet, fast turnaround, no excuses

- Self-starter — I'll give you context, not a daily checklist



NICE TO HAVE:

- Real estate, finance, or education brand experience

- Copywriting chops

- Prior info-product / online course brand experience



----------------------------------------------------

COMP + STRUCTURE

----------------------------------------------------



- Full-time role, one client (me)

- $500/month base, paid weekly or biweekly

- TWO-WEEK PAID TRIAL first ($250 total). This is how we

  both find out if it's a fit. If it works, we lock in

  monthly. If it doesn't, we part clean.

- Premium tools provided: GoHighLevel, AI carousel tools,

homegrown clipping tool & scheduler

- Clear brand playbook so you're not guessing

- Founder who moves fast and gives direct feedback

- Room to grow with the brand if you perform



====================================================

HOW TO APPLY — READ EVERY STEP. THEY ARE INTENTIONAL.

====================================================



WARNING: Do NOT use AI to write your application. I work with

AI every day. 



I will recognize a ChatGPT response in 3 seconds

and trash it. I don't care if your English isn't perfect.

I care if it's yours. An honest, slightly messy application

beats a polished AI one every single time.



Send the following:



1. SUBJECT LINE must read exactly:

   IGTRE READY — [Your First Name] — [One word that describes

   your work style]

   Example: "IGTRE READY — Maria — Relentless"

   Anything else goes to trash.



2. Go look at my Instagram or TikTok RIGHT NOW. Find one post.

   Tell me which one and in 2 sentences — your own words —

   what you'd change to make it perform better.

   (AI cannot do this. This tells me you actually looked.)



3. Screenshot a GoHighLevel dashboard, funnel, or automation

   you've built. Blur client names if needed. No screenshot

   = no interview. Too many people lie about GHL experience.



4. Record a Loom — 90 seconds max. No script, no AI voiceover.

   Just you talking. Tell me your name, where you're from,

   one brand you've worked on, and why this role specifically.

   Loom is free at 
. Paste the link.



5. Walk me through how you'd onboard yourself in your first

   2 weeks. 5–10 bullets. What would you set up, audit, ask

   me, ship. Be specific. This is the most important step —

   I want to see how you think.



6. At the very end, write "I read every word." in bold.

   Then tell me what you had for breakfast today. Vibe check.



----------------------------------------------------

If any step is missing, your application doesn't get opened.

Not gatekeeping - just how I find the one person who actually

gives a damn.



The right person will read this and feel energized, not

overwhelmed.

----------------------------------------------------

title: Wanted: GoHighLevel Specialist / CRM Operations Manager
description:
About RedwoodRx



RedwoodRx (Redwood Remedies LLC) is a US-based telehealth company selling compounded prescription products direct-to-consumer. We're in early growth stage and building out our internal operations team. Our core products are in the men's health categories.



The Role



We're looking for a **GoHighLevel specialist** to own our entire GHL setup — from building it out from scratch to managing it day-to-day. This is a long-term, full-time remote position. You'll be the go-to person for our CRM, automations, SMS/Email and internal support workflows.



You'll work closely with the foundesr (based in Europe and Australia) and the rest of a small, distributed team.

Hours: Full-time, flexible schedule with overlap during 8am–2pm CET (3pm–9pm PHT).





Responsibilities

- Build out GHL from scratch — pipelines, automations, workflows,
/SMS sequences, forms, and dashboards tailored to our telehealth patient lifecycle

- Manage day-to-day CRM operations — monitor automations, troubleshoot issues, update workflows as the business evolves

- Integrate GHL with external tools — connect with CheckoutChamp (checkout/payments), MDI (medical platform), and other systems via webhooks, APIs

- Design patient communication flows — onboarding sequences, subscription renewal reminders, re-engagement campaigns, support follow-ups

- Build internal dashboards and reporting — track lead flow, conversion, support ticket volume, and key operational metrics

- Support the support team — create workflows and automations that help the support team work efficiently within GHL

- Document everything — maintain SOPs for all workflows and automations you build





Requirements



- 2+ years of hands-on GoHighLevel experience — not just basic use, but building complex workflows and automations from scratch

- Demonstrated experience building multi-step automations with conditional logic, triggers, and API integrations

- Comfortable with webhooks, custom values, API connections, and third-party integrations

- Strong written English — team communicates in English

- Self-starter who can take a brief and run with it — we're a small team and need someone who doesn't require hand-holding

- Reliable internet and a professional remote work setup



Nice-to-Haves



- Experience in health, wellness, telehealth, or DTC subscription businesses

- Familiarity with CheckoutChamp, Stripe, or similar checkout/payment platforms

- Experience managing or building workflows for support teams

- Experience with Webhooks/Api for connecting tools outside GHL's native integrations



Compensation

- $1,200–$2,000/month depending on experience and location

- Paid monthly, USD

- Long-term position with room to grow into a broader operations role as the company scales



How to Apply



Send us:



1. A short intro — who you are, where you're based, and your GHL experience

2. Screenshots or a Loom walkthrough of a GHL setup you've built (pipelines, automations, dashboards) — this is the most important part

3. Your availability and expected compensation

4. Any experience in health/telehealth or subscription businesses (If applicable)



We'll shortlist candidates for a paid trial project (3–5 days, compensated) before making a final hiring decision.

title: VA + SOCIAL MEDIA MANAGER
description:
This is a hybrid VA and Social Media Coordinator position covering three Instagram accounts. For Alpha Physique you run the full content scheduling, planning and engagement system. For Rob and Rhia's personal accounts you handle engagement, content batching, and weekly planning keeping both pages active and growing without them needing to think about it. You work independently, take initiative, and hold everything together.



1. Content Scheduling & Calendar Management

Schedule all feed content weekly using Pally.

Write and polish captions based on Rob's notes/outlines — on-brand, hook-led, with CTAs

Add hashtags, ALT text, and location tags to every post before scheduling

Create carousel graphics in Canva using pre-set branded templates — consistent visual identity every time

Ensure all content is approved by Rob before scheduling — send for review by Sunday, live Monday

Coordinate client before/after content — obtain signed permissions, add to results database, schedule 2× per week



2. Daily Engagement & Community Management

Reply to every comment on feed posts within 24 hours — full sentence replies, no emoji-only responses

Like every comment on all posts daily

Monitor and respond to Story replies and DMs that need a human touch

Leave 10-15 genuine, sentence-length comments per day on target accounts from the outreach list

Follow 5 new accounts per week in the niche (nutritionists, women's fitness coaches, gym brands)

Identify and flag any comments or DMs that require Rob's personal attention



3. Organic Story-to-Sale System Execution

This is one of the most important responsibilities in the role. The Organic Story-to-Sale System is Alpha Physique's primary Instagram lead generation engine. You are responsible for executing it flawlessly every week.



Rotate the 3 core pain angles weekly — never repeat the same angle two weeks running: (1) skinny fat / effort gap, (2) program hopping / lost plan, (3) glute plateau / nutrition chaos

Post the weekly poll Story from the approved template bank (6 poll templates) at the start of each day — morning posting window

Post the open-ended question Story from the approved template bank (6 question templates) mid-day after value/proof content

DM every poll voter within 60 minutes of their vote using the Poll Voter DM Sequence — no exceptions

DM every open-ended question respondent the same day using the Question DM Sequence — mirror their words, deepen, book

Every voter and every respondent is a hot lead — treat them as such

Track all Story leads in the weekly lead report — source (poll or question), angle used, DM sent, outcome



 4. Weekly Metrics & Reporting

Pull weekly Instagram Insights every Friday: reach, follower count, Reel plays, profile visits, saves, shares

Pull
 subscriber count from the
 platform (Mailchimp / Klaviyo / ConvertKit)

Log all data in the weekly KPI tracker spreadsheet — every Friday without fail

Flag the top-performing post of the week to Rob with a boost recommendation (budget: $5–$20)

Note any trending hooks, audio, or content formats seen during the week and compile into a weekly trends note for Ro



5. Rob & Rhia's Personal Accounts

Rob's personal accountand Rhia's personal account are both growing brand assets. Your role on these two accounts is lighter than the business account but still consistent and important.

title: Marketing Specialist – Multi-Market Campaign Planning
description:
This role is responsible for developing and executing marketing strategies and seasonal or event-based campaign plans across DECKO's core product groups. The specialist will analyse each product category, identify the most relevant promotional opportunities throughout the calendar year — whether tied to seasons, holidays, trade events, or product launches — and build structured marketing plans that align activity across all active markets.



Beyond strategy and planning, the role has a strong creative component. The specialist will produce or directly contribute to visual assets including images and short-form video content suited to digital channels, ensuring campaigns are not only well-planned but visually compelling and on-brand.



Key responsibilities include building seasonal and event-driven marketing calendars per product group, developing campaign briefs and creative concepts, producing or editing images and video assets for use across social media,
, and digital advertising, coordinating with the broader team to ensure timely execution, and reviewing campaign outcomes to inform future planning.



The ideal candidate brings a blend of strategic thinking and hands-on creative ability. They are comfortable moving between a planning spreadsheet and a video editing timeline, understand how to position products for different seasons and audiences, and can work across multiple product categories without losing focus or consistency.



Experience in building products, home improvement, outdoor living, or related categories is a plus but not essential. What matters most is the ability to turn a product and a calendar into a clear, creative, and executable plan.

title: Operations & Compliance Coordinator (NDIS) — Long-term, part-time
description:
About us

We're Artis Support Services, a small Australian disability support business based in Queensland. We provide support to NDIS participants (the National Disability Insurance Scheme is Australia's government-funded disability support system). We're currently unregistered and preparing to go through NDIS registration, which means we need our systems, policies, and documentation properly organised and audit-ready before we apply.

We're a values-led team. We care deeply about the people we support and the people who work for us. We need someone who matches that energy.



What you'll actually be doing

This is a real operations role, not a generic VA role. A typical week might include:



Keeping our compliance documentation organised and up-to-date (policies, procedures, staff records, client files)

Helping us prepare for NDIS registration by tracking what's needed against the NDIS Practice Standards

Managing and improving our systems in Connecteam (staff scheduling, forms, training records)

Setting up automations and AI tools to remove manual work (we're open to ChatGPT, Claude, Zapier, Make, whatever works)

Drafting and scheduling social media content for our business and brand accounts

Responding to comments, DMs, and basic enquiries in our brand voice

General inbox and admin support





Who we're looking for

You don't need to be all of these, but you need to be most of them. Be honest in your application about which ones are real strengths and which ones you'd be learning.

Must have:



Strong written English (Australian or US-style, doesn't matter)

Real experience in the Australian NDIS or aged care sector (back-office, rostering, client coordination, or compliance — anything counts as long as you understand how it works)

Obsessive about organisation, file structure, naming conventions, version control

Comfortable with online systems and learning new ones quickly

Reliable, communicative, and good at flagging problems early



Strong bonus:



Hands-on experience with Connecteam (huge plus)

Experience preparing a provider for NDIS audit or registration

Comfortable using AI tools to speed up your work

Social media content experience (especially Instagram and TikTok)

Canva or similar design skills



Not required:



A nursing or auditing background. We'll bring in a specialist consultant for the actual audit prep — your job is to keep the engine running and the documentation tidy.





How to apply

Please send a message that includes ALL of the following. Applications missing any of these will not be reviewed:



The word "TOOWOOMBA" at the very top of your message (this is how we know you read the ad properly).

A short paragraph about your NDIS or Australian healthcare experience — what you did, for who, and for how long. Be specific.

Your experience with Connecteam if any. If none, tell us what comparable systems you've used.

One example of a process or system you improved in a previous role, and what changed because of it.

Your available hours in AEST (Brisbane time) and your hourly rate.

One AI tool you currently use in your workflow, and how you use it.



We read every application that follows the format above. We'll reply within a week to the ones we want to talk to further.

Looking forward to hearing from you.

— The Artis team

title: Technical CSM
description:
The Mission

Vars Health needs a high-bandwidth, technically-minded junior operator who thrives in the gray area between Customer Success, Product, and is a "jack of all" trades.



As our Technical CSM / Chief of Staff hybrid, you will be the primary bridge between our most complex customers and our internal roadmap. When you aren't ensuring our clients are seeing massive ROI, you’ll be working directly with the leadership team to build the systems, processes, and documentation that allow us to scale. You are a hustler who sees a gap and fills it before being asked.



Your Dual-Threat Responsibilities

1. The Technical CSM (External Growth)

Onboarding & Integration: Lead the technical deployment for high-touch enterprise clients. You can talk API logic with developers and business value with customers in the same hour.



Retention: Own a book of business, ensuring renewal and identifying upsell opportunities by becoming an indispensable partner.



Product Advocacy: Translate customer pain points into actionable technical requirements for the Engineering team.



Troubleshooting: Act as the "Tier 1.5" support for your accounts—you don’t just report bugs; you investigate them.



2. The Chief of Staff (Internal Scale)

Special Projects: Take "messy" problems off the CEO/Founder’s plate—whether that’s researching a new market, vetting a CRM, or building an automated reporting dashboard. Some of this could be strategic, while others could be plain old grunt work.



Operational Excellence: Build the "Success Playbook." You’ll document processes that don’t exist yet to ensure the team stays lean and efficient.



Cross-Functional Glue: Ensure communication flows seamlessly between Sales, Product, and Support. You are the "Jack of all Trades" who can jump into any department to unblock a project.



Who You Are

A "Figure-It-Out" Specialist: You don’t need a manual. You are comfortable with ambiguity and have a "bias for action."



Technically Fluent: You understand SaaS architecture. You might not be a developer, but you’re comfortable with APIs, SQL, webhooks, or CSS/HTML.



Hyper-Organized: You can manage 20 customer accounts while simultaneously tracking three internal strategic initiatives without dropping a ball.



High EQ + High IQ: You can navigate difficult renewal conversations with empathy and solve complex logic puzzles with ease.



The Hustler Mentality: You believe no task is too small (writing a help article) or too big (restructuring our onboarding flow).



Qualifications

Experience: 1.5 to 2+ years in a Technical CSM, Sales Engineering, or Operations role within a high-growth SaaS startup.



The Toolkit: Mastery of tools like Slack, Notion/Linear, HubSpot/Salesforce, and Loom. Bonus points for automation tools like Zapier or Make.



Communication: Exceptional written and verbal skills. You can simplify the complex.



Education: We care more about your "portfolio of impact" than your degree. Prove you’ve built things and solved hard problems.



Why This Role?



This is a "career accelerator" position. You will have a front-row seat to how a SaaS company is built and scaled. 



Are you ready to build

title: Video Post-Production & Editing Specialist
description:
Hello!



We’re looking for a Video Post-Production & Editing Specialist to play a vital role in supporting our brand and marketing agency’s content efforts. This is an exciting opportunity to join a creative, high-standards team where your execution skills and creative judgment directly contribute to building demand and business 
ntum for founders, executives, and growing B2B brands.



In this role, you will work closely with the founder, a seasoned brand and marketing leader who values craft, strategic thinking, and long-term partnerships. You will not just “cut clips,” but help shape how ideas land in the world through well-edited, well-paced, and platform-optimized video content.



To apply, please read the full description and see the TO APPLY section at the end of this posting.



LOCATION: Remote (Preferably based in the Philippines)

JOB TYPE: Part-time contractor, approximately 15 hours per week, with the potential to increase over time as the client base grows. 



ROLE OVERVIEW

This role is focused on video post-production and editing across multiple client accounts. You will primarily take raw footage recorded in the U.S. by both professional film crews, and the executives themselves, and transform it into polished, compelling content for:

Social Media (LinkedIn, Instagram, YouTube)

Podcast episodes and other video assets

PR, thought leadership, and executive visibility content



Our customers are primarily B2B companies, with occasional B2C brands or founder-led businesses. This is fast, platform-native, performance-driven editing — not slow, cinematic work. 



SCOPE OF WORK

-Video Editing & Post-Production

-Edit long-form and short-form video content from raw footage into polished, professional outputs.

-Create platform-native social clips optimized for LinkedIn, Instagram, and YouTube.

-Support podcast production through video edits, cut-downs, and visual consistency.

-Prepare video assets for PR, events, presentations, and thought-leadership use.

-Build strong hooks, pacing, retention, and clear CTAs appropriate to each platform.

-Create multiple versions of videos for testing when needed.

-Source stock footage, sound effects, and music when required.

-Deliver clean, organized exports on time and to spec.

-Use AI tools to speed up captions, cleanup, and enhancement workflows.

-This role prioritizes speed, clarity, and performance over cinematic or experimental editing.

-Content Judgment & Storytelling

-Identify strong 
nts, hooks, and sound bites worth clipping and amplifying.

-Understand brand positioning and messaging well enough to make smart editorial decisions.

-Translate long-form conversations into clear, engaging short-form content.





Collaboration

-Work closely with the founder and marketing strategists to align edits with content goals.

-Incorporate feedback efficiently while maintaining quality standards.

-Manage multiple projects and timelines with consistency and reliability.



REQUIREMENTS:

-3+ years of professional video editing and post-production experience.

-Experience working with B2B brands, with exposure to B2C brands and/or influencers.

-Strong understanding of conversion-oriented, performance-driven editing for social platforms.

-Familiarity with performance metrics such as watch time, retention, CTR, and engagement.

-Strong understanding of conversion-oriented editing for social platforms.

-High attention to detail, consistency in delivering clean, on-spec exports, and pride in producing polished work.

-Strong written and verbal English communication skills, including the ability to collaborate clearly and efficiently in a remote environment.

-Ability to work independently and manage deadlines in a fully remote environment.

-Reliable computer capable of handling video editing software.

-Stable internet connection for file transfers and video calls.



NICE TO HAVES

Experience with motion graphics or simple animations.

Experience adding captions and formatting videos for social platforms.

Familiarity with B2B SaaS, professional services, or founder-led brands.

Experience editing content for influencers or personal brands.

Comfort working from creative briefs rather than rigid instructions.



COMPENSATION & BENEFITS

-Hourly contractor role

-Rate: $6 USD per hour, paid bi-weekly

-13th month guaranteed

-Paid birthday off

-Government dues are the responsibility of the contractor

-Remote Work: Enjoy the flexibility of working from anywhere.

-Flexible Hours: Work Monday - Friday, with 1-3 live check-in meetings every week to match EST (some weeks may require more or less depending on current projects, advanced notice will be provided for those weeks)

-Growth Opportunities: Potential for role expansion and additional responsibilities as the company grows.

-Small Team Environment: Work closely with a supportive and collaborative team where your contributions make a real impact.

-Holiday Flexibility: Option to adjust work schedules around local holidays and personal commitments.



TOOLS 

-Professional video editing tools (e.g., Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, DaVinci Resolve)

-Google Workspace (Drive, Docs, Sheets)

-Slack for team and client communication

-Project management tools such as Notion, 
 or Asana

-Google Meet for check-ins as needed





WORKING STYLE

-You should be comfortable working asynchronously, asking clarifying questions via
 and Slack, and delivering work you stand behind.



LONG-TERM MINDSET

This is not a short-term or transactional role. We are looking for someone who wants to build a long-term working relationship, grow alongside the business, and take pride in being a trusted creative partner.



TO APPLY

If you meet the requirements and are excited about this opportunity, we’d love to hear from you. Submit the following with the subject line “Video Editor – [Your Name]”:

1. Your CV

2. A link to your portfolio or multiple examples of video work (required)

3. A cover letter answering the questions below: 

-What is it about this role that appeals to you?

-Describe your experience editing video for B2B and/or B2C brands.

-Why do you think you'd be a great fit?

-How do you approach identifying strong hooks or 
nts in long-form footage?



If selected, are you willing to complete a paid skills test project relevant to this role?



Please note, we will not proceed with applicants that have not answered the questions.



Please use a minimum of 3 apply points. 



We look forward to hearing from you!

title: Product Growth Manager (DTC E-commerce – Shopify)
description:
We are a fast-scaling DTC e-commerce brand and are looking for a Product Growth Manager to take full ownership of our product pipeline.



This is NOT just a VA role.

This is NOT just product research.

This is a high-ownership role for someone who can independently drive product expansion and execution.



---



THIS ROLE IS FULL PRODUCT OWNERSHIP



You will be responsible for:



* Identifying and developing new product & collection ideas

* Sourcing products and securing COGs quickly

* Creating high-converting product listings (images + copy)

* Generating AI product images + descriptions

* Ensuring product quality matches what is shown on the website

* Managing the full product pipeline from idea ? live product

* Continuously launching and improving products without being told



Your core objective:



Ensure the brand consistently launches winning products and collections — without founder involvement



HARD REQUIREMENTS (NON-NEGOTIABLE)



Do NOT apply if you do not meet ALL of the following:



* You have worked inside a DTC e-commerce brand (Shopify preferred)

* You have been responsible for both product research AND execution

* You can independently source products and obtain COGs from suppliers

* You have experience creating product pages, images, and positioning

* You understand what makes a product convert and fit a brand

* You are fast, proactive, and do not wait for instructions

* You have experience working with AI tools for images/content (Midjourney, etc.)

* You can manage multiple products and collections at the same time



If you only have experience in product research, listing, or VA work — this role is NOT for you.



---



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR



You are:



* Highly independent and proactive

* Creative and commercially driven

* Fast in execution and decision-making

* Structured in managing workflows and output

* Obsessed with improving and launching products

* Comfortable taking full ownership without guidance



---



THIS ROLE IS NOT FOR YOU IF



* You need step-by-step instructions

* You only follow tasks instead of thinking

* You have never owned product outcomes

* You only have experience as a product lister or researcher

* You wait instead of taking initiative



---



WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE



* New products and collections are launched consistently

* Products are sourced quickly with clear margins

* Listings are high quality and conversion-focused

* Product quality matches what is shown online

* The product pipeline runs without founder involvement



---



APPLICATION (MANDATORY)



To apply, you MUST answer:



1. What DTC brand(s) have you worked for? Include revenue level

2. Describe a product you launched from idea ? live

3. How do you find and validate new product ideas?

4. How do you source products and secure COGs quickly?

5. What would you do in your first 14 days in this role?



Applications without these answers will be ignored.



---



We are looking for a long-term operator who wants ownership, responsibility, and growth inside a fast-scaling brand.



If that’s you — apply.

title: Experienced Brand Manager Assistant to support 12+ Amazon brands for growth, execution, drive performance and operation
description:
Role Overview



We're hiring a Brand Manager Assistant who will work directly under the Senior Brand Manager to execute day-to-day brand operations. This is a hands-on role focused on the “legwork” that drives performance: optimizing listings, managing keyword research, coordinating creative projects, and pulling actionable data.



If the Senior Brand Manager sets the playbook, the Associate Brand Manager runs the plays — ensuring everything gets executed on time, correctly, and at a high level.



Key Responsibilities

1. Listing Management & Optimization

Create, update, and fully optimize Amazon product listings (titles, bullets, descriptions, images, videos, A+ content).

Conduct keyword research and competitor analysis to improve rankings and visibility.

Ensure all listings remain Rufus and Cosmos compliant with Amazon’s latest requirements.

Test content variations (A/B testing) to improve CTR and conversions.



2. Data Research & Analysis

Pull performance data from Amazon Seller Central and external tools (Data Dive, Helium 10, Jungle Scout).

Identify trends, keyword shifts, and competitor activity.

Provide actionable recommendations to the Senior Brand Manager to improve conversions, CTR, and sales velocity.



3. Cross-Team Collaboration

Work closely with the graphic design team to request, coordinate, and deliver images, infographics, and A+ creatives.

Partner with the marketing team to support product launches, promotions, and review-generation initiatives.

Ensure all projects are aligned with deadlines, strategy, and brand guidelines.



4. Conversion-Focused Execution

Continuously update and refine listings to improve conversion rates and customer engagement.

Maintain Amazon Brand Stores, A+ content, and ad creatives for consistency and performance.

Assist in preparing assets for influencer campaigns and external marketing pushes.



5. Project & Compliance Support

Own the administrative “heavy lifting” of flat files, bulk uploads, and catalog troubleshooting.

Flag compliance issues, unauthorized sellers, or listing errors for quick resolution.

Support market expansion efforts by preparing research and draft listings for new product opportunities.



Skills & Qualifications



2+ years experience in Amazon FBA operations, brand management, or digital marketing.

Proficient in Amazon Seller Central, flat files, listing creation, and troubleshooting.

Strong skills in SEO, keyword research, and listing optimization.

Data-driven mindset; confident in Google Sheets and reporting.

Strong communication skills to work cross-functionally with design, marketing, and operations teams.

Highly organized, detail-oriented, and capable of managing multiple deadlines.



What Success Looks Like

Every listing across assigned brands is fully optimized, compliant, and performing.

Senior Brand Manager receives clear, accurate reports and recommendations.

Creative assets are delivered on time because you coordinated smoothly with design.



Product launches happen seamlessly with marketing and review strategies in place.

Conversions and rankings consistently improve due to your execution. If you feel you are the right fit, please respond to the job with the title " The Best Supporting Branding Manager Out There!"



Please respond directly to :

----------



Kind Regards,

Tam Ma

Co Founder

Prodigy Media

title: US Bookkeeper - Full-time (Accounting firm)
description:
Job Title: US Bookkeeper

Location: [Remote}

Type: Full-Time



We are a growing CPA firm providing accounting, tax, and advisory services to small and mid-sized businesses. We are seeking a reliable, detail-oriented bookkeeper to support our clients and internal team with accurate and timely financial reporting.



Position Overview

The Bookkeeper will be responsible for maintaining accurate financial records for multiple clients. This role requires strong attention to detail, the ability to manage deadlines, and experience working in a CPA firm or professional accounting environment.



Key Responsibilities

             •           Maintain full-cycle bookkeeping for multiple clients

             •           Record and reconcile bank and credit card accounts

             •           Process accounts payable and accounts receivable

             •           Prepare and post journal entries

             •           Maintain general ledgers and supporting schedules

             •           Perform monthly and year-end reconciliations

             •           Assist with month-end and year-end close

             •           Prepare financial statements (P&L, balance sheet, cash flow)

             •           Communicate with clients to resolve discrepancies

             •           Support CPAs with workpapers for tax filings and audits

             •           Maintain organized digital records

 

Must-Have Requirements

> Minimum 3 years of hands-on US bookkeeping or accounting experience

> Strong working knowledge of QuickBooks Online (Xero is a plus)

> Experience supporting US-based clients or businesses

> Solid understanding of US accounting practices and month-end close

> High attention to detail and strong reliability with deadlines



Nice-to-Have / Bonus

Prior experience working in a US accounting firm or CPA/public accounting firm

Client-facing communication experience with US clients

Exposure to automation or accounting tech tools (e.g., Dext, Hubdoc, 
, Gusto, Zapier)

Experience improving or streamlining bookkeeping workflows

Strong written communication skills for async, remote work



(READ CAREFULLY INSTRUCTIONS): answer screening questions with your CV 

*WE'LL NOT ENTERTAIN APPLICATIONS W/O SCREENING ANSWERS



1) Please describe your US bookkeeping or accounting experience in detail. (Include: years of experience, type of US clients supported, and whether this was firm-based or in-house etc.)



2) What accounting software have you personally used for US clients (e.g., QuickBooks Online, Xero)?

Walk us through the actual tasks you owned, not just assisted with.



3) Month-End Close

Describe your month-end close process for a US client. What do you usually complete, review, or flag before close?



4) This role requires full US EST working hours (approx. 9am–6pm EST).

Please confirm your ability to work this schedule full-time, long-term, and explain any limitations upfront.



5) Share your Target Salary in USD/month

title: SketchUp 3D Modeller / Draftsperson (Construction-Focused)
description:
We are looking for a highly capable SketchUp 3D modeller to assist with building accurate, real-world construction models and client-ready visual proposals.



This role is focused on assembling and adapting an existing system, not designing from scratch.



---

IMMEDIATE PROJECT (READY TO START)



We have a project ready to go immediately.



You will be provided with:

- A **clean, high-quality site image**  

- **Marked-up sketches** showing layout and component positions  

- **All required dimensions**  

- **SketchUp (.SKP) component files** where available  



Your role is to:

? Overlay and position the system correctly  

? Build out the model accurately  

? Present it cleanly and professionally  



ROLE OVERVIEW



You will be responsible for:



- Building **site-specific 3D models** using:

  - photos  

  - sketches  

  - measurements  



- Working with **existing SketchUp component libraries**  

- Modelling **real construction layouts** (not conceptual design)  

- Producing **clean, accurate visuals for client proposals**  

- Refining and improving presentation quality  



---



### KEY REQUIREMENTS



- Strong proficiency in **SketchUp (essential)** 

- Own the SketchUp software 

- Experience working with **existing component files**  

- Strong understanding of:

  - scale  

  - proportion  

  - real-world construction  



- Ability to interpret:

  - rough sketches  

  - marked-up images  

  - dimensioned layouts  





### IDEAL BACKGROUND



- Draftsperson, architect, or construction-related experience  

- Experience modelling:

  - scaffold systems  

  - steel structures  

  - modular systems  



---



### BONUS SKILLS



- Rendering (Enscape, V-Ray, Twinmotion, etc.)  

- Ability to produce **clean client presentation visuals**  

- Basic animation / walkthroughs  



---



### WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE



You can take:

- a real site image  

- a marked-up sketch  

- dimensioned instructions  



And turn it into:

- a clean, accurate model  

- that reflects how the system would actually be built  

- and presents well to a client  



---



### ROLE DETAILS



- Remote  

- Project-based to start  

- Strong potential for **ongoing, long-term work**  

- Immediate start available  



---



### HOW TO APPLY



Please include:



1. Examples of **SketchUp models** (construction-related preferred)  

2. Any rendering or presentation work  

3. Brief summary of your **construction or drafting experience**  

4. Your availability and typical turnaround time  



---



### IMPORTANT



We are looking for someone who understands **how things are actually built**, not just how they look.



Accuracy, speed, and practical thinking are critical.
