title: Faceless Video Producer and Growth Architect (Audience Physics Specialist)
description:
We are building a premium, faceless kitchen brand designed to become a category-leading digital asset. This is a founding role for a Content Architect who understands Audience Physics. We are not looking for simple views; we are looking for a loyal, high-quality following that trusts our aesthetic, clicks our recommendations, and eventually invests in our digital product ecosystem. This business is built on a foundation of consistency over perfection and showing up every day.



The Vision

Our brand follows a Porsche-style aesthetic: clean, wealthy, and healthy. Your job is to stop the swipe in under 500ms and engineer a Follower Contract that converts strangers into long-term fans who rely on our expertise for their kitchen setup.



The Core Requirements

Zero-Raw-Footage Sourcing: We provide ZERO raw footage.



Sourcing Mastery: You must be a master at finding and sourcing elite, royalty-free clips from platforms like Pexels, Pixabay, Storyblocks, and Unsplash and blending them so the brand feels cohesive and bespoke.



Faceless Production Mastery: Expert-level in Adobe Premiere, After Effects, or CapCut.



Technical Skills: You know how to make stock footage look like custom-shot cinema through color grading and speed ramping.



Audience Growth Engineering: You understand how to attract high-quality, engaged followers who actually interact with the content and click our featured affiliate and digital product links.



Retention and Swipe-Stop Physics: You live by the 0.0s Action Rule, using pattern interrupts and specific pacing to maintain 70%+ retention.



Bonus Skills

AI Augmentation: A major advantage if you use generative tools like Runway, Sora, or Luma to create specific shots that standard stock footage cannot provide.



Compensation and Communication

Fixed Monthly Retainer: 3,000 NOK (Approximately 19,900 PHP).



Disclaimer: The PHP amount is provided for reference only. Actual payment is made in NOK, and the final PHP amount received will fluctuate based on the currency exchange rate at the time of transfer.



Payment Method: Paid via Wise.



Volume: 10 high-impact, high-retention videos per month.



Workflow: We communicate and operate via Slack.



Growth: This is a founding role designed for significant multi-stage expansion. As the brand hits subscriber and engagement targets, this role is designed to scale in both volume and compensation.



How to Apply

Subject Line: PORSCHE [Your Name]



The Portfolio: Attach a portfolio of short-form content that you have personally produced from scratch. While faceless, stock-based content is preferred, we value any work that demonstrates elite pacing and high aesthetic.



The Growth Test: Explain your specific technique for ensuring the followers we gain are high-intent clickers and buyers rather than just random scrollers.



The Workflow: List the tools and sourcing techniques you use to ensure a video never feels generic or cheap.

title: LinkedIn Growth & Outreach VA
description:
I’m the Head of Account Strategy at an automotive AI company. I need a sharp, reliable VA to build my LinkedIn presence and run outbound prospecting through LinkedIn Sales Navigator.

This is NOT a generic social media management role. You will be using a custom AI writing tool (Claude) that already knows my voice, my industry, and my sales methodology. Your job is to operate the system. You research prospects, copy relevant context into the tool, it generates personalized outreach and content in my voice, and you send it.

What you’ll do every day:

 • Use LinkedIn Sales Navigator to research and identify prospects at car dealerships and dealer groups across the US

 • Send 15-20 personalized outreach messages per day (connection requests + InMail) to decision-makers

 • Manage follow-up sequences for prospects who don’t respond (2 follow-ups max per person)

 • Send 15-20 additional network-building connection requests per day

 • Comment on 15-25 industry posts using AI-generated comments

 • Post 3-5 LinkedIn posts per week

 • Respond to comments on my posts

 • Track everything in a Google Sheet (outreach pipeline, connections, engagement, post performance)

 • Escalate immediately when a prospect replies with interest in a meeting or demo

What you will NOT do:

 • Write content from scratch (the AI tool handles this)

 • Use any LinkedIn automation software (Dux-Soup, Expandi, PhantomBuster, etc.)

 • Handle live calls or demos (you hand off to me when a prospect is ready)

 • Reply to prospects on your own without running it through the AI tool first

 • Manage other social media platforms



Requirements

Must-Have:

 • Experience with LinkedIn Sales Navigator (searching, filtering, building lead lists, sending InMail)

 • Strong English reading comprehension (you need to read LinkedIn posts and prospect profiles accurately and summarize context for the AI tool)

 • Reliable internet connection and a computer (not phone-only)

 • Comfortable using browser-based tools (LinkedIn, Sales Navigator, Google Sheets, Claude AI)

 • Attention to detail (copy-paste accuracy and tracking discipline are critical)

 • Consistent and self-directed (daily volume needs to get done without reminders)

 • Available to overlap with US Eastern Time for at least 2-3 hours per day

Nice-to-Have:

 • Previous experience running LinkedIn outreach for a B2B company or executive

 • Familiarity with the automotive industry (dealerships, service departments, BDC)

 • Experience using AI tools like ChatGPT or Claude

 • Understanding of consultative selling or lead generation concepts

 • Previous VA experience on OnlineJobs.ph with references



What Success Looks Like

Month 1: You’re comfortable with the workflow. Outreach messages go out daily. Follow-ups are on schedule. Engagement is consistent. Tracking sheet is current. Tom is getting 3-5 prospect responses per week.

Month 3: Outreach pipeline is generating 2-4 booked meetings per month. LinkedIn network has grown by 500-1,000+ targeted connections. Engagement on posts is growing. Inbound DMs are increasing.

Month 6: LinkedIn is a consistent source of warm leads and meetings. You’re operating independently and Tom’s LinkedIn is a recognized voice in automotive AI.



How This Works

 1. I give you access to a Claude AI project that has my writing style, industry knowledge, and sales methodology pre-loaded.

 2. I give you access to LinkedIn Sales Navigator with saved searches and lead lists of target dealership decision-makers.

 3. I give you a detailed operating instructions document that walks you through every step of the daily workflow, including outreach templates, follow-up sequences, and escalation rules.

 4. You send me a short weekly report with outreach numbers, response rates, meetings booked, and any flags.

The system is already built. I need someone reliable and detail-oriented to run it daily.



To Apply

Please answer these four questions in your application:

 1. Describe your experience with LinkedIn Sales Navigator. What types of searches have you run and how did you use the results?

 2. Have you ever managed LinkedIn outreach or engagement for someone else? If yes, describe the volume and results.

 3. How many hours per day are you available, and what time zone are you in?

 4. Here’s a scenario: You find a General Manager at a Toyota dealership in Texas on Sales Navigator. His profile says he’s been in the role for 3 years and recently posted about service department staffing challenges. Write 2-3 sentences describing what context you would paste into the AI tool to get a good outreach message.

Do not send a generic application. I will skip any response that doesn’t answer these four questions.

title: Full-Time AI Video Editor
description:
We're hiring a full-time AI Video Editor to make and finalize short-form video ads for ecommerce brands. Your main job is editing — creating raw AI-generated clips, brand footage, and visual scripts, and turning them into polished, scroll-stopping ads ready to run on Meta, TikTok, and YouTube.

If you live in CapCut, understand short-form pacing, and have some experience with AI video tools, keep reading.



The work:

We provide the visual scripts, brand assets, and AI-generated raw clips. You bring it all together — cutting, pacing, sound design, captions, and final polish. You'll also generate some of the AI footage yourself using tools like Google Flow and ElevenLabs, but the core of the role is editing.

Expect to finalize 4-5 short-form ads per day and assist with around 10 AI clip generations to feed the edit pipeline.



You're a fit if you:

— Are highly skilled in CapCut (or Premiere/After Effects, with willingness to work primarily in CapCut)

— Understand short-form pacing — hooks, retention, payoff, captions that convert

— Have edited ads, UGC content, or viral short-form videos before

— Are comfortable using AI tools like Google Flow, ElevenLabs, and ChatGPT/Claude (or willing to learn fast)

— Can communicate clearly in English and respond reliably during work hours

— Want to specialize in ecommerce ad editing, not treat it as a side skill



What we provide:

— Full training course on our editing system and brand guidelines

— All brand assets, visual scripts, and AI-generated raw footage ready to go

— Clear feedback loops and room to grow into a senior editor role

— A team that listens when you bring ideas



Pay & growth:

— $350-$450 USD monthly base, depending on experience

— Up to 10% monthly performance bonus

— Minimum 5% salary increase after annual review for solid performers

— Real raises beyond that for exceptional work — we'd rather pay more and keep someone great than constantly rehire



How to apply:

Fill out this short form:

Start your application with the word "FLOW" so we know you actually read this post. We review every application that follows the instructions and reply within 3 days.

If you've got short-form ads or edits you're proud of, link them — we'll watch.

title: AI Video Creator / Motion Designer (Contract or Part-Time)
description:
THE REFERENCE — STUDY THIS VIDEO



Watch this before applying: 



"Comcast Commercial #1 (2026) Featuring Liev Schreiber" Directed by Dante Ariola / MJZ — Agency: Goodby Silverstein & Partners



This is the tone, pacing, and visual standard we are targeting. Your work does not need to match a $500K production budget, but it needs to match the FEEL. Here is what makes this commercial work — and what we need you to replicate:



TONE



Authoritative but not aggressive. Confident, measured, quiet power.

Feels like a prestige drama, not a sales pitch.

The narrator (Schreiber) speaks TO the viewer as an equal — not down to them, not hyping them up. Straightforward. Intelligent. Calm.

No hype. No "act now." No countdown timers. No stock-photo energy.



VISUAL STYLE



Cinematic color grading: desaturated, cool tones, deep contrast.

Clean, modern typography — data and numbers appear on screen as the narrator references them. Sans-serif. White or gold on dark.

Real-world footage intercut with data visualizations and motion graphics.

Slow, deliberate camera movement. No fast cuts. Each shot breathes.

Dynamic visuals proving scale — numbers animate in, graphics build.

Dark backgrounds dominate. Light is used intentionally, not flooded.



PACING



Measured. Every sentence gets space. No rush.

Music is low, cinematic, ambient — supports the voice, never competes.

Roughly 1 key visual per sentence. Not cluttered.

The viewer should feel like they are watching something important.

SOUND



Deep, resonant voiceover — professional narrator with gravitas.

Minimal sound design. No whooshes, no stingers, no comedic beats.

Subtle ambient score. Cinematic. Think Hans Zimmer at 10% volume.



WHAT YOU WILL PRODUCE

3-minute educational videos (we provide the scripts). Initial batch of 22 videos across 5 modules, plus 4 marketing/ad videos.



Topics include:



The Rockefeller Method (what it is, how it works)

Velocity Banking (debt elimination strategy)

Capital Deployment (real estate, oil & gas)

Tax Strategy (cost segregation, bonus depreciation)

Case Studies (military officer, pilot, engineer, veteran)

Marketing ads (The Problem, The System, The Execution, The Offer)

For each video, you will receive:



Full script with dialogue and scene descriptions

Visual direction notes (shot types, graphics, animations)

Brand guidelines (colors, fonts, logo placement)

You will deliver:



Finished 3-minute video (1920x1080 or 4K, .mp4)

Vertical cut for social (9:16, 60-second highlight)

Thumbnail image (1280x720)



REQUIRED SKILLS

MUST HAVE: 

[ ] Proficiency with AI video generation tools (Runway, Pika, Kling, Sora, HailuoAI, or similar). You should be producing with these daily. 

[ ] Strong motion graphics ability (After Effects, or AI equivalent). Animated typography, data visualizations, flow diagrams. 

[ ] Understanding of cinematic color grading and composition. 

[ ] Ability to source or generate high-quality voiceover (ElevenLabs, professional VO talent, or your own studio-quality voice). 

[ ] Clean, modern design sensibility. If your portfolio has neon gradients, particle effects, or "techy" overlays, this is not the right fit.



NICE TO HAVE:

[ ] Experience with financial services, real estate, or insurance content. 

[ ] Familiarity with the Infinite Banking Concept or wealth strategy space.

[ ] Ability to produce cinematic b-roll using AI (cityscapes, office environments, family scenes, military settings). 

[ ] Music licensing or production (or access to Artlist, Epidemic Sound).



DO NOT APPLY IF:



Your work looks like a TikTok edit or a "motivational" Instagram reel.

You rely on stock footage montages with no original motion design.

You cannot match the desaturated, high-contrast, dark visual palette shown in the reference video.

You think "corporate video" means bright blue backgrounds with icons flying around. That is the opposite of what we want.



PORTFOLIO LINK

Show us 3–5 pieces that demonstrate the cinematic, authoritative tone described above. If nothing in your current portfolio matches, produce a 30-second sample using one of our scripts (provided on request).



TOOLS LIST 

Tell us exactly which AI tools you use for generation, editing, motion graphics, voiceover, and music. We want to know your actual workflow, not a list of tools you have heard of.



TURNAROUND ESTIMATE

 How many days per finished 3-minute video? Be realistic. We value quality over speed, but we need a sustainable cadence.



RATE 

Per-video rate for the deliverables described above (landscape video, vertical cut, thumbnail). If you prefer hourly, state that.



ONE SENTENCE

Watch the Comcast reference video and tell us in one sentence what makes it work. This tells us whether you see what we see.



TIMELINE & VOLUME

Phase 1: 4 marketing videos (highest priority — paid ads) 

Phase 2: Module 1 (5 videos) — Rockefeller Method foundations 

Phase 3: Modules 2–5 (17 videos) — ongoing, 2–3 per week



Total: 26 videos over approximately 10–12 weeks. Ongoing work available as we expand the curriculum and ad campaigns.



ABOUT THE ROLE

This is not a one-off gig. We are building a media engine. The right person becomes our go-to video creator across all four entities (Velocity Capital, Anza Ventures, Anza Realtor, Anza Construction). Consistent work, clear creative direction, and scripts provided for every piece.



We are looking for someone who takes pride in craft. Someone who watches the Comcast spot and thinks: 

"I can do that — and I can do it faster with AI."

title: Full-Time Visual Storyteller & Social Media Creator
description:
We are Dreambound, a mission-driven education startup, and we’re looking for a full-time Social Media Content Creator who just "gets it." You aren't just an editor; you’re someone who lives and breathes social media and knows how to turn a simple idea into a post that people actually want to stop and watch.



The Role



We will provide the creative briefs, the brand guidelines, and the strategy. Your job is to bring the magic. You’ll take our concepts and transform them into high-performing short-form videos (TikTok/Reels/Shorts/Ads) and eye-catching graphics that resonate with our audience.



This isn't about just clicking buttons in Premiere or CapCut; it’s about understanding pacing, hooks, and visual storytelling.



Please use the code DreamTeam when applying through the link below.



What You’ll Be Doing

- Creative Execution: Turning our briefs into 3–5 pieces of high-quality content daily (a mix of video and graphics).

- Visual Hook Mastery: Using your "knack" for attention-grabbing visuals to stop the scroll.

- Collaboration: Working closely with our team to refine ideas and iterate based on what the data tells us is working.



You’re the Perfect Fit If...

- You can work U.S. PST hours (west coast schedule)

- You are a Social-Media Native: You know what’s trending, you know why certain videos go viral, and you can replicate that "feeling" in your work.

- You’re a Visual Problem Solver: You can take a text-based brief and instantly see the visual story in your head.

- You Balance Speed and Quality: You thrive in a startup environment where we move fast, but you never sacrifice the brand's look and feel.

- You have the "Knack": You have an intuitive sense for layout, typography, and video pacing.

title: Senior Campaign Manager
description:
REBORN is looking for a senior Campaign Manager to support the delivery of social media, influencer and SEO campaigns across multiple client accounts.



This is not an entry-level VA role. We need someone with real agency experience who understands how digital campaigns move, how deadlines and deliverables are managed in an agency and the importance of client  updates, and how to keep work organised without being chased.



You will help manage the admin, coordination, follow-up, reporting and day-to-day campaign operations across paid social, influencer activity and SEO. 



Key responsibilities:

• Support campaign delivery across paid social, influencer and SEO campaigns

• Coordinate campaign tasks, timelines, assets, approvals and deliverables

• Follow up with influencers, suppliers, clients and internal tea
mbers

• Chase contracts, campaign materials, live links, content approvals and reporting inputs

• Help prepare campaign reports and performance updates

• Work across Meta Ads, TikTok Ads, Google Ads, GA4, Looker Studio and Google Sheets

• Support SEO workflows using tools such as Ahrefs, Semrush and WordPress

• Keep tasks updated in ClickUp and communicate clearly through Slack

• Identify delays, missing information and risks before they become problems

• Help make campaign operations smoother, faster and more organised



You must have:

• Previous agency experience, ideally in a digital, social, media, SEO or influencer agency

• Strong written and spoken English

• Experience supporting paid social campaigns, especially Meta and TikTok

• Familiarity with Google Ads, GA4, Looker Studio and campaign reporting

• Strong organisation and attention to detail

• Confidence following up with people professionally

• Ability to work full-time during Sydney, Australia business hours

• A proactive mindset. We need someone who spots what needs to be done, not someone waiting for every instruction



Nice to have:

• Experience with influencer campaign management

• Experience with SEO admin, content coordination or backlink tracking

• Experience using ClickUp, Slack, Google Workspace, Ahrefs, Semrush and WordPress

• Experience preparing client-ready campaign summaries or reports



Who this role is best for:

This role suits someone who has worked inside an agency and understands the pace, pressure and coordination required. You may have been a campaign coordinator, account manager, digital marketing assistant, media coordinator or project manager in an agency environment.



Who this role is not for:

Please do not apply if you have only worked as a general VA with no agency experience. We are specifically looking for someone who understands agency campaign operations.



How to apply:

Please send:

A short summary of your agency experience

Your CV or OnlineJobs.ph profile



A short Loom video, 2 to 3 minutes, answering these questions:

• What agency experience do you have?

• What types of campaigns have you helped manage?

• Which tools from this listing have you used?

• How do you stay organised when managing multiple campaigns at once?

• Why would you be a good fit for a Sydney-based agency?



Please include the phrase “Sydney Campaign Operator” at the top of your application so we know you read the full listing.



Only shortlisted applicants will be contacted.

title: Meta Ads Specialist - Ad Creation and Optimisation (plus Replies to interactions)
description:
This role is responsible for the creation, management, and ongoing optimisation of paid social campaigns across four Meta ad accounts, each operating in a distinct country market (Australia, New Zealand, USA, and Europe/Hungary). While the core product range is consistent across all markets, the specialist will tailor creative, copy, targeting, and bidding strategies to suit local audience behaviours, seasonality, and platform nuances.



Key responsibilities include creating and launching ad campaigns from brief through to live, continuously optimising for performance (ROAS, CPL, CTR, conversion rate), producing regular performance reports with clear insights and recommendations, and being available to answer questions from the wider team on campaign status, results, and strategy. The role requires someone comfortable managing multiple accounts simultaneously without losing sight of market-specific performance drivers.



The ideal candidate has hands-on Meta Ads Manager experience, is confident reading and interpreting data, and can communicate findings clearly to non-specialists. Experience running the same product across multiple countries is a strong advantage.

title: Instagram Growth Manager — Personal Brand (Consultant)
description:
About the role

I run a consulting business in Sydney called Kaizen Collective. We help service business owners build client acquisition systems that actually work. My personal 
 ~20K followers) is the primary top-of-funnel for the business.

I'm looking for someone to own the growth of that account end-to-end.

This is not just a video editing role. This is a strategy and execution role. 

You will be responsible for what gets posted, when, and why. 

You will write captions. You will concept Reels & edit them.

You will track what works and do more of it. You will tell me when my ideas are bad.

If you're waiting for instructions before you can do anything, this isn't the job.



What you'll own

1. Instagram content calendar and posting schedule 

2. Reel concepts, hooks, captions, and scripts (I film the content, you direct it)

3. Carousel design and copy

4. Video editing & thumbnail creation

5. Stories strategy and daily execution

6. Comment and DM triage (not sales conversations, just engagement and surfacing leads)

7. Daily & Weekly performance reporting — what worked, what didn't, what we're changing

8. Trend research and adaptation for my niche (service business owners, not general business)



What you don't own

- Paid ads (we have a media buyer)



You focus on one thing: growing my personal brand Instagram.



You're the right fit if

1. You've personally grown a social account from zero to something meaningful

2. You've managed at least one personal brand account end-to-end

3. You can write in someone else's voice without making them sound generic

4. You understand the difference between "content that gets views" and "content that gets clients"

5. You have taste

6. You ask questions when unclear instead of guessing



You're the wrong fit if

1. You're a video editor looking for your next gig

2. You need a full brief before you can start working

3. You've never posted anything you've personally concepted

4. You think AI can replace strategy

5. You're juggling five other clients and this is a side hustle



Rate

$800-$1,500 AUD/month based on experience and scope. Paid weekly. 

30-day paid trial before ongoing engagement is confirmed.





You apply via the questions below

a) Shortlisted applicants get a paid test task ($50 AUD, flat rate, whether hired or not)

b) The final two or three get a 30-min video interview, offer and 30-day paid trial



How to apply

Read my Instagram 

Then reply with:

1. Three Reels you've personally concepted (not just edited). Include the link and one line on why each worked.

2. An account you've actively grown. Share the handle, where it started, where it got to, and the timeframe.

3. Looking 
 right now, what's the single thing you'd change first and why? Be specific. Generic answers will be ignored.

4. What's your current availability and what other work are you doing right now?(ti's fine to have a job but be honest)

5. Your monthly rate in AUD.



Filters: Applications that will be ignored:



1. Anything that starts with "I am passionate about social media"

2. Cover letters that don't reference my actual account

3. Copy-paste responses clearly written by ChatGPT or Claude

4. Anyone who lists "content creation" as a skill without evidence of it

5. Anyone who doesn't answer all five questions



I read every application personally. Make it easy for me to say yes.

title: Recruiter & Pipeline Manager | Full-Time | Base + Bonuses
description:
This job is for someone who hunts and knows how to read people.



Not someone who sends one text and waits. Someone who follows up relentlessly, qualifies hard, and can smell a time-waster in the first two minutes of a call.



If that's not you, please don't apply. If that is you, keep reading.



What we do



We are a recruiting company that works specifically with home service companies like roofing, solar, HVAC and places door to door candidates into their sales force. We get paid bonuses based on how many reps stay past 30 days. That means the quality of who you put in the pipeline directly affects our revenue and your paycheck.



A pipeline full of the wrong people is worse than a small pipeline full of the right ones.



What you'll be doing every day



- Call and text new leads from Indeed and Meta the same day they come in — speed matters

- Follow up relentlessly on anyone who hasn't responded — no lead goes cold without a fight

- Re-engage missed group call leads — people who said yes and disappeared are your first priority

- Qualify candidates hard before inviting them to a group call — not everyone deserves a spot

- Confirm group call attendees so they actually show up — not just invited, confirmed

- Follow up the same night as every group call — text, book the 1-on-1, keep the 
ntum going

- Own every candidate from first contact through their 1-on-1 all the way to day 1

- Keep GoHighLevel updated every single day — every call, text, and stage move logged before you close your laptop

- Send a short daily update to leadership without being asked — what moved, what's stuck, what you need



The skill that matters most



You're qualifying people.



When someone tells you they're motivated but can't explain why — you push. When someone says they're ready to commit but keeps moving the goalposts — you call it out. When someone's story doesn't add up — you trust your gut and move on.



This requires real recruiting or sales experience. You need to know what genuine interest sounds like. You need to have sat across from...or spoken to enough people that you've developed instincts. That experience cannot be faked and we'll know immediately in the interview if you have it.



If you've recruited or sold before and you know what it feels like to disqualify someone who seemed interested on the surface...that instinct is worth more to us than any certification or years of experience.



You're exactly who we're looking for if:



- You've done recruiting, sales, or high-volume outreach and you were actually good at it

- You can read people fast — you know within 5 minutes whether someone is serious or wasting your time

- You follow up 6, 7, 8 times without being told to — because you hate leaving a lead unworked

- You update the CRM every single day without being reminded — because you know a messy pipeline costs you money

- You communicate proactively — your manager never has to chase you for updates

- You're hungry. Not "motivated" — actually hungry. You look at a bonus structure and immediately start doing the math.

- You're available during US business hours (EST or CST overlap — non-negotiable)

- You speak English well....also non negotiable



You're not who we're looking for if:



- You invite everyone through just to hit an activity number

- You need to be told to follow up

- You go quiet and wait to be checked on

- You have an excuse when your numbers are low

- You treat the CRM as optional

- You quit on a lead after 2 attempts

- You've never had a role where your results were directly tied to your income



We've had someone in this role before who wasn't hungry enough and couldn't qualify. We're not making that mistake again. We will find out in the interview — so please be honest with yourself before applying.



Pay:



Base: $4/hr — full-time, 40 hrs/week

Bonus: $100 per rep who stays past 30 days

Streak bonus: $200 extra when 5+ reps in a single month all hit 30 days



A strong performer placing 4–5 reps a month makes an extra $400–$700 on top of base. 



The base keeps the lights on. The bonus is where you actually earn. If you're the type of person who looks at that and gets excited — you're our type of person.



To apply, answer all four questions below.

Applications missing any answer will not be read. No exceptions.



1. Tell me about a time you followed up with someone multiple times before they responded. How many attempts did it take, what did you say on each attempt, and what was the outcome?



2. You have 30 active leads across different stages of a pipeline. Walk me through exactly how you d
 who to contact first today.



3. Describe a candidate or customer you disqualified even though they seemed interested on the surface. What specific signals told you they weren't the right fit — and how did you handle the conversation?



4. Have you used GoHighLevel before? If yes, what specifically did you use it for? If no, what CRM have you used and how quickly do you typically learn a new system?



We move fast. Strong applicants hear from us within 12 hours.



This is a long-term role with real upside. We're growing, we're adding clients, and the right person grows with us.

title: Shopify Expert
description:
We run a Shopify store for a premium, internationally distributed product — stocked through major trade retailers and sold direct to consumers in Australia, Europe  and the US. We're looking for a Shopify specialist who works to a high standard and has done this for quality brands before. The initial engagement is a defined paid task. Candidates who deliver will have the opportunity to take on an ongoing role managing and improving our storefront.



What the work involves



Initially reviewing the website and providing suggestions on how to improve functionality and aesthetics. It will be initially 1 week work then ongoing part time work . 



Building product bundle offers that are well-designed and conversion-focused

Creating and refining landing pages and collection pages — visually polished and on-brand

CRO improvements: page speed, UX flows, mobile experience, checkout

Working within an existing brand style guide to maintain visual consistency

Shopify Markets / multi-region store configuration (AU and US storefronts)



What we're looking for



5+ years of Shopify experience working with premium or trade brands

A portfolio that demonstrates high-quality, brand-appropriate store work — not template flips

Proven experience building product bundles (native Shopify or apps)

Solid Liquid, HTML/CSS, and JavaScript skills for theme customisation

How to apply



Send a short introduction and links to 2–3 Shopify stores you've built or meaningfully improved for premium brands. Include any data you can share on outcomes. We'll shortlist and reach out with details of the trial task.

title: Short-Form Video Editor | Full-Time | Performance Bonuses
description:
APEX



(If you're reading this — yes, that word matters. More on that at the bottom.)



Who we are



We run a fast-moving content production agency creating 100+ short-form videos every month for clients across TikTok and Instagram Reels. We are not a slow corporate agency. We move fast, we have high standards, and we reward people who perform.



If you're the kind of editor who takes pride in fast turnarounds, clean cuts, and making content that actually stops the scroll — you'll fit right in. If you need a lot of hand-holding or struggle with volume, this isn't the right role.



What you'll be doing



- Edit 2-3 short-form videos per day (TikTok / Instagram Reels)

- Add captions, cuts, zooms, sound effects, and transitions that match proven templates

- Follow client-specific editing styles — you'll be given clear direction, not left to guess

- Submit work through 
 and respond to revision notes quickly

- Communicate daily on Slack and stay responsive during your working hours

- Track your time accurately using our time tracking software (required, non-negotiable)

- Minimum 6 hours per day



What makes someone great at this role



Most videos should take you 90–120 minutes. We're looking for editors who've done enough short-form content that the process is second nature — someone who can work from a template, execute cleanly, and move to the next one without losing quality.



Speed without quality doesn't work. Quality without speed doesn't work either. We need both.



Tools you'll use**



- Adobe Premiere Pro - No CapCut

- 
 for feedback and revisions

- Slack for communication

- Time tracking software (provided)



The money:



Training period (first 10 approved videos): $3/hr

After training: $4/hr base



Performance bonuses (weekly):

- 10 videos delivered and approved = +$100

- 12 videos delivered and approved = +$200



An editor hitting 12 approved videos a week consistently is making $4/hr base plus $200 in weekly bonuses. That's real money and we want to pay it. Show us you can hit the volume and the quality and we will.



Bonuses are paid on approved videos — not submitted videos. Quality still matters.



You're who we're looking for if:



- You have real experience editing TikTok or Reels content — not just long-form YouTube cuts

- You can comfortably produce 2 clean edits per day without burning out

- You're coachable — you take revision notes as information, not criticism

- You're reliable and responsive — if something comes up, you communicate, you don't disappear

- You're okay being tracked on performance because you know your work speaks for itself

- You have a stable internet connection and a setup that doesn't let you down



You're not who we're looking for if:



- You can't commit to 6 hours a day minimum

- You take feedback personally

- You need days to turn around a 60-second video

- You go quiet when things get busy

- You want creative freedom on every video — this role follows templates and client direction



Growth



We promote from within. Editors who consistently hit volume, take direction well, and communicate like a professional get more clients, more hours, and more money. We are actively growing and we want people who want to grow with us.



Limited spots are available. We are hiring now and once positions are filled, this post comes down.



To apply — all four required, no exceptions:



1. Start your application with the word **APEX** at the very top. Applications without it will not be read — this tells us you actually read the post.

2. Share **2–3 examples** of short-form content you've edited (TikTok, Reels, or similar). Links preferred.

3. Tell us your **internet speed** (run a speed test at 
 and paste the result).

4. Answer this honestly: **How many videos can you realistically edit per day, and how long does a typical short-form edit take you?**



We move fast. Strong applicants hear from us within 48 hours. If you have the skills and the work ethic, this is one of the best remote editing roles you'll find.

title: E-Commerce Order Manager – Fashion Dropshipping (Supply Chain)
description:
We are looking for a highly experienced E-Commerce Fashion Dropshipping Order Manager with proven hands-on experience working with the Service Points fulfillment platform. If you have not worked with Service Points before, please do not apply — this is a hard requirement for this role.



About the role:



We are a fast-growing dropshipping fashion brand and we are genuinely excited to find the right person to join our team! As our Order Manager, you will be at the heart of everything we do — making sure our customers receive exactly what they ordered, on time, every time. If you are someone who loves bringing order to chaos, takes pride in getting the details right, and thrives in a fast-paced e-commerce environment, then we think you might be exactly who we are looking for!



What you will be doing:



You will own the full order journey from the 
nt a customer hits "buy" to the 
nt their package lands at their door. This means quoting products with suppliers to make sure we are always getting great prices, negotiating better deals where you can, and catching any discrepancies before they become problems. You will carefully check that every order has the right variants — the right size, the right color, the right style — so our customers always get exactly what they paid for.

You will keep our order tracking spreadsheet accurate, up to date, and organised every single day. Statuses, tracking numbers, supplier references, notes — everything in its place. We rely on this and we need someone who takes real pride in keeping it spotless.



You will be our go-to person for all supplier communication — following up on delays, finding quick solutions when something is out of stock, resolving shipping issues, and handling quality concerns with a calm and professional approach. You will work hand in hand with our customer service team so they always have the right information to keep our customers happy.



And beyond the daily work — we would absolutely love it if you spot patterns, flag issues before they grow, and bring ideas for how we can do things even better. We are always looking to improve and we truly value people who think ahead.



What we are looking for:



Proven hands-on experience with Service Points is an absolute must — without this, we are not able to move forward with your application. Alongside that, you bring real experience in e-commerce order management in a dropshipping environment, you are confident in Google Sheets or Excel, and you are the kind of person who is naturally organised and on top of every detail. You stay cool under pressure, you are a clear and friendly communicator in English, and you genuinely enjoy being part of a small, driven team that is building something great together.



???? Before you apply, please watch this short video where we walk you through the role in detail — this will give you a much better feel for who we are and exactly what we are looking for:



????

title: Devops Engineer
description:
The best way to look at this role is you would have the main responsibility to own our Linux systems and the responsibility for deployment and the support of team that will handle the maintenance and monitoring of applications on them. This will include custom and other more standard open source and proprietary applications.

Our favorite candidate will be able to support at least basic needs for Window DevOps and more.



RESPONSIBILITIES



Plan/Design, Build and define the monitoring of our Linux and Windows applications and the systems that run them.

Implement client-requested integrations.

Design/Plan and support team in deploying updates and fixes

Conduct root cause analysis if issues

Investigate and resolve technical issues and create/provide resources to team to prevent.

Develop scripts to automate processes and updates

Provide technical support and design procedures for system troubleshooting and maintenance.



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR



Proven experience with version control system administration, including management of the company’s version control system, code remote repositories, branching, and so on.

Knowledgeable in Linux server administration – management of Linux servers, including but not limited to Ubuntu, Centos, and Debian (you can pick your favorite distro).

Knowledge of web server administration – management of Nginx and Apache web servers

Experience with database administration – management of databases and database servers

Experience with CI/CD and automation – management of the development pipeline and task automation.

Understanding of Development Security Operations – management of development infrastructure security.

Experience with bash scripting (experience in Python and PHP is a plus)

Experience with infrastructure and event monitoring – monitoring infrastructure, resource utilization, security events, and so on.

Proven experience with cloud computing and virtualization – working with hypervisors and cloud service providers.



HOW TO APPLY:



If you feel this position aligns with your skills and experience, please fill out the application form here:


/bepartofourteam.

title: Senior IT Engineer
description:
HOW TO APPLY:



If you feel this position aligns with your skills and experience, please fill out the application form here:


/bepartofourteam.





We’re looking for a hands-on senior IT professional who can support clients at all levels while also leading or assisting with IT projects and driving innovative solutions.

Our senior tea
mbers are critical to supporting our awesome clients and their users. They leverage industry-leading tools and expertise to resolve complex issues, prevent future problems, and improve client IT environments.

This role is perfect for someone who enjoys solving challenging technical problems while also designing and implementing improvements that make a real impact.



Key Responsibilities:



Client Support (All Levels)



Provide technical support to clients via phone,
, and remote access—handling everything from basic troubleshooting to advanced escalations.

Diagnose and resolve hardware, software, and network issues for multiple clients.

Perform O365 and Windows administration, user account management, and access provisioning.

Support and troubleshoot VOIP systems (e.g., 3CX).

Manage and maintain RMM and PSA tools (e.g., Datto, Halo).

Mentor junior engineers and provide guidance to improve team troubleshooting skills.





Projects & Innovation



Lead or assist with IT projects, e.g cloud migrations, system upgrades, deployments, and process automation etc.

Identify and implement solutions to reduce recurring issues and improve efficiency.

Develop and maintain PowerShell scripts to automate routine tasks and streamline operations.

Collaborate with vendors and clients to plan, test, and deliver new IT solutions.



Documentation & Communication



Log issues and resolutions accurately for future reference.

Communicate effectively with clients and vendors to ensure smooth resolutions and project delivery.



Requirements



Previous experience working in an MSP environment is a plus.

Excellent communication skills – able to have comfortable, friendly conversations in English without being overly formal or technical.

Strong attention to detail and follow-through – “never let it go until it’s solved.”

Demonstrable experience working with Windows systems (client/server) and O365 administration.

Proficiency in advanced troubleshooting methodologies.

Scripting skills, particularly in PowerShell, to automate tasks and improve efficiency.

Experience with VOIP systems and a solid understanding of network infrastructure.

Familiarity with RMM and PSA platforms used in MSP environments (e.g., Datto, Halo).

We are heavy users of Office 365 and Azure, so you’ll need to have solid experience and know the fundamentals or demonstrate skills in something very similar..

Ability to handle difficult tasks, set proper expectations, and deliver solutions within a reasonable timeframe.

Out-of-the-box thinker – proactive, creative, and always looking to improve processes.

Willingness to go the extra mile to ensure client satisfaction.

Ability to “figure things out,” even when facing new or unfamiliar technologies.

title: Marketing Strategist for Dropshipping Ads & Product Websites
description:
We are looking for a new tea
mber to join our e-commerce team and handle the marketing strategy behind our ads, product pages, and advertorials.

This role is for someone who understands dropshipping, buyer avatars, marketing angles, competitor research, ad copywriting, and conversion-focused website strategy.

Daily tasks include:





Research winning competitor ads





Analyze the marketing strategy behind those ads





Create new ad copywriting based on proven angles





Prepare clear creative directives for our ad designer





Define the buyer avatar, pain points, desire, and angle for each product





Create the marketing SOP for product pages and advertorials





Write copywriting guidance section by section for the website designer





Give visual direction for website sections, advertorials, and ad creatives





Make sure every creative and page speaks directly to the right persona





Create new iterations based on what is working





We are looking for someone who:





Has experience in dropshipping or e-commerce





Understands direct-response marketing





Knows how to identify winning ads and winning angles





Can think from the buyer’s perspective

title: Social Media Manager + Video Editor + GoHighLevel (Info Product Brand)
description:
====================================================

THIS IS NOT A TYPICAL VA JOB.

====================================================



We run a real estate education brand — coaching, courses, and content — built around a Hormozi-style info product funnel. We have a monetized YouTube channel, active TikTok, Instagram,
, and LinkedIn. We have the tools, the strategy, and the content plan. What we need is someone who OWNS the execution end-to-end.



If you're the type of person who gets obsessed with a brand, who checks analytics on their own because they care, who connects the dots between a piece of content and a sale — this role is for you.



The previous team was 2 people. You'll replace both. You'll be paid better per task and have real upside.



----------------------------------------------------

WHAT WE SELL

----------------------------------------------------



The funnel is simple. Three products:



- Monthly Coaching — $2,000/month (high-ticket, relationship-driven)

- Strategy Call — $550 one-time

- Ebook — $15 (top-of-funnel lead magnet)

- Course — mid-ticket, launching soon



You'll understand this funnel deeply. Every post, reel, carousel, and
 is a door into it.



----------------------------------------------------

WHAT YOU'LL OWN

----------------------------------------------------



CONTENT PUBLISHING (Daily)

- Post short-form content across YouTube Shorts, TikTok, Instagram Reels,
, LinkedIn

- Use AI carousel tools to create branded IG/TikTok/LinkedIn carousels — templates provided

- Schedule and publish using a social media tool (we pay for it)

- Maintain a consistent posting cadence — no more gaps



VIDEO EDITING

- Edit short-form videos (Reels, Shorts, TikToks) from raw footage

- Add captions, B-roll, text overlays — on-brand style guide provided

- Quick turnaround: 24–48hrs from footage to published



GOHIGHLEVEL (CRM & Funnels)

- Build and manage landing pages for products and lead magnets

- Set up and maintain
/SMS automation sequences

- Keep the pipeline organized — track leads from content to call to close

- Manage the course delivery environment



COMMUNITY & MODERATION

- Respond to DMs and comments across all platforms

- Engage the audience — build community around the brand

- Flag hot leads to the founder



SYSTEMS & REPORTING

- Update our internal task and accountability system daily

- Weekly snapshot: what posted, what performed, what's next

- You'll be the one keeping the machine running — not waiting to be told what to do



----------------------------------------------------

WHAT YOU NEED TO HAVE

----------------------------------------------------



- GoHighLevel experience — NON-NEGOTIABLE. You must have built at least one funnel, automation, or landing page.

- Short-form video editing (CapCut, Premiere, or similar) — we shoot, you polish

- Experience posting on Instagram, TikTok, YouTube,
, LinkedIn

- Good written English — you'll write captions, CTAs, and occasionally
 copy

- Reliable internet, fast turnaround, and no-excuses accountability

- Self-starter energy — you don't need daily hand-holding



NICE TO HAVE:

- Experience with real estate, finance, or education brands

- Copywriting skills — especially for sales pages and
 sequences

- Familiarity with AI tools for content generation

- Prior experience in an info product / online course business



----------------------------------------------------

WHAT YOU GET

----------------------------------------------------



- $400/month base — paid weekly or biweekly, your choice

- Revenue share on sales you directly influence (let's talk — we want you invested)

- Access to premium tools: GoHighLevel, AI carousel tools, scheduling software

- Clear brand playbooks and context — you won't be guessing

- A founder who is plugged in, gives direct feedback, and moves fast

- Room to grow — if you perform, this role grows with the brand



====================================================

HOW TO APPLY — READ EVERY STEP. THEY ARE INTENTIONAL.

====================================================



WARNING: Do NOT use AI to write your application. We work with AI tools every day,  we will immediately recognize a ChatGPT response. We don't care if your English isn't perfect. We care if it's yours. An honest, slightly messy application beats a polished AI one every single time.



Here's exactly what to send:



1. SUBJECT LINE must read exactly:

   IGTRE READY — [Your First Name] — [One word that describes your work style]

   Example: "IGTRE READY — Maria — Relentless"

   Anything else goes to trash.



2. Go look at our Instagram or TikTok page RIGHT NOW. Find one post. Tell us which one caught your eye and in 2 sentences — in your own words — tell us what you'd change about it to make it perform better.

   (AI cannot do this for you. This tells us you actually looked.)



3. Screenshot your GoHighLevel dashboard or a funnel you've built and attach it. Blur client names if needed. No screenshot = no interview.

   We've had too many people claim GHL experience they don't have. Prove it.



4. Record a Loom video — 90 seconds max. No script, no AI voiceover, just you talking.

   Tell us: your name, where you're from, one brand you've managed content for, and why this role specifically.

   Loom is free at 
. Paste the link in your application.



5. At the very end of your message, write "I read every word." in bold.

   Then below it, tell us what you had for breakfast today. Seriously. It's a vibe check.



----------------------------------------------------

If any of these steps are missing, your application will not be opened. This isn't gatekeeping — it's how we find the one person who actually gives a damn.



The right person will read this post and feel energized, not overwhelmed.

----------------------------------------------------

title: Social Media VA & Video Editor (Fitness Studio)
description:
Hiring Company: Virtual Spotter

Placement: Long-term VA role with one of our Australian fitness studio clients

Hours: 1 hour per day, Monday to Friday (5 hours per week, flexible scheduling)

Type: Remote, ongoing

About Virtual Spotter

Virtual Spotter places skilled Filipino virtual assistants with boutique fitness studios across Australia. We handle the matching, onboarding, and ongoing support so you can focus on doing great work for a client who values you long-term.

About the Role

We're hiring on behalf of one of our clients, a boutique Muay Thai studio in Australia. They need a reliable VA to take ownership of their social media content and video editing. Clear systems and templates are already in place, so once you're trained you'll know exactly what to do each day. The role is just 1 hour per day, Monday to Friday, with flexible scheduling that fits around your other commitments.

Core Responsibilities

Social Media Management



Schedule 5 to 6 posts per week (max 2 posts per day) across Instagram and TikTok

Post during optimal Australian times: early morning, lunchtime, and evening (evenings highest priority)

Primary posting days are Monday to Thursday and Sunday

Draft captions that fit brand voice

Slot all content into one of three pillars: Educational, Fun/Relatable, or Core/Community

Submit for owner approval before posting during the initial phase



Video Editing in CapCut (shared account with the client)



Edit short-form vertical video (9:16,) using four provided templates: Educational, Fun/Relatable, Community, and Face-to-Camera

Reels: 30 to 60 seconds

Stories: 15 to 30 seconds

Follow the mandatory video structure: hook in first 3 seconds, core content, call to action in final 3 to 5 seconds

Use the provided hook template library to open every video

Add subtitles, text overlays, and captions where needed

Stick to approved brand filters, avoid heavy effects



Quality Control

Run every video through our checklist before submission: correct duration, strong hook, clear audio, no dead space, captions included, brand consistency maintained.

What We're Looking For



Strong CapCut editing skills (samples required)

Clear written English for casual, punchy captions

Experience scheduling content on Instagram and TikTok

Eye for short-form pacing and scroll-stopping hooks

Reliable internet, quiet workspace, dependable power

Detail-oriented and systems-driven

Long-term mindset, looking for an ongoing client relationship



Nice to Have



Background in, or gym content

Familiarity with brand guideline documents

Prior VA experience with Australian clients



How to Apply

All applications must be submitted through our digital application form.



Application form: 

Your application will need to include:



2 to 3 links to short-form videos you have edited in CapCut

Your weekly availability and timezone



One sentence on why this role suits you

title: Para-Broker / Mortgage Broking Credit Analyst
description:
Para Broker - Credit Analyst – Australian Mortgage Broking (Medical & Complex Lending Specialist)

Work from Home | Full-Time | 60,
,000 PHP pm



Are you an EXPERIENCED / SENIOR Para-broker or Credit Analyst ready to level up your career and be part of a thriving, high-performing team? We're an established mortgage brokerage based in Australia, specialising in Finance for Medical professionals — but we handle residential (owner-occupied and investment), commercial, SMSF, complex, and high-net-worth lending.



We're not your average brokerage. Every day is different. Every file presents a new challenge. Our clients are driven, intelligent professionals — and they expect the same from us.



That’s why we’re looking for a **GENUINLY EXPERIENCED** Credit Analyst / Para - Broker — not someone who ONLY submits applications via AOL or plays a broker support/admin role.



What We’re Looking For:



End-to-end experience: From researching borrowing structures, assessing servicing, recommending lenders, and preparing strong applications — through to following deals to settlement.



Confident across multiple loan types: You’ve worked on residential, investment, commercial, SMSF, and trusts, and you're comfortable navigating credit policy across major banks and non-bank lenders.



EXCELLENT English communication skills: You’ll liaise directly with brokers and sometimes clients — explaining your recommendations clearly and concisely.



Problem-solving mindset: You enjoy working through complex deals and helping find smart, viable solutions.



Not a support role: If your background is primarily in administration or document collection/submission only, this role is NOT suitable.



A successful applicant will have experience working with AOL, Mercury & Quickly. If you do not know what these programs are, then you are NOT qualified to enquire for this role. 



Why Join Us?



* Work with a tight-knit team of 3 brokers and 3 support staff who LOVE what they do

* We have a 100% approval track record and highly satisfied clients — your work will directly impact real outcomes

* Above-market salary for the right candidate — we pay well and value skill

* A fun, fast-paced culture — every day is different, and we keep things exciting

* Full-time, permanent, work-from-home role: Monday to Friday, 9am to 6pm AEST





How to Apply



Please DO NOT send a CV only.



We want to hear from you.

Send us a short VIDEO INTRODUCTION  (2–4 minutes) where you:



* Walk us through your experience as a Credit Analyst

* Explain the types of loans and clients you’ve worked with

* Tell us how your role differs from broker support or admin staff

* Show us your communication style and English fluency



Upload your video to Google Drive or YouTube (unlisted) and include the link in your application. Failure to do this will result in AUTOMATIC DECLINE of your application, as it will show a lack of attention to detail. ATTENTION TO DETAIL is KEY to this role.  



If you're a true credit analyst who loves problem-solving, has a high attention to detail, excellent English, thrives in a high-achieving team, and wants to work on complex deals that challenge you — this is your next great opportunity.



We look forward to seeing your video!

title: Virtual Executive Assistant
description:
I'm the founder of a digital growth marketing company that helps mission-driven founders scale their businesses with more ease & less overwhelm - and I'm looking for a small team of highly-skilled Executive Assistants to help take over the marketing and management tasks that make a huge difference in the lives of the people that hire us.



I'm looking for a max of 5 amazing executive assistants available for part-time (potential for full time) with a salary starting at $500 USD per month and with long term success and robust training, moving up to $700 USD per month as an emerging leader in the company.



If you have the following skill sets, I encourage you to apply:



REQUIRED EXPERIENCE:

- Minimum of 3–5 years of experience in Digital Marketing, Video Editing, Social Media Management, Content Creation, and Executive Assistant Work (Administrative Tasks, Calendar &
 Management, etc)

You’re trusted to manage marketing deliverables while providing high-level executive support, keeping priorities organized, systems moving, and leadership focused on growth instead of day-to-day execution. You've done it all from managing schedules to
 & calendar management. You have a meticulous eye for detail where Prioritization and Organization are your love language



-- 1+ years of experience in Sales Funnels and Shopify

You're a professional who is passionate about helping changemakers simplify their lives by setting up systems that will allow them to operate their businesses with more ease and less overwhelm. You have experience with sales funnel and CRM software



- 1+ years of experience advertising on platforms like Instagram,
, Tik Tok, within a Marketing team consisting of Paid Acquisition, Organic Marketing, Customer Retention, & Product Marketing

You're an emerging leader who has the potential to head a team in the future that will report directly to you. Having leadership experience is a MAJOR plus



- Creating SOPs (Standard Operating Procedures)

You’ll ensure each business function has detailed documentation for repeatable and scalable growth if it isn't already place. If you see gaps, you take the initiative to fill them and produce results without anyone knowing there was an issue (yea, all that and a bag of chips :-)



- Experience working at a digital/online product/platform: You’re familiar with online courses, digital products & platforms and popular tools in the business space ranging from landing page builders and
 service providers to CRMs, and course hosting platforms aren’t foreign to you (We teach tools like Shopify, Convertkit, Kajabi, Teachable, Learnworlds, Calendly, etc)



ABOUT YOU:

- “You down with SOP? Yeah you know me!”—You’re an advocate for SOPs (Standard Operating Procedures) to make our systems repeatable & scalable.

- Your love language is processes & predictable, meteoric growth. We never question company progress towards the quarterly and yearly goals because you keep real-time metrics for all projects.

- You’re aware of new software and can look at current systems and identify how to automate tasks a company has been doing manually for months.

- You’re addicted to digital processes & automation in the world of social media because you love building connections in the digital space and you’ve seen how powerful it can be in business growth

- You’re driven by metrics & tracking. You know that you can’t improve something unless you measure it, so you develop ways to measure performance so your company is always predictably improving.

- Timeliness and deadlines are your jam. When we have a team call at 10:00am, you show up at 9:55am. When the deadline is Tuesday at 5:30pm, you have it done Monday.

- You overcommunicate clearly and confidently. If you agree/disagree with something, you communicate that without hesitation or overthinking. You’re no stranger to asking why we do things a certain way to ensure we’re intentional with our resources.

- You’re a leader and team player. Ego? What ego? If something needs to be done, you dive in to make sure all critical tasks are accounted and cared for.



If you’re nodding your head “Yes” to the above, proceed below to apply.



PERKS:

I'm committed to setting our staff up for success with access to trainings that will certify your skills in:

- Task & Calendar Management

- Launch/Sales Strategy Planning

- Sales Funnel Tech Setup (For E-Commerce or Service Based Businesses)

- Social Media Management

- Digital Media Marketing (Including
 and SMS Marketing)

- Lead Generation



After one week of training and assessment, you're officially certified under our internal training program, which means hitting the ground running with your new skills. Perks include:

- Part time work hours

- Work from anywhere in the world (as long as your internet signal is strong and computer is fast)

- Starting Salary at $500 USD a month ($6000 USD annual)

- Internal certification program to enhance your professional skills in your career (I have helped clients amass at least $10M from the same digital growth marketing strategies I will require you to learn)



Interested? Please reply to this post with the secret keyword "APPLES" so I know you can pay attention to detail - from there, I'll let you know next steps if you qualify.

title: Invoicing Specialist
description:
We are seeking a detail-oriented and reliable Invoicing Specialist to join our team. This role is primarily focused on ensuring accurate billing, timely collections, and smooth financial operations, while also supporting a limited scope of structured administrative and HR-related tasks.



The ideal candidate will have a strong grasp of calculations, strong attention to detail, and the ability to manage credits, discounts, and follow-ups with professionalism.



As an Invoicing Specialist, you will be responsible for preparing and issuing invoices, calculating adjustments, monitoring payment status, and maintaining accurate billing records. In addition, you will support basic administrative processes such as maintaining employee records and coordinating onboarding and offboarding system access.



Key Responsibilities:

-Prepare, review, and issue accurate invoices based on client agreements and internal records

-Calculate credits, discounts, cancellations, and other billing adjustments

-Monitor payment status and proactively follow up on overdue invoices

-Ensure all billing details are correct, including names, rates, lesson records, and payment terms

-Maintain organized documentation of invoices, credits, payments, and adjustments

-Communicate professionally with clients to address billing inquiries and resolve discrepancies

-Work in close collaboration with the customer relations team

-Generate regular reports on invoicing status and outstanding payments

-Support general finance administrative tasks and coordinate with accountants as required

-Recommend improvements to invoicing processes and payment follow-up procedures

-HR Administrative support: maintain employee data in HR systems, ensure accuracy of personal and employment records, support onboarding & offboarding processes



Job Requirements:

-Proven experience in invoicing, billing, finance, or accounts receivable roles

-Strong numerical and calculation skills with high attention to detail

-Ability to handle complex pricing structures, discounts, and adjustments

-Excellent organizational skills and the ability to manage multiple accounts simultaneously

-Strong follow-up skills with a proactive approach to collections and client communication

-Familiarity with invoicing software, spreadsheets, and billing systems (Google Sheets experience a plus)

-Professional communication skills in English (written and spoken)

-Integrity, reliability, and a service-oriented mindset

-Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, Business Administration, or a related field preferred



Working Hours & Availability:

Must be available to work 40 hours per week



Standard working hours are (including break on full work days):

Monday: 9:00 AM – 5:30 PM (Jakarta Time)

Tuesday: 9:00 AM – 5:30 PM (Jakarta Time)

Wednesday: 12:00 PM – 4:00 PM (Jakarta Time)

Thursday: 9:00 AM – 5:30 PM (Jakarta Time)

Friday: 9:00 AM – 5:30 PM (Jakarta Time)

Saturday: 12:00 PM – 4:00 PM (Jakarta Time)



Willingness to work overtime when required to meet billing deadlines or critical follow-ups

eting (mandatory, 3pm CET)

title: Medical Referral Specialist / Referral Coordinator
description:
We Are Hiring: Medical Referral Specialist / Referral Coordinator



Position Overview:



We are seeking an experienced Referral Specialist / Referral Coordinator with strong medical administrative skills to support our medical Referral Department. The ideal candidate will be responsible for managing the end-to-end referral process, ensuring accurate coordination between providers, insurance companies, and patients to facilitate timely access to care.



Key Responsibilities:



1.Process and manage incoming and outgoing medical referrals from initiation to completion



2.Coordinate referrals between primary care providers, specialists, and facilities



3.Verify insurance eligibility and referral requirements



4.Obtain authorizations when required for referred services



5.Follow up on pending referrals and approvals to prevent delays in patient care



6.Communicate with insurance companies, provider offices, and patients regarding referral status



7.Accurately document referral information and outcomes in the EMR/EHR system



8.Handle inbound and outbound calls professionally



9.Respond to patient and provider inquiries related to referrals



Requirements:



1.Must be a Nurse Graduate



2.Minimum 2 years of experience in a Referral Department, Referral Coordination, or similar medical administrative role



3.Strong understanding of medical terminology



4.Experience working with EMR/EHR systems (e.g., ECW or similar platforms)



5.Experience with insurance verification, referral eligibility, and payer communication



6.Experience handling patient and provider calls professionally



7.Fluent in English, both spoken and written



8.Available to start immediately



9.Must have own computer/laptop, stable internet connection, noise-canceling headset, and backup equipment



10.Confident in handling inbound and outbound calls

title: AI Product Photo Lister for Google Shopping – Only A-Players Wanted
description:
Are you a visual genius with a passion for e-commerce? Do you know how to make products stand out on Google Shopping through stunning images? We’re looking for a full-time AI Product Photo Lister to join our growing international team.



We run multiple general and niche dropshipping stores, with a strong focus on home decor. We believe that click-through rate (CTR) is one of the most important success factors in Google Shopping, and one of the best ways to improve CTR is with incredible images that outshine the competition.



Who we’re looking for:



- You have experience creating AI-generated product images



- You have a strong eye for e-commerce visuals and aesthetics



- You understand what makes an image stand out on Google Shopping



- You’re skilled in Midjourney, Photoshop, Canva, or similar tools



- You are up to date on trends in product photography



- You understand competitor analysis and know how to use it to improve image strategy



- You can work with Shopify or product listing teams



- You’re fluent in English, self-motivated, and results-driven



HOW TO APPLY (MANDATORY TEST TASK)



To ensure we only hire top-level candidates, we’ve prepared a test assignment.



You will not be considered if you skip this.



Your task:



1. You will receive 3 product links from us. Please check them below. 



2. For each product, create 5 unique, high-quality images:



- Use the product page as your reference

- Each image should be visually different (e.g. lifestyle, infographic, close-up, creative use)

- Your goal is to improve the visual appeal and click-through rate



3. Submit your images as one clean and organized Google Drive folder or PDF

 (15 total images: 3 products × 5 images)



Links to the product pages:











Image Creation Guidelines:



- Use AI or photo editing tools to create images that look professional, clean, and click-worthy



- Include lifestyle photos, product close-ups, or in-use visuals



- Always analyze competitor images in the same market (in this case Denmark)



- Your goal is to outperform the competition visually



- Avoid generic backgrounds,  be creative but Google friendly



What we offer:

- Part-time, long-term remote position

- Work with a driven, results-oriented team

- Constant feedback, training & growth opportunities

- Work on premium home decor and fast-moving general products



Only Apply If:



- You’re serious about visual impact in e-commerce



- You’re ready to grow, learn, and produce results consistently



To Apply:



Send us:



1. A short message explaining your experience and tools used



2. The link to your test task (Google Drive folder with 3 products × 5 images each)



3. Your OnlineJobs.ph profile link



Final Note:

This is a role for visual A-players only. If you know how to turn images into conversions, this is your time to shine. We look forward to seeing your creativity and attention to detail.

About the Role



We at JVDB Studios are looking for a Sales Development Representative (SDR) to drive outbound growth and support inbound sales efforts for our dubbing and localization platform. This is a high-activity, execution-focused role where your main goal is to generate qualified opportunities and book meetings.



You will play a key role in building pipeline by reaching out to creators, small studios, SMBs, MCNs, and production companies, while also ensuring inbound leads are handled quickly and professionally. This role requires someone who is proactive, organized, and comfortable working in a fast-paced, performance-driven environment.



What You’ll Do



You will execute high-volume cold outreach through
, LinkedIn, and other approved channels, with a target of reaching 500 to 1,000 qualified outbound touches per week once systems are fully in place. You will respond to inbound leads quickly, ideally within five minutes, and focus on converting interest into booked discovery calls.



You will be responsible for booking and confirming meetings to ensure strong attendance and protect the sales team’s calendar. Part of your role will involve qualifying leads, identifying whether they are SMB or enterprise-level opportunities, and routing larger opportunities accordingly while handling SMB discovery calls yourself once fully trained.



You will maintain accurate CRM records, track key metrics such as replies, positive responses, meetings booked and held, and overall lead status. You will also report weekly on activity, performance, and any bottlenecks, while contributing feedback to improve outreach messaging and sequences.



What We’re Looking For



We are looking for someone with proven experience in sales development, particularly in cold outreach through
 and LinkedIn. You should have excellent English communication skills, both written and verbal, as this role requires constant interaction with prospects.



You should be comfortable using CRM systems and outbound tools such as Apollo, Clay, Smartlead, Instantly, HubSpot, 
, or similar platforms. A solid understanding of lead qualification, sales processes, and outreach sequencing is important, along with the ability to manage follow-ups and stay organized.



Experience in B2B SaaS, the creator economy, media, YouTube, dubbing, localization, or agency sales is a strong advantage.



Candidate Profile



This role is best suited for someone who is highly organized, detail-oriented, and consistent with follow-ups. You should be proactive, responsive, and comfortable handling repetitive outreach while maintaining quality.



We are looking for someone with strong energy who can build relationships and is relentless in pursuing opportunities. You should be coachable, able to improve based on feedback, and comfortable working independently in a remote setup.



A strong sense of ownership, honesty in reporting numbers, and the ability to identify and communicate bottlenecks early are essential. You should be motivated by results, hungry to perform, and driven to succeed in a sales environment.



Engagement Details



This is a full-time freelance contractor role. The working schedule is Monday to Friday, from 12:00 AM to 8:00 AM Amsterdam time. The role requires consistent daily activity, responsiveness, and accountability.



Why Join JVDB Studios



You will be part of a fast-growing team working on a product within the creator and media space. This role offers the opportunity to directly impact revenue, build valuable sales experience, and grow within a performance-driven environment.



How to Apply



Send your updated resume and a short video recording (Loom) to:







Subject line: JVDB SDR



Applications without a video recording will not be processed. We are hiring ASAP. We are only entertaining Filipino applicants.
