title: Sales Development Representative (SDR) – Lead Generation & Cold Calling
description:
About AI Acquisition

AI Acquisition is the global category leader in AI service-provider enablement. Operating globally, with the US as its primary market, our hybrid Platform-as-a-Service (PaaS) and AI marketplace model has achieved explosive growth by solving a critical pain point: connecting AI agencies with qualified enterprise opportunities at scale.

We combine proprietary AI orchestration tools with enterprise-grade SaaS infrastructure, delivering immediate value to agencies and SMBs worldwide.

We’re transforming how entrepreneurs build life-changing businesses by brokering AI tools to business owners eager to succeed. Positioned at the forefront of the $1.3 trillion AI revolution, we empower members to earn $500+ per hour with streamlined AI-powered systems.

Through our AI Agency Incubator, AI Accelerator, and AI Launchpad, we provide the systems, training, and support needed for rapid success.

________________________________________

The Role

We’re hiring an SDR (Sales Development Representative) – Lead Generation & Cold Calling Specialist.

This is a frontline outbound role focused on generating and qualifying leads for the sales team.

This is not a closing role.

You are not here to manage long sales cycles or handle complex negotiations.

You are here to start conversations, qualify interest, and book meetings for closers.

You’ve likely:

• Worked in cold calling, telemarketing, or appointment setting 

• Handled high-volume outbound calls daily 

• Qualified leads based on basic criteria (budget, need, timing) 

In this role, you will be responsible for reaching out to prospects across cold calls,
, and messaging platforms, then identifying if they are a fit for the offer before passing them to the sales team.

This is a high-activity, performance-driven SDR role where consistency and communication matter.

________________________________________

Requirements

What You’ll Do

1. Outbound Lead Generation

• Conduct high-volume cold calls to potential leads 

• Reach out via
, LinkedIn, or SMS when required 

• Follow structured scripts to initiate conversations 

• Build initial interest with prospects 

________________________________________

2. Lead Qualification

• Identify if prospects meet basic qualification criteria 

• Ask structured questions around need, budget, and timing 

• Filter unqualified leads efficiently 

• Ensure only qualified leads are passed to closers 

________________________________________

3. Appointment Setting

• Book meetings or demos for the sales team 

• Ensure accurate scheduling and confirmation of appointments 

• Maintain consistent follow-ups when needed 

________________________________________

4. CRM & Tracking

• Log all calls, notes, and lead status updates 

• Maintain organized pipeline tracking 

• Ensure accurate data entry and reporting 

________________________________________

What We’re Looking For (Must-Have)

• Strong spoken English for phone conversations 

• Good written English for follow-ups 
/SMS) 

• Comfortable with high-volume cold calling 

• Ability to follow scripts and stay consistent 

• Resilient and comfortable handling rejection 

• Prior experience in SDR, telemarketing, or BPO roles preferred 

________________________________________

Nice to Have (Preferred)

• Experience in appointment setting or outbound sales 

• Familiarity with CRM tools (HubSpot, GoHighLevel, etc.) 

• Background in call centers or customer-facing roles 

• Experience working with international clients 

________________________________________

What Success Looks Like

• High volume of outbound calls completed daily 

• Consistent lead qualification output 

• Strong appointment booking rate 

• Clean and accurate CRM updates 

• Reliable and consistent daily performance 

________________________________________











Benefits



Why Join Us

• Work in a structured outbound sales environment 

• Gain hands-on experience in lead generation and SDR workflows 

• Opportunity to grow into higher-level sales roles 

• Training and scripts provided 

• Remote and flexible setup depending on arrangement 

________________________________________

Application Process

Please include:

• Short summary of your experience in cold calling or lead generation 

• Any relevant SDR, telemarketing, or BPO experience 

• Tools or CRM systems you have used (if any) 

• Brief note on your comfort level with outbound calling

title: Ecommerce Executive (Shopee, Tiktok, Lazada Manage Seller Center)
description:
Join our team and become part of a dynamic, global organization of 40 professionals across Korea, Singapore, Malaysia, and the Philippines. Collaborate closely with our regional teams to grow an exciting portfolio of leading Korean brands, including Beauty of Joseon, Needly, Tirtir, and other top-trending names in the market.



We are seeking a confident and experienced tea
mber who can independently oversee e-commerce operations, take proactive initiative, and consistently deliver results with minimal supervision, ensuring long-term success and stability in the role.



Key Responsibilities:



- Oversee day-to-end e-commerce operations (catalog, price checks, campaign execution, inventory management, shipping, logistics, customer service and returns) for the Seller Center Stores and the international House of Hur accounts across Singapore, Malaysia, Taiwan, and Vietnam.

- Manage product listings across online platforms (Shopee, Lazada, TikTok Shop), ensuring accuracy, quality, and completeness (basic photo editing and product research).

- Monitor pricing strategies within Margin Chart, Platform Ads (Shopee, Lazada, Tiktok Seller Center) and campaign promotions (e.g., 11.11, 12.12, Payday Sales) to drive sales growth performance.

- Analyze sales data, competitor activity, inventory levels, and shipment status, preparing actionable performance reports.

- Confidently present weekly and monthly data to management with business insights and clear strategies.

- Maintain overall e-commerce account health, coordinating with teams to resolve customer service issues, refunds, returns, and fraud cases.

- Collaborate with team and provide ad-hoc support for special events and projects.



Qualifications:



- 2–4 years of hands-on experience managing e-commerce operations on Shopee, Lazada, TikTok Seller Centre or Bigseller Account, or similar is required.

- Strong understanding of online campaign management, pricing strategies, and platform algorithms.

- Proficient in Google sheets and Excel. Managing large datasets, utilizing advanced formulas (e.g., VLOOKUP, Pivot Tables), and generating performance reports.

- Highly organized, able to prioritize tasks and meet deadlines in a fast-paced environment.

- Strong communication skills with the ability to work effectively in multicultural teams.

- Seeking a dedicated full-time and long term role.





Benefits:

- Stable full time with leave benefits, up to 14 days annual leave, holiday leave, birthday leave.

- Opportunity to be part of a growing team and Korean Beauty Brands.

- Travel Opportunity to Singapore during events.

- Comfortable work environment, same working time zone as the Philippines.

- Structured salary increase and promotion based on performance.

We appreciate your interest and look forward to hearing from you!

title: WordPress & Shopify Store Developer (No Agencies)
description:
Arispheris is looking for a highly skilled Website Developer to join our team for a 3-month full-time project term, with potential for extension. This is a remote position, but we require a designer who can work independently, take initiative, and bring fresh, original creativity to the table—no AI-generated websites will be accepted.



If you thrive in an environment that values creative autonomy, attention to detail, and hands-on design skills, we’d love to hear from you.



Company Overview

Arispheris is a staffing firm that provides authentic and connective staffing solutions for small business owners. We take pride in our in-depth recruiting process, ensuring that every professional we bring on board has the skills and drive to succeed.



We are actively expanding our design team and are looking for a Website Developer who excels at crafting fast and SEO ready websites to support clients in reaching their target audiences to increase revenue and website traffic. If you want to be part of a team that values true creative expertise, this is the perfect opportunity for you!



Requirements & Qualifications

Bachelor's degree in Web development or related field, or relevant experience.

Minimum of 2 years of professional experience in website design and coding.

Website and software application designing, building, or maintaining, without AI.

Using scripting or authoring languages, management tools, content creation tools, applications, and digital media.

Conferring with teams to resolve conflicts, prioritize needs, develop content criteria, or choose solutions.

Directing or performing Website updates.

Developing or validating test routines and schedules to ensure that test cases mimic external interfaces and address all browser and device types.

Editing, writing, or designing Website content, and directing tea
mbers who produce content.

Maintaining an understanding of the latest Web applications and programming practices through education, study, and training. 

Back up files from Web sites to local directories for recovery.

Create daily logs of tasks completed for company and client reference.

Identifying problems uncovered by customer feedback and testing, and correcting or referring problems to appropriate personnel for correction.

Evaluating code to ensure it meets industry standards, is valid, is properly structured, and is compatible with browsers, devices, or operating systems.

Determining user needs by analyzing technical requirements.

Must be highly proficient in both WordPress, their respective plugins, & Shopify—you will be tested during the interview.

Strong sense of design composition.

Ability to create websites quickly and efficiently while maintaining a high standard of design quality.

Excellent communication skills and ability to work collaboratively with clients and teams.

Detail-oriented and capable of handling multiple projects at once while meeting deadlines.

Familiarity with tools like Google Workspace, Slack, and Asana is a plus.

Absolutely no AI-generated designs, portfolios, and websites will be considered.



Software & Platform Requirements:

Expertise in WordPress, Shopify and Elementor

Solid understanding of UX/UI principles

Proficiency in HTML and Python coding

Experience with affiliate marketing strategies

Proficiency with Shopify e-commerce platforms



Compensation & Benefits

Full-time remote position (3-month term, potential for extension based on performance)

Competitive compensation based on experience and skills

Bi-monthly pay via money transfer

Paid career training relevant to the role (should you be hired for longer than nine months) 

Performance-based bonuses (available for long-term staff)

Work-life balance and flexible hours



As part of our team, you'll interact closely with clients, forming strong partnerships. You'll use your excellent communication skills to understand, negotiate, and ultimately create tailored solutions that exceed expectations. Does the idea of such meaningful client engagement unnerve you? If not, then you're ready to contribute to our shared vision. Here are the next steps to move forward.



***Very Important***

How to Apply

We will be holding interviews on Wednesday, Friday, and Saturday this week for immediate hiring contingent on your skills, your interview task performance and company fit.



To Apply, Follow These Steps:

Reply with your Name and Position in the subject line. Example: "John Doe – WordPress & Shopify Store Developer"

Define a "backend developer staging area" in WordPress/ CPanel (this is part of your application process).



Submit the following in your response
:

Your resume (CV)

Portfolio links showcasing your original design work (Absolutely NO AI-generated websites. Wordpress & Shopify Shops ONLY)

List links to Wordpress & Shopify Sites you have designed.

One employer reference



Candidates that do not submit the requested items will not be considered. 



Once we receive your application, we will send you a scheduler to book your interview slot. During your interview, you will be required to demonstrate proficiency in Wordpress, Developer Backend, and Shopify Shop Setup.



****Lastly, this job opportunity is for an individual person and not available to teams, staffing agencies, or 3rd parties.****



If you’re ready to bring your creativity to a team that values real site developer expertise, we look forward to your application!

title: Storytelling, Journalism Content Writer (No AI Writers)
description:
Arispheris seeks an experienced and highly driven content writer responsible for creating written content for various platforms such as websites, blogs, social media, and marketing materials for a 3-month full-time project. Their main goal is to create engaging and informative content that will attract and retain the attention of their audience and to create eye-catching marketing and publication materials for online-based businesses, without the use of AI. You will also be responsible for coming up with original content for marketing materials for the company and its clients. They must have excellent writing and communication skills, as well as a strong understanding of SEO principles to create written content that is optimized for search engines, independent of any AI platforms.



You will be collaborating with tea
mbers in the Philippines and clients throughout the US and Europe; therefore, you must have excellent communication skills, a flexible schedule, and the ability to meet and work during specified time zones.



Company Overview

Arispheris is a staffing firm that provides authentic and connective staffing solutions for the small business owner. We provide in-depth recruiting processes to ensure that clients will have the best experience with our remote professionals.



We are actively seeking individuals with your abilities to join our team as we try to expand each of our departments. If you are interested in working remotely with a flexible schedule and demonstrating your creativity by crafting new and compelling written content for our company and diverse clients, then Arispheris is the company for you!



We seek a qualified candidate with the following qualifications for this position:

Bachelor's degree in English, journalism, marketing, or a related field

2+ years of experience in content writing, preferably in a professional setting

Excellent writing and editing skills, with a strong attention to detail, without the use of AI

Knowledge of SEO principles and experience optimizing content for search engines

Ability to research and gather information on various topics, without the use of AI

Strong communication skills and ability to work well in a team environment

Familiarity with content management systems (CMS) and basic HTML skills is a plus



Software & Platform Knowledge & Experience in the following:

Google Workspace

Canva

Microsoft Office Suites

Asana, Slack, Klayvio and Hubstaff

ClickFunnels and Shopfiy is a plus, but not required

Seeking: Expert Level in Excel/Google Sheets 



Job Highlights

Great compensation and benefits

Work-life balance

Work community incentives

Long-term career opportunity

Wonderful coworkers



Key responsibilities of a content writer include:



Researching and gathering information on various topics to create accurate and informative content, without the use of AI

Writing and editing engaging and SEO-friendly content for websites, blogs, social media, and marketing materials

Collaborating with tea
mbers, including designers and SEO specialists, to ensure content aligns with brand guidelines and SEO strategy

Collaborating with tea
mbers and clients to determine content needs and goals

Analyzing and measuring the success of content through metrics such as website traffic and engagement

Participating in brainstorming sessions to generate ideas for new written content

Ensuring all content is proofread and error-free before publication, without the use of AI

Developing ideas and creating outlines for new content

Reviewing and proofreading content for accuracy and grammar errors

Utilizing SEO best practices to optimize content for search engines

Updating and maintaining content on websites and other platforms

Interviewing clients to get acquainted with their overall business identity and branding preferences to create compelling content for the company and clients

Creating a directory and maintaining the organization of all content materials for the company and for each client.

Ensuring that contents and final deliverables comply with company and clients' guidelines, specifications, and preferences, and achieving the highest standard of written quality, without the use of AI.

Maintaining an eagerness to expand individual skillsets by utilizing company resources and leaning into areas of improvement.



The candidate we’re looking for has:

Unrivaled eye for writing, storytelling, creativity, and resourcefulness

Can write without using AI

Capability to create social media captions, postings, publication materials, and similar content on the fly.

Ability to adapt their writing style to fit the tone and audience of their projects

Exceptional verbal and written communication skills

Outstanding interpersonal skills and strong sense of collaboration with different departments

Ability to set priorities and meet deadlines

Comfortable providing suggestions to help the company and clients

Unparalleled attention to detail

Ability to work on multiple projects/clients simultaneously and adhere to strict deadlines

Ability to make evaluative judgments

Flexibility to create strategies quickly & effectively

Attentiveness & integrity

Friendly, emphatic, approachable, and professional demeanor

Ability to work well with internal and external parties



As a Content Writer, you may be entrusted with a variety of duties. The qualifications, responsibilities, and skill sets outlined above are merely a sampling of the duties that you will be responsible for. Job duties are expected to be carried out with minor to no supervision.



Compensation & Benefits

Full-time remote position (3-month term, potential for extension based on performance)

Competitive compensation based on experience and skills

Bi-monthly pay via money transfer

Paid career training relevant to the role

Performance-based bonuses

Work-life balance and flexible hours



How to Apply

We will be holding interviews on Wednesday, Friday, and Saturday of this and next week for immediate hiring, contingent on your skills, your interview task performance and company fit.



To Apply, Follow These Steps:

Reply with your Name and Position in the subject line. Example: "John Doe – Storytelling, Journalism, Writing Content Creator "

Share a story about your favourite food (this is part of your application process).



Submit the following:

Your resume (CV)

Portfolio links showcasing your original written work (no AI-generated content)

Publications you have written and published (if applicable)

title: Unlock Your Creativity: Join Our Team as a Graphic Designer for a Dynamic 3-Month Project
description:
Arispheris is looking for a highly skilled and innovative Graphic Designer to join our team for a 3-month full-time project term, with potential for extension. This is a remote position, but we require a designer who can work independently, take initiative, and bring fresh, original creativity to the table—no AI-generated designs will be accepted.



If you thrive in an environment that values creative autonomy, attention to detail, and hands-on design skills, we’d love to hear from you.



Company Overview

Arispheris is a staffing firm that provides authentic and connective staffing solutions for small business owners. We take pride in our in-depth recruiting process, ensuring that every professional we bring on board has the skills and drive to succeed.



We are actively expanding our design team and are looking for a Graphic Designer who excels at crafting compelling visuals that enhance brand presence and engage audiences. If you want to be part of a team that values true creative expertise, this is the perfect opportunity for you!



Key Responsibilities

Design on-brand graphics for both Arispheris and its clients, including but not limited to:

Logos, brand kits, media and promo materials

Social media banners, headers, and marketing posts

Website vector images, multimedia thumbnails, and digital ads

Newsletter and
 marketing templates

eBook and print book covers

Presentation decks, invitations, and website wireframes

Ensure all final graphics are visually appealing, 100% original (no AI-generated work), and meet client brand guidelines.

Collaborate with tea
mbers and clients to conceptualize social media campaigns and marketing materials.

Present design drafts, revise based on feedback, and ensure timely project completion.

Keep a well-organized directory of design assets for efficient access.

Stay up to date with design trends and continuously refine skills to maintain top-tier creative output.



Requirements & Qualifications

A degree in Graphic Design, Digital Arts, Creative Multimedia, Marketing, or a related field.

At least 2 years of professional experience in digital design, branding, or marketing.

Must be highly proficient in both Adobe Creative Suite (Illustrator, Photoshop) and Canva—you will be tested during the interview.

Strong sense of design composition, color theory, and typography.

Ability to create content quickly and efficiently while maintaining a high standard of design quality.

Excellent communication skills and ability to work collaboratively with clients and teams.

Detail-oriented and capable of handling multiple projects at once while meeting deadlines.

Familiarity with tools like Google Workspace, Slack, and Asana is a plus.

Absolutely no AI-generated designs or portfolios will be considered.



Compensation & Benefits

Full-time remote position (3-month term, potential for extension based on performance)

Competitive compensation based on experience and skills

Bi-monthly pay via money transfer

Paid career training relevant to the role

Performance-based bonuses

Work-life balance and flexible hours



***To Apply, Follow These Steps:***

1. Reply with your Name and Position in the subject line. Example: "John Doe – Graphic Designer"

2. Define a top 3 questions you ask a client when designing their brand kit. (this is part of your application process).

3. Submit the following:

   a. Your resume (CV)

   b. Portfolio links showcasing your original design work (no AI-generated content)



Once we receive and review your submission with the aforementioned items requested, we will send you a scheduler to book your interview slot, if you meet our design standards. You will be required to demonstrate proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite and Canva during the interview.



If you’re ready to bring your creativity to a team that values real design expertise, we look forward to your application!

title: Full Stack Developer
description:
We're Hiring: Full-Stack Developer (SaaS) — Nurse Space



We're looking for a driven Full-Stack Developer to design, build, and launch the Nurse Space SaaS platform — a modern solution bridging the staffing gap between qualified nurses and Australian hospitals. This begins as a part
 role, transitioning into full-time as the platform grows.



What We're Looking For

* Mid-to-senior-level developer only — must have several years of proven professional experience; no recent graduates

* Must have built and launched real SaaS web or mobile products

* Capable of handling both front-end and back-end development, from concept through to deployment

* Comfortable utilising AI coding tools such as Claude Code or Cursor to work more efficiently

* Well-organised and deadline-driven — able to deliver without constant supervision

* Based in Metro Manila, able to communicate clearly with non-technical stakeholders, and required to submit previous work as part of the application



Key Skills

* React.js, Next.js, Node.js, or Django (Python)

* Mobile development — React Native (Phase 2)

* PostgreSQL or Firebase database design

* AWS or Google Cloud deployment

* AI/automation tool integration



What You'll Do

* Architect and build the Nurse Space platform from scratch — MVP delivery within 3–4 months for a September 2026 pilot launch

* Develop core features: shift posting, nurse–hospital matching, and user account management

* Ensure scalability, security, and data privacy compliance

* Collaborate directly with the CEO and CFO to translate business needs into product features

* Leverage AI coding tools to maximise speed and quality

* Own long-term platform maintenance and feature development post-launch



Ready to architect and deliver a platform that makes a real impact in healthcare?

Scan the QR code or click the link here: 
 to submit your application.

title: Appointment Setter
description:
Appointment Setter (100% Remote)



About Us

SG Services is a fast-growing B2B sales development and lead generation company based in Arlington, VA. Since 2019, we have helped clients across SaaS, private equity, energy, e-commerce, and other industries by booking qualified sales meetings and driving consistent pipeline growth.



Pay & Perks

Competitive monthly base salary plus quarterly incentives for booked appointments

100% remote work with flexibility across an 8-hour total shift

Generous paid time off: 24 local and U.S. holidays + 20 leave credits annually

Comprehensive training and clear growth pathways within the company



What You’ll Do

Engage prospects through
, LinkedIn, and other outreach platforms to schedule qualified appointments

Consistently meet and exceed appointment-setting targets to earn performance rewards

Maintain accurate and organized CRM data to ensure smooth sales follow-up and client success

Collaborate closely with the sales team to maximize conversion opportunities





What You Need

A computer with a minimum of 8GB RAM and an i3 processor (or equivalent)

Reliable internet connection of at least 30 MBPS

A backup device and backup internet source to ensure uninterrupted work

Strong communication skills, attention to detail, and ability to work independently





Why SG Services?

Career Growth: We promote from within and reward strong performance

Work-Life Balance: Remote flexibility with generous time off

Supportive Culture: A team environment built on collaboration, accountability, and professional development



Ready to take the next step in your career? Apply now and start your journey with SG Services.



Disclaimer: Please do not contact any SG Services employee or member of the management team directly. Any communication like this will result in immediate disqualification from the selection process.
